This elegant savory coulis is surprisingly versatile, working beautifully with delicate fish, cold dishes, or as a sophisticated finishing sauce. Light yet flavorful.
recipes.ingredients: 1 medium cucumber • 1 red chilli • 4 sprigs parsley • 6 sage leaves • 50 ml olive oil • squeeze of lemon juice • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Tomato Coulis
recipes.overview: A versatile, silky tomato sauce made from slowly reduced fresh tomatoes, aromatic vegetables, and delicate herbs. This is the foundation for countless dishes, use it on pasta, as a base for soups, or as an elegant finishing sauce. The long cooking concentrates tomato flavor into pure, bright essence.
recipes.ingredients: 750 grams large marmande tomatoes • 150 ml olive oil • 2 cloves garlic • 60 grams shallots • 6 sprigs thyme • 1 tablespoon tomato purée • 1 pinch sugar • 6 peppercorns • 1 pinch salt • 1 Bouquet garni

subcategories.overview: Savoury vegetable purées for finishing meat and fish dishes.

categories.overview: Smooth, sieved purées for finishing plates and dressing desserts: fruit on the sweet side, vegetable on the savoury.

categories.label: Desserts

subcategories.label: Brownie

recipes.title: Pecan nut brownies
recipes.overview: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownies studded with toasted pecan nuts. These brownies have a dense, moist interior with just-set edges, the perfect balance of chocolate intensity and nutty richness. Elegant enough for entertaining yet comforting enough for everyday indulgence, especially paired with crème anglaise or fresh whipped cream.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams butter • butter • 200 grams dark chocolate at 70% cocoa solids • 4 eggs • 220 grams light brown sugar • 120 grams plain flour • 220 grams pecan nuts

subcategories.overview: Fudgy, cakey and in-between brownies.

subcategories.label: Cake

recipes.title: Chocolate biscotti cake
recipes.overview: An elegant no-bake chocolate cake featuring crushed biscotti and ground almonds bound with melted chocolate and topped with a glossy chocolate syrup, creating an intensely flavored, sophisticated dessert with interesting texture and depth. This contemporary creation combines Italian biscotti with chocolate to create something both familiar and novel.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams dark chocolate • 3 medium eggs • 50 grams candied fruit peel • 200 grams ground almonds • 150 grams biscotti • 200 grams icing sugar • 4 table spoons amaretto • 100 grams dark chocolate • 70 grams icing sugar

recipes.title: Lemon cake
recipes.overview: Moist and fragrant lemon cakes with a tender crumb, brushed with rum syrup and topped with a shimmering lemon icing glaze. These elegant loaves showcase brightness and simplicity, making them perfect for elegant entertaining or afternoon tea service, best sliced thin and served with fresh tea.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • butter • 3 small eggs • 175 grams caster sugar • finely grated zest of 2 lemons • pinch of salt • 75 ml double cream • 140 grams plain flour • 1 teaspoon baking powder • 50 ml dark rum • 80 grams apricot jam • 80 grams icing sugar • juice of 1 lemon

subcategories.overview: Classic and contemporary layered cakes.

subcategories.label: Cheesecake

recipes.title: Baked chocolate cheesecake with espresso sauce
recipes.overview: A rich and elegant chocolate cheesecake with a delicate shortcrust pastry base, silky chocolate-cream cheese filling, and a distinctive espresso-coffee liqueur sauce. This sophisticated dessert balances the intensity of chocolate with the subtle bitterness of coffee, creating a complex flavor profile suitable for elegant entertaining.
recipes.ingredients: 175 grams plain flour • 100 grams chopped butter • 25 grams caster or icing sugar • a little cold water • zest of one orange • 100 grams caster sugar • 75 grams butter • 200 grams dark chocolate • 500 grams cream cheese • 2 eggs, beaten

subcategories.overview: Baked and unbaked cheesecakes.

subcategories.label: Chocolate

recipes.title: Chocolate Roulade
recipes.overview: An elegant and impressive dessert of crispy meringue rolled around a rich chocolate filling, creating a beautiful spiral when sliced. The contrast between the light, airy meringue and the dense, silky chocolate filling provides the perfect balance of textures and flavors in this sophisticated French-inspired creation.
recipes.ingredients: 4 egg whites • 250 g golden unrefined caster sugar • 1 tsp cornflour • 1 tsp white wine vinegar • icing sugar to dust • 100 g plain chocolate • 15 g butter • 1 tbsp golden syrup • 4 tbsp cream liqueur • 300 ml double cream, whipped

recipes.title: Warm chocolate fondant
recipes.overview: Warm, molten chocolate cakes with a liquid chocolate center that flows onto the plate when cut, crowned with a dusting of cocoa powder and accompanied by velvety crème anglaise. These show-stopping individual cakes deliver theater and luxury in every spoonful, making them perfect for impressive dinner party finales.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams butter • 20 grams butter • 200 grams dark chocolate • 200 grams icing sugar • 4 eggs • 4 egg yolks • 55 grams flour • 35 grams cocoa powder

subcategories.overview: Chocolate-led desserts, including ganaches, tortes and roulades.

subcategories.label: Creamy

recipes.title: Cardamom-scented rice puddings
recipes.overview: An elegant and refined rice pudding infused with the warm, floral notes of cardamom, set in a caramel-coated mold like a crème caramel for elegant presentation. The subtle spice and tender rice create a comforting yet sophisticated dessert that feels both nostalgic and luxurious.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml milk • 75 grams short grain pudding rice • 8 cardamom pods • 6 egg yolks • 75 grams caster sugar • 120 grams caster sugar • 30 grams liquid glucose

subcategories.overview: Panna cotta, tiramisu and other rich, set creams.

subcategories.label: Creme

recipes.title: Chestnut crème with caramel sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant and refined chestnut cream studded with chestnut puree, touched with cognac and topped with chestnut "vermicelli," served with caramel sauce and chocolate-dipped langues de chat. This rustic yet sophisticated dessert celebrates autumn and the delicate flavor of chestnuts with minimal ornamentation.
recipes.ingredients: half a sheet gelatine • 180 grams tinned sweet chestnut purée • 200 ml whipping cream • 100 ml Cognac or Armagnac • 8 Chocolate-dipped langues de chat • half quantity Sauce caramel • 125 ml milk • 6 fresh chestnuts

recipes.title: Chocolate and raspberry trifle
recipes.overview: A sophisticated trifle of chocolate Genoise sponge, rich chocolate crème pâtissière, vibrant raspberry coulis, and silky white chocolate ribbons, topped with whipped cream and fresh raspberries. This elegant construction showcases beautiful color contrasts and complementary chocolate-raspberry flavors in a showstopping glass presentation.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams good quality white chocolate • 150 grams chocolate Génoise nature • 2 tablespoons sweet dessert wine • 200 ml whipping cream • 8 perfect raspberries • icing sugar • 375 ml milk • 50 grams caster sugar • 4 egg yolks • 20 grams plain flour • 20 grams dark cocoa powder • 125 grams raspberries • 1 lemon juice • 60 grams icing sugar

recipes.title: Coffee Creme Caramel
recipes.overview: An elegant custard-based crème caramel delicately infused with ground coffee, providing subtle bitterness and depth that balances the sweet caramel coating and silky custard. The coffee and caramel pairing creates a sophisticated flavor profile suitable for dinner parties and special occasions.
recipes.ingredients: 120 grams caster sugar • 30 grams liquid glucose • 250 ml milk • 20 grams coffee beans • 100 ml whipping cream • 3 eggs • 3 egg yolks • 60 grams caster sugar • 10 grams coffee beans

recipes.title: Crema Catalana
recipes.overview: A Catalan custard dessert featuring a silky, spiced cream custard base infused with fennel, cinnamon, and citrus zests, finished with a crisp caramelized sugar crust created with a blowtorch or under a hot grill. This is essentially a regional variation of crème brûlée with distinctive warm spices that hint at Middle Eastern influences.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml milk • 1 heaped teaspoon fennel seeds • 1 small cinnamon stick • 150 grams caster sugar • 1 orange zest • 1 lemon zest • 2 eggs • 6 egg yolks • 40 grams cornflour • 80 grams demerara sugar

recipes.title: Fig and honey pannacotta
recipes.overview: An elegant pannacotta infused with vanilla and sweetened with honey rather than sugar, studded with fresh fig slices visible through the creamy custard in its serving vessel. This refined Italian dessert celebrates the delicate tartness of figs paired with the subtle, complex sweetness of honey rather than refined sugar.
recipes.ingredients: 1 ½ sheets leaf gelatine • 300 ml double cream • 200 ml milk • 100 grams runny honey • 2 vanilla pods • 3 ripe fresh figs (sliced into rounds

recipes.title: Ginger crème brûlée
recipes.overview: A sophisticated crème brûlée infused with the warm, biting heat of fresh and preserved ginger, creating a dessert that balances spice with luxury. The ginger juice provides background warmth while optional preserved ginger pieces add textural interest and visual appeal at serving time.
recipes.ingredients: 80 grams root ginger • 500 ml milk • 500 ml whipping cream • 150 grams caster sugar • 200 grams egg yolks • 70 grams demerara sugar • 80 grams preserved stem ginger in syrup

recipes.title: Mascarpone with dates and candied peel
recipes.overview: An elegant and simple Italian dessert of candied fruit and dates folded into luxurious mascarpone cream, shaped into a quenelle and served with crème anglaise and candied fruit garnish. This sophisticated yet straightforward dessert celebrates the natural sweetness of dates and the richness of mascarpone without unnecessary complication.
recipes.ingredients: 120 grams Candied fruit peel • 4 dates • 200 grams mascarpone cheese • 200 ml whipping cream • 200 ml Crème anglaise

recipes.title: Tiramisu
recipes.overview: The iconic Italian dessert of coffee-soaked Savoiardi biscuits layered with a light mascarpone cream enriched with whipped cream and Amaretto liqueur, finished with a dusting of cocoa powder. This no-bake elegant dessert delivers coffee flavor, textural contrast, and the satisfaction of an assembled-to-order presentation rather than baked creation.
recipes.ingredients: 90 ml Amaretto liqueur • 300 ml Espresso coffee • 45 grams caster sugar • 250 ml double cream • 2 eggs • 250 grams mascarpone cheese • 30 Savoiardi Biscuits • cocoa powder

subcategories.overview: Crème brûlée, custards and other set or chilled cream desserts.

subcategories.label: Crepes

recipes.title: Banana soufflé crêpes with chocolate sauce
recipes.overview: Delicate crèpes folded around a light banana soufflé mixture and baked until the soufflé rises impressively above the edges, creating a dramatic and sophisticated dessert. The combination of creamy banana flavor with the ethereal soufflé texture delivers luxury in every bite, finished with warm chocolate sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 4 perfectly ripe medium bananas • juice of half a lemon • 50 ml milk • 3 egg yolks • 60 grams caster sugar • 1 tablespoon potato flour / starch • 7 egg whites • 8 crêpes • 30 grams butter • chocolate sauce

recipes.title: Crêpes
recipes.overview: Classic French crèpes: delicate, tissue-thin pancakes with a tender crumb and subtle vanilla flavor, serving as the foundation for infinite sweet and savory variations. These timeless crèpes are fundamental to French cuisine yet require precision and practice to master, rewarding with elegant, versatile results.
recipes.ingredients: 125 grams plain flour • 15 grams caster sugar • pinch of salt • 2 eggs • 325 ml milk • 100 ml double cream • few drops of vanilla extract • 20 grams clarified butter

subcategories.overview: Sweet thin pancakes, folded, rolled and stuffed.

subcategories.label: French

recipes.title: Chocolate salammbos
recipes.overview: Elegan pear-shaped chocolate cream-filled choux buns, topped with a caramel coating and candied violets for ornament. These show-stopping petits fours combine the delicate sweetness of choux, rich chocolate cream, and brittle caramel, making them perfect for elegant receptions and special occasions.
recipes.ingredients: 1 quantity fresh choux paste • 300 grams caster sugar • 24 crystallised violets • 500 grams chocolate crème pâtissière • 200 ml crème chantilly

recipes.title: Gâteau St. Honoré with cocoa dusted chantilly cream
recipes.overview: The pinnacle of classical French pastry work, this elaborate gâteau consists of a puff pastry base topped with a choux ring, surrounded by small caramel-topped choux puffs, and filled with vanilla-infused crème chantilly dusted with cocoa. This architectural masterpiece demands skill and precision but delivers stunning visual impact and sophisticated flavor.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams puff pastry • 1 quantity freshly made choux paste • eggwash • Filling • 600 grams chantilly cream • 2 tablespoons cocoa powder • Caramel • 200 grams caster sugar

recipes.title: Pain perdu
recipes.overview: French toast at its most elegant: thick-cut slices of rich brioche dotted with sultanas, soaked in a custard-like mixture of egg and milk, then pan-fried until golden and served with a crispy sugar crust. This luxurious interpretation of humble bread transforms it into a sophisticated dessert or brunch dish that tastes decadent without being overly heavy.
recipes.ingredients: 600 grams brioche dough • 120 grams sultanas • 1 egg yolk • 250 ml cold milk • 50 ml crème fraîche • 30 grams caster sugar • 1 whole egg • 1 egg yolk • pinch of salt • 140 grams butter • 50 grams granulated sugar to sprinkle

recipes.title: Parcels of poached pears
recipes.overview: Elegant little parcels of crispy puff pastry encasing tender poached pear wrapped in delicate crêpes and perfumed with mint. These impressive individual presentations combine multiple sophisticated elements and layers of flavor, making them perfect for elegant dinner parties or French restaurant-style service.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams caster sugar • 8 cloves • 4 perfectly ripe pears • 300 grams puff pastry • 6 crêpes • 8 fresh mint leaves • groundnut oil • granulated sugar

recipes.title: Pithiviers
recipes.overview: A stunning and elegant puff pastry tart filled with almond cream and topped with decorative curved rays and petal shapes, finished with a shimmering icing sugar glaze. This classical French pastry requires precision and skill but rewards with an impressive presentation and the delicious combination of buttery pastry, almond cream, and caramelized sugar.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams feuilletage • 250 grams crème d'amande • 50 grams crème pâtissière • 1 tablespoon rum • eggwash • 30 grams icing sugar

recipes.title: Profiteroles with ice cream and chocolate sauce
recipes.overview: One of the most beloved French desserts: light choux buns traditionally filled with vanilla ice cream and drowned in warm chocolate sauce, creating a beautiful contrast between cold and hot, crispy and soft. This uncomplicated yet utterly luxurious dessert requires only quality components and careful technique for showstopping results.
recipes.ingredients: 1 quantity freshly made choux paste • eggwash • 1 quantity vanilla ice cream • 250 grams dark bitter chocolate • 200 ml milk • 3 tablespoons double cream • 40 grams caster sugar • 30 grams butter

recipes.title: Red berry beignets
recipes.overview: Light, airy beignets coating fresh berries, with a slightly crispy exterior from the yeasted batter and a tender interior that yields to reveal juicy fruit. These ethereal fried pastries showcase fresh summer berries in their simplest, most elegant form, perfect for elegant dessert courses or petit fours.
recipes.ingredients: 7 grams fresh yeast • 75 ml milk • 130 grams plain flour • pinch of salt • 60 ml light beer • 1 egg • 2 tablespoons groundnut oil • 20 grams caster sugar • grapeseed oil • 500 grams mixed red fruits • granulated sugar

recipes.title: Roasted peaches on choux crowns
recipes.overview: A simple yet elegant celebration of ripe peaches served on crispy choux crowns topped with flaked almonds, surrounded by a butterscotch caramel enriched with grenadine. This refined dessert showcases the peak flavor of fresh summer peaches, treating them as the star ingredient while providing textural contrast with the choux.
recipes.ingredients: 4 ripe peaches • ½ quantity freshly made choux paste • eggwash • 25 grams flaked almonds • 75 grams caster sugar • 100 grams butter • 1 tablespoon grenadine syrup • juice of 1 lemon • icing sugar

subcategories.overview: Classic French patisserie, including éclairs, tarts and gateaux.

subcategories.label: Fruit

recipes.title: Apple strudel
recipes.overview: A classic German dessert of apple filling rolled in layers of tissue-thin filo pastry, then baked until golden and dusted with icing sugar. The delicate, crispy pastry contrasts beautifully with the tender, spiced apples, creating a rustic yet elegant dessert that showcases both simplicity and technique.
recipes.ingredients: 1 sheet of filo • 100 grams raisins • 1 tablespoon rum • 4 apples • juice of 1 lemon • 60 grams caster sugar • 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon • 30 grams icing sugar • clotted cream

recipes.title: Apple turnovers
recipes.overview: Elegant and portable apple turnovers with a fluted puff pastry edge, filled with cinnamon-spiced apple compôte, and finished with a caramelized icing sugar glaze. These individual pastries are sophisticated enough for elegant serving yet simple enough for everyday enjoyment, showcasing the timeless pairing of apples and cinnamon.
recipes.ingredients: 360 grams feuilletage • 400 grams apples • juice of 1 lemon • 60 grams caster sugar • ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon • eggwash • 20 grams icing sugar

recipes.title: Autumn fruit crumble
recipes.overview: A generous and warming autumnal crumble featuring tart cranberry, fragrant quince, and sweet apples, crowned with a buttery almond crumble topping studded with toasted flaked almonds. This deeply flavored dessert showcases the subtle flavors of fall fruits balanced with sweet spices and served warm for maximum comfort.
recipes.ingredients: 500 ml sirop a sorbet • 340 grams cranberries • 4 quince • 1 Bramley or other cooking apple • 4 Cox or Gala apples • 1 lemon juice • 180 grams caster sugar • 80 grams preserved stem ginger in syrup • 50 grams butter, cut into pieces, slightly softened • 60 grams brown sugar • 85 grams flour • 15 grams ground almond • 15 grams flaked almonds

recipes.title: Baked apples in a pastry cage
recipes.overview: An impressive individual dessert presentation featuring whole apples at their center, filled with date-soaked in fragrant jasmine tea, and encased in a beautifully decorated shortcrust pastry cage. This elegant combination of warming spices (jasmine), natural sweetness (dates), and crisp pastry creates a sophisticated presentation suitable for special occasions.
recipes.ingredients: 520 grams pâte brisée • 8 dates • 50 ml very fragrant jasmine tea • 4 medium crisp apples • 30 grams caster sugar

recipes.title: Baklava
recipes.overview: A Middle Eastern delicacy of honey-soaked, crispy-layered filo pastry studded with pistachios and warm spices, cut into diamonds and served at room temperature. This globally beloved pastry achieves its legendary texture through careful assembly and the crucial overnight soaking that allows the honey syrup to penetrate all layers while maintaining crispness.
recipes.ingredients: 16 sheets of filo • 400 grams pistachios • 60 grams caster sugar • 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon • 140 grams butter • 250 ml clear honey • 80 grams caster sugar • pared zest of 1 lime • 1 cinnamon stick • 2 cloves

recipes.title: Brandy snap baskets with rhubarb and raspberries
recipes.overview: Delicate, lace-like brandy snap pastry baskets filled with silky tanginess and fresh raspberries, these elegant petit fours showcase the classic combination of crispy-sweet with fresh tartness. The ginger and Cognac in the brandy snap mixture add sophisticated depth and warmth to what could otherwise be a one-dimensional dessert.
recipes.ingredients: 100 gram butter, melted • 100 gram caster sugar • 100 gram golden syrup • 100 gram plain flour • 40 gram fresh root ginger, peeled and grated • juice of half a lemon • 1 tablespoon Cognac • 2 young, tender rhubarb stalks • 500 ml sirop a sorbet • juice of 1 orange • 250 gram crème Chantilly • 18 perfectly ripe raspberries

recipes.title: Poached pears stuffed with figs and dates
recipes.overview: An elegant and simple dessert of whole ripe pears poached in a delicate sugar syrup infused with cinnamon, then stuffed with a fragrant compote of figs and dates, and served in caramel sauce. The combination of tender fruit, complementary flavors, and beautiful presentation makes this a timeless classic suitable for formal dinner parties.
recipes.ingredients: 6 William or conference pears • 1 lemon juice • 400 grams caster sugar • 1 cinnamon stick • 200 grams dates • 100 grams soft dried figs • 1.5 teaspoons rum • 400 ml Sauce caramel

recipes.title: Sweet spiced roasted peaches
recipes.overview: A simple yet elegant presentation of halved roasted peaches seated in their own fresh coulis, drizzled with warm honey infused with star anise, creating a light and refreshing dessert that showcases the natural sweetness of ripe fruit. The complex spice notes from star anise and nutmeg balance the peaches' simple sweetness.
recipes.ingredients: 6 tablespoons runny honey • 4 star anise • 6 peaches • juice of 2 lemons • small pinch of freshly grated nutmeg
ingredientNames: small pinch of freshly grated nutmeg

subcategories.overview: Fruit-led desserts, fresh and cooked.

subcategories.label: Ice Cream

recipes.title: Cinnamon Ice Cream
recipes.overview: A warm and aromatic ice cream infused with the sweet spice of cinnamon, creating a sophisticated frozen dessert with a distinctive flavor that bridges the gap between elegant and comforting. The exotic spice complemented by rich cream makes this an excellent accompaniment to apple desserts, pumpkin dishes, and warm spiced cakes.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml crème anglaise • 100 ml double cream

recipes.title: Lavender ice cream
recipes.overview: A delicate and fragrant ice cream infused with the gentle floral notes of culinary lavender, creating a sophisticated frozen dessert that evokes summer gardens and elegance. This refined ice cream deserves serving on its own or alongside light fruit desserts where its subtle perfume won't compete with other flavors.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml crème anglaise • 100 ml double cream

recipes.title: Stem ginger ice cream
recipes.overview: A sophisticated ice cream infused with the warm spice and slight heat of stem ginger, balanced with the tropical sweetness of desiccated coconut. This bold-flavored frozen dessert creates an exciting flavor profile that stands on its own and provides an exotic accompaniment to warm cakes and caramelized fruit desserts.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml crème anglaise • 75 grams stem ginger • 30 grams desiccated coconut • 100 ml double cream

recipes.title: Vanilla ice cream
recipes.overview: Classic vanilla ice cream with a luxurious, creamy texture enriched with double cream, creating a silky and rich frozen dessert that is pure indulgence. This timeless favorite serves as both a standalone dessert and the perfect accompaniment to warm pies, cakes, and compotes.
recipes.ingredients: 750 ml crème anglaise • 100 ml double cream

subcategories.overview: Custard-based and Philadelphia-style ice creams.

subcategories.label: Meringue

recipes.title: Baked Alaska
recipes.overview: A spectacular show-stopping frozen dessert featuring vanilla and coffee ice cream inside a sponge case, completely encased in Italian meringue and briefly torched or baked until golden. This impressive historic dessert creates drama at the table as a frozen filling remains cold while the exterior turns warm and golden.
recipes.ingredients: 1 vanilla pod • 1 tablespoon instant coffee • 4 tablespoons Grand Marnier • 4 eggs • 3 egg yolks • 85 grams caster sugar • 35 grams plain flour • 40 grams potato flour • 100 grams icing sugar • 250 ml milk • 250 ml double cream • 125 grams caster sugar • 1 vanilla pod • 6 egg yolks • 360 grams caster sugar • 30 grams liquid glucose • 6 egg whites

recipes.title: Floating islands with rhubarb
recipes.overview: Classic poached meringues served as "floating islands" atop silky crème anglaise, accompanied by delicately poached rhubarb and a drizzle of caramel for an elegant, intricate presentation. This refined French dessert creates beautiful textural contrast and showcases meringue's delicate, cloud-like quality.
recipes.ingredients: 2 young, tender rhubarb stalks • 250 ml crème anglaise • 1 litre of milk • 190 grams caster sugar • 6 egg whites • 150 grams caster sugar • 210 grams caster sugar

recipes.title: Lemon and orange meringue pie
recipes.overview: A classic British-style meringue pie with a buttery shortbread pastry shell, sharp lemon-orange curd filling, and a towering cap of crisp-edged, soft-centered Italian meringue. This tangy and sweet dessert perfectly showcases the interplay of flavors and textures, from the crumbly pastry through the silky curd to the cloud-like meringue topping.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams flour • 200 grams butter • 100 grams icing sugar • 1 pinch salt • 2 egg yolks • 1 drop vanilla essence • 2 level tablespoons cornflour • 100 grams golden caster sugar • finely grated zest 2 large lemons • 125 ml fresh lemon juice • juice 1 small orange • 85 grams butter • 3 egg yolks • 1 whole egg • 4 egg whites • 200 grams golden caster sugar • 2 level teaspoons cornflour

recipes.title: Meringue and red berry layers
recipes.overview: An impressive three-layer dessert built with crispy French meringue rounds interspersed with poached berries and their brilliant ruby coulis. This sophisticated construction offers multiple textural contrasts and celebratory visual appeal, perfect for special occasions when simple elegance impresses most.
recipes.ingredients: 275 grams meringue Francaise • 50 grams flaked almonds • 400 ml sirop a sorbet • 500 grams ripe mixed berries • juice of 1 lemon

recipes.title: Plum meringues
recipes.overview: Large, soft meringues studded with plums, creating a beautiful contrast between glossy poached fruit and fluffy meringue that softens into the plums. These rustic yet elegant individual showpieces celebrate the simplicity of fresh plums combined with light, delicate meringue.
recipes.ingredients: 300 grams plums • 300 ml sirop a sorbet • 2 bay leaves • 275 grams meringue Francaise

subcategories.overview: Pavlovas, vacherins and meringue-topped sweets.

subcategories.label: Mousse

recipes.title: Apricot and cognac mousse with caramelised almonds
recipes.overview: An elegant and sophisticated mousse showcasing the delicate flavor of ripe apricots enriched with Cognac, crowned with candied almonds that provide a beautiful crunch. This refined dessert balances fruit flavor with alcohol warmth and almond texture, making it a memorable finale to a refined dinner.
recipes.ingredients: 850 ml sirop a sorbet • 1 vanilla pod • 10 ripe apricots • 2 sheets leaf gelatine • 30 ml Cognac • 250 ml very cold double cream • caramelised almonds • 125 grams caster sugar • 40 grams liquid glucose • 32 blanched almonds

recipes.title: Chocolate mousse, lavender crémeux and berry compote
recipes.overview: An incredibly rich and luxurious chocolate mousse layered with a delicate chocolate Genoese sponge base and lavender crémeux, then topped with tart berry compote and fresh berries. This sophisticated three-component dessert showcases chocolate in multiple forms with complementary flavor and textural contrasts.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams caster sugar • 400 grams mixed red berries • juice of 1 lemon • 400 grams chocolate Genoese sponge mixture • 3 egg yolks • 40 grams caster sugar • 250 ml single cream • 3 grams lavender flowers • 1 sheet leaf gelatine • 200 grams dark chocolate • 150 ml crème anglaise • 240 ml double cream

recipes.title: Lime mousse with wild strawberries
recipes.overview: A zesty and sophisticated mousse infused with fresh lime juice and zest, lightened with Italian meringue and whipped cream, and garnished with delicate wild strawberries. The vibrant tartness of lime creates an elegant palate cleanser that tastes light and refreshing despite its creamy texture.
recipes.ingredients: 1 sheet leaf gelatine • 100 ml lime juice • 45 grams caster sugar • 100 grams warm meringue Italienne • 170 ml whipping cream • 10 grams lime zest • 250 grams hulled wild strawberries

recipes.title: Raspberry mousse
recipes.overview: A light and fruity mousse that lets the pure, bright flavor of raspberry shine through, combined with airy Italian meringue and whipped cream for a luxurious texture. This elegant dessert celebrates the essence of raspberries without overwhelming them with other flavors or fussy presentation.
recipes.ingredients: ½ sheets of gelatine • 400 grams raspberries • 120 grams meringue Italienne • 100 ml whipping cream • 2 tablespoons raspberry eau-de-vie or kirsch • 18 raspberries to finish

subcategories.overview: Light, aerated chocolate and fruit mousses.

subcategories.label: Parfait

recipes.title: Anise parfait
recipes.overview: A glamorous chilled parfait infused with the sophisticated anise flavor of Ricard or Pernod, served in a frozen ring and garnished with fresh berries and colorful fruit coulis. This frozen confection offers the lightness of whipped cream with the richness of egg custard, making it an elegant choice for formal dinners without requiring last-minute oven work.
recipes.ingredients: 1 egg plus 3 egg yolks • 50 grams caster sugar • 100 ml whipping cream • 100 ml double cream • 30 ml Ricard or Pernod • 100 ml strawberry coulis • 100 ml kiwi coulis • 8 strawberries • 100 ml Sirop a sorbet

recipes.title: Chilled limoncello parfait with raspberries
recipes.overview: A stunning frozen parfait with bright citrus flavor from limoncello and fresh lemon, topped with a jewel-like arrangement of fresh raspberries and their deep ruby coulis. This sophisticated frozen dessert combines a silky-smooth Italian custard base with the zesty brightness of lemon, making it perfect for summer entertaining and elegant dinner parties.
recipes.ingredients: 1 large egg • 100 grams caster sugar • finely grate zest of 2 lemons • 25 ml freshly squeezed lemon juice • ½ sheet leaf gelatine • 60 ml limoncello liqueur • 150 ml whipping cream • 150 ml double cream • 500 grams raspberries • 100 grams caster sugar • 12 mint sprigs

subcategories.overview: Frozen and chilled parfaits.

subcategories.label: Pasta

recipes.title: Half-moon shaped sweet pasta filled with candied fruit
recipes.overview: A festive Neapolitan specialty of delicate fried pasta half-moons filled with sweet ricotta, candied fruit, and almonds. These charming little pastries epitomize Italian Easter celebrations and can be served either as an elegant petit four or a light dessert, dusted generously with powdered sugar for a snow-like finish.
recipes.ingredients: 3 whole eggs • 2 egg yolks • 300 grams plain flour • 50 grams butter • 4 tablespoons Amaretto liqueur • 1 litre vegetable oil • icing sugar • 40 grams caster sugar • 250 grams ricotta cheese • zest of 1 orange • 10 almonds • 40 grams candied fruit

subcategories.overview: Sweet pasta desserts. Uncommon, but worth the search.

subcategories.label: Pastries

recipes.title: Glazed strawberry mille-feuilles
recipes.overview: An elegant and refined dessert of crispy caramelized puff pastry layered with vanilla crème anglaise and fresh strawberries. The thin, shatteringly crisp pastry contrasts perfectly with the silky filling and juicy fruit, making this a showstopping presentation suitable for the finest dinner parties or celebrations.
recipes.ingredients: 240 grams puff pastry • 60 grams icing sugar • 1 sheet leaf gelatine • 350 ml warm crème anglaise • 50 ml whipping cream • 300 grams strawberries

recipes.title: Mini croquembouche
recipes.overview: A magnificent choux pastry showpiece consisting of dozens of tiny profiteroles delicately bound together with caramel into a stunning cone shape that makes a striking centerpiece. This classic French dessert is filled with a luxurious combination of crème patissière and whipped cream, offering both visual drama and exquisite taste.
recipes.ingredients: 125 ml milk • 100 grams butter • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon caster sugar • 150 grams plain flour • 4 eggs • eggwash • 150 ml double cream • 250 grams crème patissière • 1 tablespoon Grand Marnier • 40 grams liquid glucose • 250 grams caster sugar • 2 teaspoon groundnut oil

subcategories.overview: Hand-held sweets such as danishes, choux and the like.

subcategories.label: Sorbet

recipes.title: Blood orange sorbet
recipes.overview: A refreshing, jewel-bright sorbet made from tart blood orange juice infused with a hint of thyme and chilli, creating a sophisticated palate cleanser or light dessert. The deep crimson color and complex flavors make this an elegant choice for finishing a meal, and its intense acidity balances rich preceding courses.
recipes.ingredients: 170 grams caster sugar • 30 ml liquid glucose • 1 dried red chilli • 1 thyme sprig • 8 blood oranges

recipes.title: Chocolate sorbet
recipes.overview: A rich, bittersweet chocolate sorbet with an elegant presentation, served on crispy meringue nests for textural contrast. This sophisticated dessert combines the cooling refreshment of sorbet with the textural pleasure of meringue, creating a dessert that balances richness with lightness in every spoonful.
recipes.ingredients: 100 ml milk • 150 grams caster sugar • liquid glucose • 30 grams dark, bitter cocoa powder • 100 grams dark chocolate couveture • 8 meringue nests

recipes.title: Thyme-scented fromage frais sorbet
recipes.overview: An exceptionally delicate and refreshing sorbet made with tangy fromage frais and fragrant thyme, lighter than traditional fruit sorbets while still providing elegant sophistication. This charming dessert showcases the subtle interplay of herbs and dairy, offering a unique and palate-cleansing finish to dinner.
recipes.ingredients: 350 ml sirop a sorbet • 2 thyme sprigs • 400 grams fromage frais • juice of 2 lemons • pinch of white pepper

subcategories.overview: Fruit and herb sorbets, dairy-free.

subcategories.label: Souffle

recipes.title: Chocolate Soufflé
recipes.overview: A rich and airy chocolate soufflé that rises dramatically in the oven, creating a show-stopping dessert with a molten chocolate center. This classic French preparation requires precision timing and technique, but rewards you with an elegant and impressive dessert that looks far more complicated than it actually is.
recipes.ingredients: 85 grams dark chocolate • 4 free-range eggs • 85 grams caster sugar • butter • 100 ml water • 40 grams caster sugar • 55 grams dark chocolate • 40 grams cocoa powder • 1 tablespoon cream • icing sugar

recipes.title: Frozen pineapple soufflé with blackberries
recipes.overview: A spectacular semifrozen soufflé made with fresh pineapple purée and Italian meringue, served in its own hollowed-out pineapple shell for dramatic presentation. This elegant dessert combines the airiness of soufflé with the convenience of a frozen dessert, making it perfect for dinner parties as it can be prepared hours in advance.
recipes.ingredients: 1 ripe pineapple • 12 cloves • 750 ml sirop a sorbet • 250 grams blackberries • 1 teaspoon groundnut oil • 1 sheet leaf gelatine • 150 grams meringue Italienne • 150 ml whipping cream • 30 ml kirsch • 40 grams lightly toasted flaked almonds

recipes.title: Orange Soufflé
recipes.overview: A vibrant and fragrant orange soufflé with Grand Marnier, baked and served in its own hollowed orange shell for a striking table presentation. This classic French dessert showcases the bright flavor of fresh orange juice combined with a light, airy soufflé base that rises beautifully in the oven.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams butter • 70 grams caster sugar • 40 grams caster sugar • 250 ml freshly squeezed orange juice • 125 ml milk • 3 egg yolks • 6 egg whites • 10 grams plain flour • 10 grams cornflour • very finely grated zest of 2 oranges • 30 ml Grand Marnier • 30 grams icing sugar • 4 large oranges
ingredientNames: very finely grated zest of 2 oranges

recipes.title: Passion fruit and kiwi soufflé
recipes.overview: An elegant and aromatic soufflé combining tropical passion fruit and kiwi in individual dishes, topped with fresh fruit for a striking presentation. The tart passion fruit and sweet kiwi create a perfectly balanced flavor that rises beautifully and impresses dinner guests with its show-stopping appearance.
recipes.ingredients: 70 grams butter • 70 grams caster sugar • 70 grams caster sugar • 5 kiwi fruit • 10 passion fruit • 6 egg whites • 4 egg yolks • 50 grams caster sugar • 25 grams plain flour • 250 ml milk • 2 kiwi fruit • 3 passion fruit

subcategories.overview: Hot soufflés baked to order.

categories.overview: Sweet finishes: cakes, mousses, ice creams, soufflés and patisserie classics.

categories.label: Petit Fours

recipes.title: Candied Fruit Peel
recipes.overview: Candied fruit peel represents a medieval technique that preserves fruit while developing profound sweetness and translucent beauty. The gradual infusion of sugar into peel tissue requires patience and multiple cooking stages; rushing this process results in tough, crystalline texture rather than the desired tender, glossy finish. Citrus peels, particularly grapefruit and bitter orange, shine when candied, their bitterness transformed into complexity through the sugaring process. These jeweled confections require nothing more than a hot drink or strong coffee to shine.
recipes.ingredients: 3 grapefruits OR 6 oranges • 600 grams caster sugar • 450 milliliters water • Additional water • 75 grams granulated sugar

recipes.title: Chocolate Truffles
recipes.overview: Chocolate truffles represent the simplest and most elegant form of chocolate confection: ganache (chocolate emulsified with cream and butter), scented with liqueur, shaped into spheres, and coated in cocoa powder. The truffle's appeal lies in its silky texture and intense chocolate flavor, enhanced by the subtle presence of Armagnac. Each truffle should be a perfect sphere with a thin shell of chocolate coating and a smooth, almost melting center when bitten. Success requires controlling temperature carefully and not overworking the ganache.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams dark chocolate • 150 milliliters double cream • 225 grams butter • 75 milliliters Armagnac or Grand Marnier liqueur • 300 grams dark chocolate • 500 grams dark cocoa powder

recipes.title: Chocolate-Dipped Langues de Chat
recipes.overview: Langues de chat, "cat's tongues", are among the most elegant petit four cookies. Their delicate, crisp texture and subtle almond-vanilla flavor make them perfect foils for strong coffee or rich desserts. The batter is intentionally thin and piped, creating cookies with slightly crispy edges and possibly softer centers depending on baking time. The chocolate dipping offers visual refinement and flavor complexity. These require a steady hand at the piping bag and careful timing in the oven; they should be just bisque-colored when removed, with minimal browning.
recipes.ingredients: 125 grams butter • 125 grams icing sugar • 25 grams ground almonds • 3 egg whites • 165 grams plain flour • 1 vanilla pod • 200 grams dark chocolate • 1 tablespoon butter or coconut oil

recipes.title: Vanilla Tuiles
recipes.overview: Tuiles, named for French roof tiles ("tuile") whose curved shape they resemble, are among the most elegant and technically demanding petit fours. The batter is deceptively simple: butter, sugar, egg whites, and flour, spread tissue-thin on a baking sheet, then shaped while hot over a rolling pin. Success requires precision: correct batter consistency, careful spreading, perfect baking time (neither under- nor over-baked), and quick handling while still pliable. The result is a cookie with profound caramel character and glass-like crispness.
recipes.ingredients: 110 grams butter • 120 grams icing sugar • 4 egg whites • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract • 145 grams self-raising flour • Non-stick baking parchment • Thin cardboard or plastic stencil • Rolling pin or cylindrical glass jar • Silicone spatula
ingredientNames: rolling pin or cylindrical glass jar

categories.overview: Bite-size sweets traditionally served with coffee at the end of a meal.

categories.label: Pies

subcategories.label: Meat Pies

recipes.title: Beef wellington
recipes.overview: A showstopping dish featuring a rare beef tenderloin encased in layers of mushroom duxelles, spinach, herb crêpes, and a golden, crispy pastry crust. Each slice reveals a beautiful cross-section of perfectly cooked beef, creamy mushroom filling, and elegant layers. This is fine dining on a plate, impressive enough for the most important dinner party.
recipes.ingredients: 260 ml tepid milk • 12 grams fresh yeast • 450 grams plain flour • 10 grams fine salt • 3 egg yolks • 90 grams butter • 45 grams caster sugar • 1 fillet of beef • salt and freshly ground pepper • 80 grams clarified butter • 60 grams butter • 500 grams button mushrooms • juice of 1 lemon • 60 grams shallot • 100 ml double cream • 12 large spinach leaves • 4 herb crêpes • eggwash • béarnaise sauce

recipes.title: Lamb pasties
recipes.overview: A Cornish-inspired pastry parcel filled with seasoned lamb, tender vegetables, and a rich, savory gravy. These hand-held pastries are perfect for portable meals, picnics, or as a sophisticated starter. The flaky shortcrust pastry encloses a deeply flavorful filling, a British classic that's remarkably easy to prepare at home.
recipes.ingredients: 750 grams Shortcrust pastry • 1 egg • 450 grams lean lamb • 25 grams beef dripping or lamb fat • 25 grams plain flour • 1 garlic clove • half a teaspoon thyme • half teaspoon sage • 100 grams onions • 100 grams carrots • 100 grams celery • 100 grams swede • 100 grams parsnip • salt and freshly ground white pepper • 25 grams plain flour • 900 ml chicken stock • 150 ml veal jus • 2 potatoes • Worcestershire sauce
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground white pepper

subcategories.overview: Savoury pies, single and double crust.

subcategories.label: Sweet Pies

recipes.title: Mini mince pies
recipes.overview: Crispy, buttery shortbread pastry encasing rich, spiced mincemeat studded with dried fruit, nuts, and brandy. A beloved British Christmas tradition, these miniature gems are equally good served warm with sherry or cold with coffee. The mincemeat improves with time, making these ideal for advance preparation.
recipes.ingredients: 360 grams shortbread pastry • eggwash • 60 grams caster sugar • 225 grams sultanas • 450 grams raisins • 450 grams currant • 450 grams beef fat or suet • 1 large cooking apple • 100 grams glacé fruits • 350 grams soft brown sugar • 1 teaspoon freshly grated nutmeg • 1 teaspoon freshly grated mace • 1 teaspoon ground cloves • 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon • 50 ml Cognac • grated zest and juice of 1 lemon

recipes.title: Pecan pie
recipes.overview: An iconic American dessert featuring a buttery shortbread crust filled with smooth, sweet filling studded with toasted pecans. The custard-like center has a distinctly rich, almost caramel-like quality from brown sugar and maple syrup. Served warm with vanilla ice cream, it's pure comfort on a plate.
recipes.ingredients: 240 grams shortbread pastry • 230 grams butter • 80 grams maple syrup • 150 grams caster sugar • 3 eggs • 350 grams shelled pecan nuts • 50 grams plain flour

subcategories.overview: Fruit-filled pies and traditional sweet bakes.

categories.overview: Sweet and savoury pies, from rich meat fillings to buttery fruit bakes.

categories.label: Rice

recipes.title: Biryani
recipes.overview: Biryani represents the height of Indian culinary technique: multiple components prepared separately with precision, then assembled in layers where flavors permeate through steam cooking. This isn't a one-step rice dish; rather, it's an architectural construction where yogurt-marinated lamb develops tenderization and flavor, then cooks slowly with warm spices and tomato, while basmati rice is independently flavored with saffron infusion and whole spices. Upon assembly, the two elements marry through steam, creating a unified dish where lamb and rice are inseparable in flavor. Traditionally cooked during festivals and royal celebrations, biryani requires patience and multiple steps but rewards with sophistication.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams lamb • 4 tablespoons sunflower oil • 1 medium onion • 1 tablespoon ground coriander • 1 teaspoon ground cumin • 1 teaspoon mild chilli powder • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric • 225 grams tinned tomatoes • Fine sea salt to taste • Freshly ground black pepper to taste • 4 garlic cloves • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger • 50 milliliters natural yogurt • 6 tablespoons fresh coriander leaves • 4 tablespoons sunflower oil • 2 teaspoons cumin seeds • 1 large onion • 6 whole cloves • 10 black peppercorns • 4 cardamom pods • 1 cinnamon stick • 225 grams basmati rice • 1 teaspoon saffron threads • 3 tablespoons warm milk • Fine sea salt to taste • Additional 2 tablespoons oil • Additional fresh coriander leaves • Fried onions

recipes.title: Coconut Rice
recipes.overview: Coconut rice represents the intersection of technique and flavor in Indian cooking. The tempering of mustard and cumin seeds in hot oil releases their volatile aromatics, which then permeate the rice as it cooks. Curry leaves contribute herbaceous depth without overwhelming the dish. Coconut cream adds richness and subtle sweetness, creating a rice that's inherently interesting yet supportive of spiced dishes. The final resting period is crucial, steam completes the cooking while the flavors meld. This rice should taste aromatic with individual grains remaining separate.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams basmati rice • 2 tablespoons sunflower oil • 2 teaspoons black mustard seeds • 2 teaspoons cumin seeds • 2 dried red chillies • 10 fresh curry leaves • 500 milliliters water • 4 tablespoons coconut cream

recipes.title: Fried Rice
recipes.overview: Fried rice is fundamentally about texture contrast: individual grains coated entirely with hot oil, remaining crispy and separate, never clumped or greasy. Success requires three critical elements: Cold rice (overnight-refrigerated best), sufficiently hot oil (nearly smoking), and a light hand with seasonings. The beaten egg is never pre-cooked; instead, it's added raw to the hot rice and oil where residual heat cooks it silkily, coating the grains. Bean sprouts provide fresh textural contrast. This is not comfort food; it's refined technique applied to simple ingredients.
recipes.ingredients: 400 milliliters steamed rice • 50 grams Parma ham • 2 large eggs • 110 grams fresh bean sprouts • 2 tablespoons spring onions • 2 tablespoons groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame oil • 2 tablespoons light soy sauce • Pinch of ground white pepper • Fine sea salt to taste • Wok or large frying pan • Wooden spatula or wok turner

recipes.title: Pilau Rice
recipes.overview: Pilau rice exemplifies spiced Indian cooking at its most refined. Rather than cooking spices into the rice (as in some Indian rices), pilau relies on whole-spice tempering in ghee or butter, which releases volatile aromatics that then coat each grain. The basmati rice absorbs flavored stock rather than plain water, creating depth. The final resting period allows flavors to marry while residual heat completes cooking. This rice is meant to be eaten as an accompaniment to curries, the aromatic warmth complementing rather than competing with the main dish.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams basmati rice • 1 large onion • 1 large knob butter • 4 cardamom pods • 8 whole cloves • 1 cinnamon stick • 1 pinch saffron threads • 2 bay leaves • 600 milliliters chicken stock • Fine sea salt to taste • Water

recipes.title: Steamed Rice
recipes.overview: Chinese steamed rice exemplifies the power of patience and precise technique. The key principle is using high heat initially to evaporate surface water visibly (watching for characteristic "crater" pattern), then radically reducing heat to allow gentle steaming. The lid must never be opened during steaming; this breaks the seal and ruins the delicate cooking process. The result is fluffy rice with grains that remain separate, never mushy or sticky. Long-grain rice (jasmine or basmati) works best; short-grain varieties retain excess moisture and become sticky regardless of technique.
recipes.ingredients: 400 milliliters long-grain rice • 900 milliliters water • Heavy-bottomed pot with tight-fitting lid • Large bowl

categories.overview: Pilafs, biryanis, risottos and other rice-led dishes.

categories.label: Salads

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
recipes.overview: A classic Roman salad featuring crisp cos lettuce coated in a rich, anchovy-based dressing with crispy croutons, tender chicken, and pancetta. The soft-boiled egg adds creaminess to the velvety emulsified dressing.
recipes.ingredients: 2 medium chicken fillets • 300 g pancetta • 2 cos lettuces • 4 thick slices wholemeal bread • 25 g Parmesan • 50 g Parmesan • 15 g anchovy fillets • 2 tsp capers • 2 tsp Worcestershire sauce • ½ tsp Dijon mustard • Dash of Tabasco sauce • Juice of ½ lemon • ½ garlic clove • 2 tbsp Parmesan • 1 egg • 150–300 ml extra virgin olive oil • Freshly ground black pepper • 4 tbsp olive oil

recipes.title: Hot Cajun Potato Salad
recipes.overview: A fiery potato salad blending Cajun spices with a mayo-based dressing, featuring hard-boiled eggs, spring onions, and diced green chilli. The warming garam masala, cumin, and cayenne create authentic Cajun heat balanced with fresh herbs.
recipes.ingredients: 8 waxy potatoes • 1 green chilli • 4 spring onions • 3 eggs • 250 ml mayonnaise • 1 tbsp Dijon mustard • Tabasco sauce • ¼ tsp garam masala • ¼ tsp ground cumin • ¼ tsp dried coriander • ¼ tsp cayenne pepper • 2 tsp thyme • Salt and ground black pepper • Salad leaves

recipes.title: Niçoise Salad
recipes.overview: A classic Provençal salad featuring seared tuna, hard-boiled eggs, and crispy serrano anchovies over fresh greens with potatoes and green beans. The herb-infused tarragon dressing ties all the vibrant components together.
recipes.ingredients: 100 g fine beans • 8 new potatoes • 1 head soft lettuce • 2 tomatoes • 400 g tuna fillet steaks • 4 anchovy fillets • 2 hard-boiled eggs • 12 very thin slices French bread • 8 black olives • 1 tsp capers • 1 tsp sesame seeds • 1 tbsp butter • 1 garlic clove • 8 tbsp olive oil • 2 tbsp tarragon vinegar • ½ tsp Dijon mustard • Salt and freshly ground black pepper • ½ garlic clove • ½ tsp fresh chives • ½ tsp tarragon • Salt and pepper • Oil for frying
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Thai Cucumber Salad
recipes.overview: A refreshing, vibrant Thai salad featuring ribboned cucumbers in a tangy ginger-lime dressing with fresh coriander and chilli heat. Its bright, sour notes cut through rich curries perfectly while remaining light and crisp.
recipes.ingredients: 2 cm piece fresh ginger • 1 tbsp soy sauce • 1 tsp sesame oil • 1 cucumber • 1 fresh red chilli • 1 lime • 1 small handful fresh coriander • Sesame seeds

categories.overview: Composed and tossed salads, from simple sides through to plated mains.

categories.label: Salsas

recipes.title: Herb Salsa
recipes.overview: Herb salsa is uniquely French despite the Spanish name: it's essentially a warm salsa based on creamy, newly cooked potato and fine herbs. Unlike the fresh salsas of Mexico and Mediterranean regions, this version relies on cooked potato for texture and structure, with sherry vinegar providing acid, and a combination of mustard and lemon juice offering complexity. The blend of fines herbes (parsley, chives, tarragon, chervil) creates aromatic brightness without the intensity of larger basil-based sauces. This is best served warm or at room temperature, never chilled; cold dulls the delicate herb character.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams potato • Water • 60 grams fresh fines herbes • 120 milliliters extra virgin olive oil • 40 milliliters sherry vinegar • Juice of 1 lemon • 30 grams spring onions • 1 tablespoon coarse-grain Meaux mustard • Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste

recipes.title: Pesto
recipes.overview: Pesto represents the height of simplicity: five ingredients (basil, garlic, pine nuts, olive oil, Parmesan) combined to create a sauce of profound flavor and silky texture. The key to successful pesto lies in ingredient quality and processing technique. Fresh, fragrant basil is non-negotiable; aged or heat-stressed basil creates harsh, off-flavored results. Pine nuts must be fresh (rancid pine nuts ruin pesto instantly). Garlic should be mild and rounded by the pesto's other elements. Parmesan must be freshly grated; pre-grated cheese creates a grainy, inferior result. Traditional pesto is made by mortar and pestle, which bruises rather than cuts the basil, preserving its vibrant green color and fresh character. Modern food processors work adequately but can create a less vibrant result if over-processed.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams fresh basil leaves • 1 clove garlic • 30 grams pine nuts • 120 milliliters extra virgin olive oil • 20 grams Parmesan cheese • 1 pinch fine sea salt

recipes.title: Pineapple Salsa with Coriander
recipes.overview: Pineapple salsa bridges sweet tropical fruit with heat and umami. The key technique here is caramelizing the pineapple in its own sugar and brown sugar, which develops deeper flavor and slight bitterness to offset the fruit's natural sweetness. Fresh red chilli provides heat, sambal oelek adds fermented chilli depth and umami, and lime juice brightens the overall composition. Fresh coriander added at the very end preserves its herbaceous aroma, the hallmark of this dish. Crucially, this salsa is served warm; warming brings out pineapple's natural sweetness and spices' aromatic qualities. Chilled pineapple salsa becomes dull and the fruit hard.
recipes.ingredients: 300 grams fresh pineapple • 1 tablespoon soft brown sugar • 1/2 fresh red chilli • 1 tablespoon sambal oelek • 1 teaspoon fresh lime juice • 2 tablespoons fresh coriander leaves • 1 pinch fine sea salt

recipes.title: Red pepper salsa
recipes.overview: A vibrant, deeply flavoured roasted red pepper salsa with shallots, fresh thyme, basil, lemon, and olive oil. Roasting the peppers until blackened intensifies their sweetness and adds a subtle smokiness. Versatile enough to serve with pasta, spread in a bouchée canapé, or as an accompaniment to grilled meats and fish.
recipes.ingredients: 4 red peppers • 2 shallots • 2 sprigs thyme • 12 basil leaves • 125 ml olive oil • 2 lemons • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Tomato and Basil Salsa
recipes.overview: Tomato and basil salsa is a rustic Italian preparation that celebrates the quality of its primary ingredient: ripe, flavorful tomatoes. The supporting cast, capers, black olives, and lemon juice, merely emphasizes tomato's natural acidity and sweetness without overwhelming. Generous olive oil creates body and richness, while fresh basil added at the final moment introduces herbaceous brightness. The salsa benefits from an hour of resting before service, during which flavors meld and deepen. However, the fresh basil must be added only at the final 30 minutes before serving to preserve its aroma and color.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams very ripe tomatoes • 3 tablespoons capers • 50 grams black olives • 150 milliliters extra virgin olive oil • Juice of 1 lemon • 20 grams fresh basil leaves • Fine sea salt to taste • Freshly ground white pepper to taste

categories.overview: Fresh, raw and cooked salsas: chunky, herby, heat-graded.

categories.label: Sauces

subcategories.label: Fruit Sauce

recipes.title: Apple sauce
recipes.overview: A smooth, silky apple compote with warm spice notes from cinnamon. This classic sauce brings bright acidity and natural sweetness to game, pork, and duck, while the tender texture makes it perfect for serving alongside both hot and cold meats.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams dessert apples • 20 grams caster sugar • juice of half a lemon • half a stick cinnamon • 30 grams butter • pinch of salt

recipes.title: Cumberland sauce
recipes.overview: A jewel-coloured relish with punchy acidity balanced by fruity herbs and spice. This cold sauce adds sophistication to charcuterie boards and game terrines, with sharp pepper notes and port-wine richness that develops over time as flavours meld.
recipes.ingredients: 1 medium shallot • 4 tablespoons red wine vinegar • 12 white peppercorns • 100 ml Veal stock • 50 ml ruby port • 2 tablespoons redcurrant jelly • 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce • juice of one orange • zest of one lemon • salt

recipes.title: Fruity curry sauce
recipes.overview: A luxurious, mildly spiced sauce with tropical fruit sweetness balanced by warm curry spices. The ground almonds create a velvety texture that elegantly coats chicken and veal, while the fruit adds sophisticated sweetness without overwhelming heat.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams butter • 60 grams onions • 300 grams pineapple • 1 medium banana • 1 desert apple • 2 tablespoons ground almonds • 40 grams curry powder • 300 ml Veal stock • 200 ml coconut milk

recipes.title: Mango chutney
recipes.overview: A delicate, fruity preserve balanced with warm spice notes and bright acidity. This mango chutney captures the sweetness of ripe fruit while nigella seeds and warm spices provide intricate flavour layers perfect alongside curries, game, and cheese selections.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon sunflower oil • 1 teaspoon ginger • 1 garlic cloves • 5 cloves • 1 star anise • 2 cinnamon sticks • 5 black peppercorns • 2 tablespoons nigella seeds • ½ teaspoon mild chilli powder • 800 grams ripe but firm mango flesh • 400 ml white wine vinegar • 270 grams caster sugar • sea salt

recipes.title: Onion and green apple chutney
recipes.overview: A caramelized onion preserve with tart apple and bright tomato notes. This complex chutney balances deep sweetness with vinegary sharpness and spiced warmth, making it an ideal accompaniment to mature cheeses, sausages, and roasted meats.
recipes.ingredients: 50 ml groundnut oil • 400 grams onions • 120 grams soft brown sugar • 150 ml white wine vinegar • 150 grams apple • 150 grams very ripe tomatoes • 10 white peppercorns • half a teaspoon fine sea salt • 1 clove garlic • half a teaspoon chilli powder • pinch ground cinnamon

recipes.title: Peach chutney
recipes.overview: A jewelled preserve capturing summer peaches with warming spice and bright citrus. This complex chutney balances delicate peach sweetness with cinnamon and nutmeg warmth, punctuated by lime zest, creating an elegant accompaniment to game, terrines, and cold meats.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams cooking apples • half a teaspoon salt • 125 grams very ripe tomatoes • 60 grams onion • 1 clove garlic • 10 grams ginger • zest of 1 lime • juice of 1 lime • half a teaspoon ground cinnamon • half a teaspoon ground nutmeg • half a teaspoon white pepper • 150 grams caster sugar • 150 ml white wine vinegar • 70 grams flaked almonds • 500 grams ripe, but firm peaches

recipes.title: Peach sauce
recipes.overview: A sophisticated fruit sauce balancing delicate peach sweetness with wine reduction and veal stock depth. The aromatic notes from fennel and clove complement roasted game birds, while the finishing butter creates silky richness.
recipes.ingredients: 2 very ripe peaches • 30 grams butter • 30 grams caster sugar • 20 ml cognac • 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar • 100 ml red wine • 300 ml veal stock • 1 clove • 2 teaspoons fennel seeds • 40 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Pear chutney
recipes.overview: A complex preserve with sweet pear balanced by warm spice and bright citrus. This sophisticated chutney deepens with time as flavours meld, featuring saffron's delicate floral notes and orange zest brightness alongside traditional warming spices.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams cooking apples • half a teaspoon salt • 125 grams very ripe tomatoes • 60 grams onion • 15 grams ginger • 60 grams sultanas • 1 tablespoon orange zest • juice of 1 orange • 375 grams ripe, but firm pears • 150 grams caster sugar • 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon • 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg • 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper • pinch saffron threads • 150 ml white wine vinegar

recipes.title: Port sauce
recipes.overview: A delicate, wine-based sauce with fruity port and umami-rich mushrooms balanced by tart blackcurrants or cranberries. This elegant sauce complements game birds and venison with sophisticated depth and subtle sweetness.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams butter • 60 grams shallots • 100 grams button mushrooms • 50 grams blackcurrants • 250 ml ruby port • dried zest of 1/4 of an orange • 300 ml Veal stock • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Sweet and sour sauce
recipes.overview: A vibrant, balanced sauce with caramelized peppers, tangy vinegar reduction, and subtle deep sweetness. This versatile dipping sauce works beautifully with fried seafood, raw fish, and cured meats with bright colour and fresh flavour.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams green peppers • 200 grams red peppers • 2 tablespoons groundnut oil • 200 grams onions • 100 grams demerara sugar • 100 ml red wine vinegar • 100 ml stock

subcategories.overview: Sweet and tart fruit sauces for finishing plates.

subcategories.label: Sauce Fish

recipes.title: Américaine sauce
recipes.overview: A luxurious, amber-hued sauce featuring tender lobster meat and shells creating a rich, umami-forward base. With tomato, aromatic aromatics, and luxurious cream finishing, this classic French sauce exemplifies refined seafood cookery at its finest.
recipes.ingredients: 1 live lobster • 100 ml groundnut oil • 4 tablespoons carrots • 2 tablespoons shallots • 2 cloves garlic • 50 ml Cognac • 300 ml dry white wine • 300 ml Fish stock • 200 grams tomatoes • 1 Bouquet garni • 75 ml double cream • 60 grams butter • 10 grams plain flour • 1 pinch cayenne pepper • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Bercy sauce
recipes.overview: A delicate, pale sauce combining shallot-kissed white wine reduction with velouté base. Fresh lemon juice and parsley provide bright acidity and herbal notes, while butter enrichment creates silky body perfect for mild white fish.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams butter • 60 grams shallots • 200 ml dry white wine • 150 ml Fish stock • 400 ml Velouté sauce • juice of half a lemon • 2 tablespoons parsley • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Champagne sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant, cream-enriched sauce with effervescent wine and delicate mushroom undertones. The subtle bubbles and pale golden colour make this a showstopper accompaniment for refined poached fish presentation.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 60 grams shallots • 60 grams button mushroom • 400 ml champagne • 300 ml Fish stock • 350 ml double cream • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Claret sauce
recipes.overview: A deeply coloured, wine-rich sauce combining red wine, dual stocks, and mushroom earthiness. This sophisticated accompaniment to pink-fleshed fish features velvety texture from butter enrichment and subtle depth from long reduction.
recipes.ingredients: 300 ml full bodied red wine • 200 ml Veal stock • 300 ml Fish stock • 50 grams shallots • 60 grams button mushrooms • 1 Bouquet garni • 50 ml double cream • 200 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Court bouillon
recipes.overview: A delicate, aromatic poaching liquid balancing vegetable sweetness with wine acidity and subtle herb notes. This gentle preparation method preserves fish colour and moisture while infusing delicate, clean flavours throughout the flesh.
recipes.ingredients: 2 leeks • 2 carrots • 2 onions • 1 bouquet garni • 10 black peppercorns • 2 lemons • 400 ml dry white wine • 100 ml white wine vinegar • 1 litre water

recipes.title: Curried mussel sauce
recipes.overview: A creamy, warmly spiced sauce featuring mussel cooking juices and curry powder. This elegant accompaniment works beautifully with shellfish and white fish, the cream balancing the curry spice while mussel brine adds briny depth.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 60 grams onions, finely chopped • 2 teaspoons curry powder • 15 grams plain flour • 500 ml cooking liquor from mussels and other shellfish • 1 Bouquet garni • 150 ml double cream • salt and pepper
ingredientNames: cooking liquor from mussels and other shellfish

recipes.title: Lemon sauce
recipes.overview: A bright, Asian-inspired sauce balancing fresh lemon with umami-rich soy and aromatic ginger. This fragrant, glossy accompaniment brings clean acidity and subtle heat to steamed white fish and stir-fried chicken.
recipes.ingredients: 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1½ tablespoons lemon juice • 2 teaspoons sugar • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • ½ teaspoon garlic • 1 dried red chilli • 1 teaspoon cornflour

recipes.title: Nantua sauce
recipes.overview: A sumptuous, pale pink sauce built on a foundation of crayfish shells and aromatics. Cream and subtle tarragon notes create elegance, while the velvety puree captures delicate shellfish essence perfect for refined seafood presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 80 grams butter • 60 grams shallots • 60 grams button mushrooms • 16 crayfish or langoustine heads • 2 tablespoons cognac • 150 ml dry white wine • 300 ml Fish stock • 1 Bouquet garni • 2 sprigs tarragon • 80 grams tomatoes • 1 pinch cayenne pepper • 300 ml double cream • 1 pinch tarragon • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Normandy sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant, silky white sauce enriched with eggs and cream, featuring tender mushrooms and subtle mussel brine. This classic French preparation combines velouté base with delicate seafood essence, creating refined sophistication.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams butter • 30 grams plain flour • 100 grams button mushrooms • 1 sprig thyme • 500 ml Fish stock • 50 ml mussel juice • 200 ml double cream • 3 egg yolks • juice of 1/2 a lemon • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Tamarind sauce
recipes.overview: A Thai-inspired sauce balancing tart tamarind with umami-rich fish sauce and aromatic ginger. This complex, gloss-coated accompaniment brings bright acidity and subtle heat to steamed fish and prawns.
recipes.ingredients: 2 tablespoons groundnut oil • 4 spring onions • 3 cloves garlic • 2 tablespoons ginger • 2 tablespoons light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon palm sugar • 2 tablespoons tamarind paste • 1 tablespoon fish sauce • 10 black peppercorns

recipes.title: Thermidor sauce
recipes.overview: A sophisticated, tangy cream sauce with mustard warmth and tarragon herbals. This classic accompaniment to lobster thermidor combines cheese sauce with white wine reduction and a distinctive mustard flavour profile.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams shallots • 200 ml Fish stock • 200 ml dry white wine • 300 ml Béchamel Sauce • 100 ml double cream • 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard • 1 teaspoon English mustard powder • 50 grams butter • 1 pinch cayenne pepper • 1 tablespoon tarragon • salt

recipes.title: Tomato and basil fish fumet
recipes.overview: A crystal-clear, jewel-coloured consommé featuring ripe tomato and fragrant basil. This elegant, clarified fish broth brings clean, bright flavours and sophisticated simplicity to delicate white fish.
recipes.ingredients: 600 ml Fish stock • 500 grams very ripe tomatoes • 1 red pepper • 50 grams basil leaves • 4 egg whites • 8 peppercorns • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Velouté sauce
recipes.overview: A foundational French white sauce using stock and roux, creating silky body and subtle stock flavour. This versatile mother sauce serves as a base for countless fish and chicken sauces, providing elegant simplicity and purity of flavour.
recipes.ingredients: 30g butter • 30g plain flour • 1 litre cold stock • salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Watercress sauce
recipes.overview: A delicate, herbaceous sauce featuring peppery watercress against light vegetable stock. The bright green colour and fresh flavour profile make this sophisticated accompaniment perfect for grilled shellfish and white fish.
recipes.ingredients: 400 grams watercress • 100 grams butter • 500 ml Vegetable stock • 15 grams soft green peppercorns • salt and pepper

subcategories.overview: Sauces specifically for fish, including beurre blancs, hollandaise variations and more.

subcategories.label: Sauce Meat

recipes.title: Bigarade sauce
recipes.overview: A glossy, rich sauce balancing fruity wine reduction with bright citrus zest and depth from concentrated duck stock. The caramelized sugar provides luxurious body while citrus zests add visual elegance and fresh acidity to perfectly complement roasted duck.
recipes.ingredients: 1 lemon • 3 oranges • 45 grams caster sugar • 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar • 300 grams duck wings • 2 tablespoons olive oil • 700 ml Veal stock • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Bordelaise sauce
recipes.overview: A refined wine sauce featuring luxurious beef marrow and gentle pepper spice. The deep red wine reduction combines beautifully with concentrated veal stock, while poached marrow pieces provide richness and distinctive flavour signature to this classic French preparation.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams shallots • 8 white peppercorns • 200 ml red wine • 300 ml Veal stock • 1 Bouquet garni • 200 grams beef marrow • 30 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Buccaneer's sauce
recipes.overview: A sophisticated sweet-savoury sauce combining tart raspberry vinegar with tropical banana sweetness. The warm ginger spice and velvety veal stock base create an unusual, adventurous accompaniment perfect for roasted game and poultry.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 50 grams butter • 60 grams shallots • 40 grams ginger • 100 grams banana • 6 tablespoons raspberry vinegar • 400 ml Veal stock • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Charcutière sauce
recipes.overview: A rustic, mustard-forward sauce with sharp cornichon notes and white wine acidity. This traditional French accompaniment brings homemade charm and tongue-tingling heat to pork chops and other pork preparations.
recipes.ingredients: 30 grams butter • 60 grams onions • 100 ml dry white wine • 300 ml Veal stock • 1 tablespoon strong Dijon mustard • 40 grams beurre manié • 30 grams cornichons • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Chasseur sauce
recipes.overview: A delicate, herbaceous sauce featuring tender mushrooms and fresh tarragon notes. The white wine reduction and parsley garnish create bright, clean flavours perfect for poultry and veal, ready in under 30 minutes.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 50 grams butter • 200 grams button mushrooms • 40 grams shallots • 400 ml dry white wine • 400 ml Veal stock • 1 tablespoon flat leaf parsley • 1 teaspoon tarragon • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Chicken jus with savory
recipes.overview: A simple, flavourful jus capturing the essence of roasted chicken with herb infusion. Fresh savory provides subtle peppery notes while roasted vegetables add depth, creating an elegant, light sauce perfect for roasted poultry.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams carrots • 150 grams onions • 1 medium potato • 1 sprig thyme • 2 cloves garlic • 150 ml dry white wine • 50 grams savory sprigs • 150 ml Chicken Stock • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Chicken sauce with Curaçao
recipes.overview: A delicate, sophisticated sauce featuring orange liqueur richness balanced by light brothiness. The aromatic star anise complements tender poultry beautifully, creating an elegant accompaniment with subtle depth and aromatic complexity.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams Chicken wings • 22 tablespoons groundnut oil • 260 grams shallots • 280 grams carrots • 260 grams celery • 24 star anise • 22 tablespoons Curaçao • 2200 ml Chicken Stock • 2200 ml Veal stock • 230 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Lamb jus with rosemary
recipes.overview: A light, herb-infused jus capturing roasted lamb's natural juices enhanced by rosemary and wine reduction. The caramelized garlic adds subtle sweetness while maintaining the sauce's elegant simplicity.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams carrots • 250 grams onion • 3 cloves garlic • 6 black peppercorns • 2 bay leaves • 2 rosemary sprigs • 200 ml red wine • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Périgueux sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant, luxurious sauce featuring prized truffles and their precious juice. This refined reduction builds on concentrated veal stock, creating depth and umami-rich complexity with the indulgent flavour of black truffles.
recipes.ingredients: 400 ml Veal stock • 50 ml truffle juice • 20 grams truffles • 40 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Rocket sauce with horseradish
recipes.overview: A vibrant, herb-forward cold sauce combining peppery rocket with sharp horseradish notes. The yoghurt base provides creaminess while lemon brightens the palate, creating an elegant, light accompaniment to cold meats and fish.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams rocket leaves • 150 grams Greek yoghurt • 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard • 3 teaspoons fresh horseradish • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil • 2 tablespoons milk • juice of 1 lemon • 1 clove garlic • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Satay sauce
recipes.overview: A rich, nutty sauce combining crunchy peanut butter with exotic spice and tamarind acidity. The coconut milk creates silky body while chilli provides subtle heat, making this Southeast Asian classic perfect for grilled savoury brochettes.
recipes.ingredients: 8 tablespoons crunchy peanut butter • 1 clove garlic • 1 tablespoon palm sugar • 2 tablespoons dark soy sauce • 1 tablespoon lemon juice • 2 tablespoons tamarind liquid • a generous pinch of chilli powder • a little coconut milk to bind the sauce
ingredientNames: little coconut milk to bind the sauce

subcategories.overview: Reductions, jus and pan sauces for red and white meat.

subcategories.label: Sauce Savory

recipes.title: Aïoli
recipes.overview: A luxurious, golden emulsion featuring aromatic saffron and abundant crushed garlic. This traditional Mediterranean sauce combines egg yolks, olive oil, and saffron infusion for richness and subtly bitter complexity perfect with salt cod and vegetables.
recipes.ingredients: 2 egg yolks • 21 egg yolk • 24 cloves garlic • 21 pinch salt • 21 pinch cayenne pepper • 21 pinch saffron threads • 2200 ml olive oil • 21 teaspoon lemon juice • 2 half teaspoon cold water

recipes.title: Aurora Sauce
recipes.overview: A delicate pale pink sauce combining creamy béchamel with bright tomato coulis and double cream enrichment. This refined sauce brings subtle tomato subtle flavour to gentle poached eggs, pasta, and white meats.
recipes.ingredients: 300 ml Béchamel Sauce • 100 ml double cream • 120 ml Tomato Coulis • 20 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Béarnaise sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant, silky emulsion balancing sharp tarragon with creamy, buttery richness. This classic French sauce showcases clarified butter and egg yolks with herbaceous depth, providing the perfect elegant accompaniment to premium beef cuts.
recipes.ingredients: 2 tablespoons white wine vinegar • 3 tablespoons tarragon • 30 grams shallots • 10 peppercorns • 4 egg yolks • 250 grams Clarified butter • 2 tablespoons parsley • juice of half a lemon • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Béchamel sauce
recipes.overview: A foundational, creamy white mother sauce balancing rich milk with gentle nutmeg warmth. This versatile base sauce provides silky body for vegetables, white meats, and pasta while serving as starting point for countless derived sauces like aurora and mornay.
recipes.ingredients: 30 grams butter • 30 grams plain flour • 500 ml milk • 1 pinch salt and pepper • ½ teaspoon nutmeg

recipes.title: Beurre blanc with cream
recipes.overview: A silky, butter-enriched reduction combining wine, vinegar, and shallot reduction with cream. This classic French sauce brings elegant richness to poached and steamed fish with bright acidity balanced by luxurious butter body.
recipes.ingredients: 75 ml dry white wine • 75 ml white wine vinegar • 60 grams shallots • 50 ml double cream • 200 grams butter • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Bread sauce
recipes.overview: A traditional, creamy sauce featuring bread softened in milk infused with clove-studded onion. This homely accompaniment to roasted poultry brings subtle spice and gentle texture from breadcrumbs, topped with silky cream finish.
recipes.ingredients: 20 grams butter • 60 grams onion • 400 ml milk • 1 onion • 2 cloves • 80 grams white bread • 50 ml double cream • 1 pinch salt and pepper

recipes.title: Cheese sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant, velvety sauce showcasing melted Gruyère cheese blended with wine reduction and stock. This refined accompaniment brings richness and umami to pasta and cauliflower while maintaining silky, smooth texture.
recipes.ingredients: 300 ml dry white wine • 300 ml chicken stock • 120 grams gruyere cheese • 10 grams cornflour • 1 knob butter • truffle oil • cheese rind

recipes.title: Gribiche Sauce
recipes.overview: A vibrant, classically French cold sauce combining hard-boiled egg yolks with tangy vinegar and flavorful aromatics. The pickled vegetables and fresh herbs provide complexity and bright acidity, creating an elegant companion to cold fish and shellfish.
recipes.ingredients: 4 hard boiled eggs • 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard • 250 ml groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar • 30 grams capers • 30 grams cornichons • 2 tablespoons Fines Herbes • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Hollandaise sauce
recipes.overview: A silky classic French mother sauce showcasing the art of emulsification. Egg yolks whisked with reduced vinegar create a luxuriously smooth sauce enriched with clarified butter, forming the foundation for countless derivative sauces and elegant presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar • 4 tablespoons cold water • 1 teaspoon white peppercorns • 4 egg yolks • 250 grams Clarified butter • salt • juice of half a lemon

recipes.title: Lemon butter sauce
recipes.overview: A deceptively simple classical sauce combining butter, bright lemon, and delicate stock into a silky emulsion. Requiring only careful whisking technique, this elegant sauce provides light richness without heaviness, making it the perfect partner for poached or grilled fish.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams unsalted butter • 50 ml stock • juice of 1 lemon • salt and freshly ground white pepper
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground white pepper

recipes.title: Mayonnaise
recipes.overview: The quintessential cold emulsion sauce combining egg yolks, mustard, and oil into a thick, creamy condiment. This kitchen fundamental requires only technique and patience, rewarding careful whisking with luxurious richness that elevates simple ingredients into sophisticated accompaniment for proteins and vegetables.
recipes.ingredients: 2 egg yolks • 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard • 250 ml groundnut oil • 2 tablespoons white wine vinegar • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Mornay sauce
