recipes.overview: A refined derivative of béchamel sauce enriched with egg yolks, cream, and sharp Gruyère cheese. The result is a luxuriously velvety sauce with subtle nutmeg warmth and umami richness, perfect for gratins, poached eggs, and delicate white fish preparations.
recipes.ingredients: 500 ml Béchamel Sauce • 3 egg yolks • 50 ml double cream • 100 grams Gruyere cheese • 1 pinch nutmeg • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Mousseline sauce
recipes.overview: An ethereal refinement of classic hollandaise, where whipped cream is folded into the emulsified butter sauce. The result is an airy, luxuriously light accompaniment with subtle peppery notes and delicate texture, elevating elegant fish preparations to restaurant-quality presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar • 4 tablespoons cold water • 1 teaspoon white peppercorns • 4 egg yolks • 250 grams Clarified butter • 75 ml whipping cream • salt • juice of half a lemon

recipes.title: Parsley sauce
recipes.overview: A classic white roux-based sauce brightened with fresh parsley and fragrant nutmeg. Simple yet refined, this versatile accompaniment works equally well with vegetables or as an enriched accompaniment to delicate white fish preparations.
recipes.ingredients: 20 grams butter • 20 grams plain flour • 150 ml milk • 350 ml ham or chicken stock • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley • 1 pinch nutmeg • 1 pinch salt and pepper

recipes.title: Sorrel sauce
recipes.overview: A refined, delicate sauce showcasing bright sorrel's natural acidity balanced with rich cream. The subtle herbal notes and tender green color make this an elegant companion to fish cakes and lamb, while optional mint intensifies complexity.
recipes.ingredients: 30 grams butter • 40 grams shallots • 60 grams sorrel • 100 ml white wine • 200 ml vegetable stock • 200 ml double cream • 1 pinch salt and pepper • mint leaves

recipes.title: Soubise sauce
recipes.overview: An elegant onion-infused derivative of béchamel, where sweetly caramelized onions are pureed into the sauce for silky texture and subtle sweetness. Perfect accompaniment to white meats and veal, this refined sauce showcases the balance between cream, spice, and vegetable.
recipes.ingredients: 300 ml Béchamel Sauce • 40 grams butter • 200 grams onion • 150 ml double cream • half a teaspoon nutmeg • 1 pinch salt and pepper

recipes.title: Tartare Sauce
recipes.overview: A vibrant, sophisticated cold sauce combining hard-boiled egg yolks with fragrant oil, tangy vinegar, and a combination of capers, onion, and fresh chives. This classic French accompaniment to fried fish showcases elegant simplicity with layered, briny flavors.
recipes.ingredients: 3 egg yolks • 200 ml groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon lemon juice • salt and pepper • 20 grams onion • 3 tablespoons Mayonnaise • 1 tablespoon chives

recipes.title: Tzatziki sauce
recipes.overview: A bright, refreshing dip from Greek cuisine pairing cool yogurt with crisp cucumber, aromatic garlic, and delicate chives. Simple and pure, yet sophisticated and elegant, this cooling sauce is perfect for warm weather gatherings and Mediterranean preparations.
recipes.ingredients: 100 ml Greek yoghurt • 1 clove garlic • 8 cm cucumber • 2 stalks chives • 1 tablespoon lemon juice

recipes.title: Vanilla mayonnaise
recipes.overview: An elegant refinement of classic mayonnaise where fragrant vanilla seeds infuse the emulsion, while egg white adds unprecedented lightness. The subtle vanilla warmth and delicate texture make this sophisticated accompaniment to delicate fish preparations, particularly liquorice-poached salmon.
recipes.ingredients: 1 large egg yolk • 1 whole large egg • 15 grams Dijon mustard • seeds from 2 vanilla pods • 350 grams groundnut oil • 20 grams white wine vinegar • 5 grams salt

recipes.title: Vermouth sauce
recipes.overview: A sophisticated, silky sauce showcasing dry vermouth's herbal complexity balanced with sweet shellfish stock and enriching cream. Butter mounted at the end creates luxurious texture, while optional foam transformation elevates this already-elegant sauce to restaurant-quality presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 40 grams shallots • 1 sprig thyme • 1/2 bay leaf • 100 ml vermouth • 300 ml Fish stock • 2 tablespoons double cream • 60 grams butter • 1 pinch paprika • salt and pepper

subcategories.overview: A general-purpose savoury sauce library.

subcategories.label: Sauce Spicy

recipes.title: Chipotle sauce
recipes.overview: A deeply complex, rich sauce combining charred tomatoes with smoldering chipotle peppers, garlic, and red wine. The result is a sophisticated, multi-layered sauce with warm spice, subtle smoke, and complex depth that elevates barbecue fare from simple to restaurant-quality.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams tomatoes • 5 chipotle chillies • 3 garlic cloves • 150 ml red wine • 1 teaspoon dried oregano • 4 tablespoons clear honey • 1 teaspoon American mustard • 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Fiery citrus salsa
recipes.overview: A vibrant, unexpected salsa showcasing bright citrus balanced with fresh chilli heat and aromatic mint. The combination of orange and apple with raw chilli creates a complex, refreshing sauce that serves equally well as marinade for shellfish or finishing sauce for barbecue.
recipes.ingredients: 1 orange • 1 green apple • 2 fresh red chillies • 1 garlic clove • 8 fresh mint leaves • juice of 1 lemon • salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Ginger and chilli sauce for sashimi
recipes.overview: A vibrant, aromatic sauce that showcases the clean heat of fresh chilli balanced with pungent ginger and umami-rich soy. Hot oil poured over the ingredients creates a fragrant, warming sauce that is the perfect accompaniment to pristine raw fish.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger • 2 tablespoons spring onions • 1 red chilli • 2 tablespoons dark soy sauce • 2 tablespoons light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon unrefined cane sugar • 2 tablespoons Chicken Stock • 1 tablespoon sesame oil • 2 tablespoons groundnut oil

subcategories.overview: Hot sauces and chilli-based condiments.

subcategories.label: Sauce Sweet

recipes.title: Butterscotch sauce
recipes.overview: A luxuriously rich, creamy sauce showcasing butter, vanilla, and deep caramel color. The syrup base and sugar create a complex sweetness balanced with vanilla's subtle warmth, while butter creates silky mouthfeel. This elegant sauce elevates simple vanilla ice cream into a sophisticated dessert.
recipes.ingredients: 400 ml single cream • 120 ml Sirop a sorbet • 75 grams caster sugar • 1 vanilla pod • 60 grams unsalted butter

recipes.title: Caramel sauce
recipes.overview: A sophisticated caramel sauce showcasing deep amber color achieved through patient sugar melting. The contrast between hot caramel and cold cream creates luxurious sauce with complex sweetness and subtle bitterness, while optional egg yolks add silky richness.
recipes.ingredients: 80 ml water • 100 grams sugar • 500 ml double cream • 2 egg yolks

recipes.title: Caramel with vanilla sauce
recipes.overview: A luxuriously smooth sauce showcasing butter's richness combined with caramel's complex sweetness and vanilla's subtle warmth. Cream stirred into hot caramel creates a silky, refined sauce that elevates simple desserts to elegant presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 100 grams caster sugar • 75 grams butter • 1 vanilla pod • 400 ml double cream

recipes.title: Chocolate sauce
recipes.overview: A rich, silky chocolate sauce balancing 70% dark chocolate's subtle bitterness with sugar and cream's sweetness. Butter mounting at the end creates luxurious glossy finish. This fundamental dessert sauce adapts to various preparations with elegant sophistication.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams dark chocolate • 175 ml milk • 2 tablespoons double cream • 30 grams sugar • 30 grams butter

recipes.title: Coffee sabayon with cinnamon
recipes.overview: An ethereal, fluffy sauce showcasing aromatic coffee suspended in silky sabayon base. The whisked egg yolks and sugar create airy foam while cinnamon adds warmth and complexity. This refined sauce elevates simple fruit presentations to elegant desserts.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon instant coffee • 4 tablespoons cold water • 4 egg yolks • 50 grams caster sugar • 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon

recipes.title: Jasmine tea custard
recipes.overview: An elegant, delicate custard infused with aromatic jasmine tea, showcasing the balance between cream's richness and tea's subtle floral notes. Complex and refined, this sophisticated sauce elevates simple brioche or fresh fruit into restaurant-quality presentations.
recipes.ingredients: 120 ml milk • 250 ml whipping cream • 3 tablespoons jasmine tea leaves • 8 egg yolks • 150 grams soft brown sugar

recipes.title: Lemon custard
recipes.overview: A vibrant, refreshing custard showcasing bright lemon's sharp acidity balanced with sugar's sweetness and cream's richness. The tart elegance of this summer sauce makes it perfect accompaniment to fresh berries and light desserts.
recipes.ingredients: 240 ml single cream • 240 ml lemon juice • 140 grams caster sugar • 6 egg yolks

recipes.title: Liquorice sauce
recipes.overview: An unusual yet sophisticated sauce showcasing liquorice's distinctive anise-like character balanced with creamy richness. The subtle sweetness and herbal warmth make this elegant sauce work equally well with fruit desserts or delicate grilled fish.
recipes.ingredients: 250 ml milk • 60 grams caster sugar • 25 grams liquorice extract • 3 egg yolks • 50 ml whipping cream

recipes.title: Sabayon
recipes.overview: Sabayon is a classic French dessert sauce made by whisking egg yolks, sugar, and sweet wine over gentle heat until the mixture becomes pale, thick, and mousse-like. The technique relies on careful temperature control to cook the yolks without scrambling them, producing a light, ribbon-consistency foam. It can be served on its own in a glass or spooned over fruit and briefly gratinéed for a more indulgent finish.
recipes.ingredients: 100 ml Sauternes or other sweet white wine • 3 egg yolks • 40 grams caster sugar
ingredientNames: sauternes or other sweet white wine

recipes.title: Sweet spiced red wine sauce
recipes.overview: This deep, aromatic red wine sauce is infused with warm spices, vanilla, and orange before being finished with fresh mint, giving it both richness and brightness. Reducing the wine by a third concentrates the flavour into an elegant, pourable consistency. It pairs beautifully with poached fruit and rice-based desserts, and can even be churned into a sorbet.
recipes.ingredients: 500 ml red wine • 200 grams caster sugar • 1 cinnamon stick • 1 clove • 2 vanilla pods • finely pared zest and juice of 1 orange • small pinch of freshly grated nutmeg • 1 tablespoon mint leaves
ingredientNames: finely pared zest and juice of 1 orange
small pinch of freshly grated nutmeg

recipes.title: White chocolate sauce with mint
recipes.overview: This luxurious white chocolate sauce is lifted by an infusion of fresh mint and caraway seeds steeped in hot cream, adding herbal brightness to its natural richness. The melted chocolate and infused cream are combined and briefly boiled to give the sauce a smooth, glossy finish. It is particularly striking served over dark chocolate ice cream, where the contrast of flavours and temperatures makes for a dramatic dessert.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams best-quality white chocolate • 100 ml milk • 250 ml double cream • 7 grams fresh mint leaves • 3/4 teaspoon caraway seeds

subcategories.overview: Sweet sauces for desserts: caramels, fruit reductions, chocolate.

categories.overview: A library of sauces (fish, meat, savoury, sweet, spicy and fruit-based) to pair with everything else here.

categories.label: Sides

recipes.title: Asparagus and prosciutto bundles
recipes.overview: Asparagus and prosciutto bundles are an elegant starter or side dish where roasted asparagus spears are wrapped in delicate cured ham. The balsamic and olive oil dressing adds depth and a slight sweetness that pairs beautifully with the salty prosciutto.
recipes.ingredients: 24 spears fresh asparagus • 8 slices prosciutto • 2 tablespoons olive oil • 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar • 175 grams hollandaise sauce • salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Bombay Potatoes
recipes.overview: This classic Indian vegetarian dish of potatoes is slow cooked in a richly flavoured curry sauce with fresh chillies for an added kick.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams new potatoes • 2 onions • 2 fresh green chillies • 50 grams coriander leaves • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric • 2 dried red chillies • 6 curry leaves • ¼ teaspoon asafoetida • ½ teaspoon cumin seeds • ½ teaspoon mustard seeds • ½ teaspoon onion seeds • ½ teaspoon fennel seeds • ½ teaspoon kalonji seeds • 4 tablespoons vegetable oil • lemon juice • salt • fried fresh curry leaves • sesame seeds

recipes.title: Boulangère potatoes
recipes.overview: Boulangère potatoes are a classic French gratin of thinly sliced potatoes and softened onions baked slowly in stock until tender, with a golden, crispy top. Unlike dauphinoise, they use stock rather than cream, making them a lighter accompaniment that absorbs all the savoury cooking liquid beautifully.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 2 onions • 675 grams potatoes • salt and freshly ground white pepper • 450 ml hot chicken stock
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground white pepper

recipes.title: Brussels sprouts au gratin
recipes.overview: Brussels sprouts au gratin transforms humble sprouts into a rich and crunchy side dish coated in a savoury blend of breadcrumbs, pecorino, garlic, and parsley. Parboiling before baking ensures the sprouts are tender inside while the topping crisps to a golden crust in the oven.
recipes.ingredients: 480 grams Brussels sprouts • 180 grams dried breadcrumbs • 180 ml Extra origin olive oil • 120 grams flat leaf parsley • 4 cloves garlic • 180 grams pecorino cheese • salt and pepper

recipes.title: Celeriac and potato dauphinoise
recipes.overview: Celeriac and potato dauphinoise is a rich, creamy French gratin that pairs the earthy nuttiness of celeriac with tender potato slices, all baked in a garlicky double cream. The addition of softened onions and a golden grilled top makes this an indulgent accompaniment to steaks and robust beef dishes.
recipes.ingredients: 2 large onions • 50 grams butter • 600 ml double cream • 1 garlic clove • salt and freshly ground black pepper • 450 grams potatoes • 1 large celeriac
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Ceviche
recipes.overview: Ceviche is a vibrant, no-cook appetizer in which fresh seafood is "cooked" by the acidity of lime juice, taking on a firm, opaque texture while retaining a wonderfully fresh flavour. The addition of mango, citrus segments, and fresh chilli creates a bright, tropical balance of sweet, sharp, and heat.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams medium cooked prawns • 350 grams scallops • 350 grams salmon fillet • 2 tomatoes • 1 red onion • 1 small mango • 1 fresh red chilli • 12 limes • 2 tablespoon caster sugar • 2 pink grapefruit • 3 oranges • salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Chanternay carrots and parsnips with maple syrup and a mustard glaze
recipes.overview: Chanternay carrots and parsnips with maple syrup and mustard glaze is a sweet, sticky, and deeply flavoursome roasted vegetable side dish. The glaze of maple syrup, wholegrain mustard, and orange caramelises in the oven to coat the vegetables in a rich, glossy finish that elevates any roast dinner.
recipes.ingredients: 300 grams Chanternay carrots • 300 grams parsnips • 2 tablespoons olive oil • 3 tablespoons maple syrup • 1 tablespoon whole grain mustard • zest and juice of half an orange
ingredientNames: zest and juice of half an orange

recipes.title: Chilli and red onion raita
recipes.overview: Chilli and red onion raita is a cooling, yoghurt-based Indian condiment with toasted cumin, fresh coriander, and a gentle heat from green chilli. It provides a refreshing contrast to spicy curries and works equally well as a dip alongside poppadums.
recipes.ingredients: 1 teaspoon cumin seeds • 1 large red onion • 1 small garlic clove • 1 small fresh green chilli • 150 ml natural yoghurt • 2 tablespoons coriander • half a tablespoon granulated sugar • salt to taste

recipes.title: Crispy cabbage
recipes.overview: Crispy cabbage is a simple but satisfying deep-fried side dish that transforms savoy cabbage into light, golden, salted morsels with a satisfying crunch. Using a mix of outer and inner leaves creates a pleasing range of colour and texture, proving that cabbage can be far from tasteless or soggy.
recipes.ingredients: half a savoy cabbage • oil • salt

recipes.title: Cucumber raita
recipes.overview: Cucumber raita is a cool, refreshing yoghurt-based condiment made with finely diced cucumber, cumin, and fresh green chilli. It is the classic cooling accompaniment to spicy Indian dishes, providing a soothing contrast to heat.
recipes.ingredients: 1 cucumber • 300 ml natural yoghurt • ¼ teaspoon salt • ¼ teaspoon ground cumin • 1 fresh green chilli • pinch chilli powder • 1 mint sprig

recipes.title: Fried wuntun
recipes.overview: Fried wuntun are crispy deep-fried parcels filled with a seasoned pork and Parma ham mixture, flavoured with ginger, soy sauce, and sesame oil. The golden, crunchy wrappers give way to a juicy, aromatic filling that makes them an irresistible party snack or starter. They are best served immediately after frying with a selection of dipping sauces.
recipes.ingredients: 1 packet wuntun skins • 500 ml oil • 350 grams minced pork • 2 tablespoons Parma ham • 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 2 teaspoons fresh ginger • 1 teaspoon sesame oil • 1 egg • ½ teaspoon cornflour • 1 teaspoon sugar

recipes.title: Herb crêpes
recipes.overview: Herb crêpes are thin, delicate pancakes enriched with fresh herbs such as parsley, chervil, and chives. They are particularly useful in dishes like Beef Wellington, where they are layered between the meat and pastry to act as a moisture barrier and keep the pastry crisp. The rested batter ensures a smooth, even texture with a light, pliable result.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams plain flour • 150 ml milk • 2 eggs • salt and fresh ground pepper • 15 grams chopped herbs • 30 grams clarified butter

recipes.title: Marbled tea eggs
recipes.overview: Marbled tea eggs are a classic Chinese preparation in which hard-boiled eggs are cracked and simmered in a spiced black tea broth, creating a striking web-like pattern on the surface once peeled. The soy sauce, cinnamon, and star anise infuse the eggs with a deep, aromatic flavour that complements their visual appeal. They are traditionally served cold and make an elegant garnish or snack alongside other cold dishes.
recipes.ingredients: 6 eggs • 1.7 litres water • 3 tablespoons black Chinese tea • 2 tablespoons dark soy sauce • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 cinnamon stick • 1 star anise

recipes.title: Onion bhajis
recipes.overview: Onion bhajis are golden, crispy fritters made from sliced onions bound in a spiced gram flour batter and deep fried until crunchy and cooked through. The combination of chilli, turmeric, coriander, and curry leaves gives them a warmly aromatic flavour that pairs perfectly with cooling yoghurt-based dips. Freshly made, they are a satisfying vegetarian snack or side dish alongside a curry.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams gram flour • 1 teaspoon chilli powder • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric • 1 teaspoon coriander seeds • 3 large onions • 6 fresh curry leaves • sunflower oil • salt

recipes.title: Pork, apricot and pistachio stuffing
recipes.overview: This richly flavoured stuffing combines pork sausage meat with sweet dried apricots, crunchy pistachios, and aromatic herbs, with nuggets of pan-fried chorizo tucked into each stuffing ball for a smoky surprise. It is designed to complement roasted game birds such as chicken, poussin, or turkey, providing both a cavity stuffing and individual balls for serving alongside. The combination of textures and sweet-savoury flavours makes it a standout element of a roast dinner.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 1 large onion, finely chopped • small bunch of flat leaf parsley • small bunch of sage leaves, chopped • 900 grams pork sausage meat • 75 grams fresh white bread crumbs • 1 large egg • 100 grams dried apricots, chopped • 75 grams shelled pistachios, chopped • olive oil to drizzle • 2 chorizo sausages
ingredientNames: small bunch of flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Potato and parsnip crisps
recipes.overview: Potato and parsnip crisps are paper-thin slices of potato and parsnip deep fried until golden and shatteringly crisp. The natural sweetness of the parsnip contrasts beautifully with the starchy potato, and together they make an elegant and addictive snack. They work equally well as a pre-dinner nibble or as a delicate garnish for a plated main course.
recipes.ingredients: 2 large potatoes • 3 large parsnips • 1 litre oil • salt

recipes.title: Potatoes with red chillies
recipes.overview: Potatoes with red chillies is a vibrant, spice-forward side dish in which par-boiled new potatoes are tossed with toasted whole spices, golden onion, and fiery fresh red chillies. The combination of cumin, fennel, and coriander seeds creates a fragrant base that infuses the potatoes with warmth and depth. Fresh coriander stirred through and used as a garnish adds a bright, herbal finish.
recipes.ingredients: 12 small new potatoes • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil • ½ teaspoon crushed dried chillies • ½ teaspoon white cumin seeds • ½ teaspoon fennel seeds • ½ teaspoon crushed coriander seeds • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 onion • 2 fresh red chillies • 3 tablespoons coriander

recipes.title: Prawn toast
recipes.overview: Prawn toast is a classic dim sum snack of bread spread with a seasoned prawn paste, coated in sesame seeds, and deep fried until golden and crisp. The ginger, soy sauce, and sesame oil in the paste give the filling a distinctly aromatic, umami-rich flavour that contrasts with the crunchy, seed-studded exterior. Popular in Chinese restaurants worldwide, it makes an excellent finger food or starter.
recipes.ingredients: 10 thin slices of bread • 3 tablespoons white sesame seeds • 400 ml oil for deep frying • 450 grams uncooked peeled prawns • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 egg • 2 tablespoons spring onions • 2 teaspoons fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Rice cake
recipes.overview: Rice cake is a traditional Chinese preparation that transforms the crispy crust that forms at the bottom of a pot of slow-cooked rice into a versatile, crunchy ingredient. Once dried and deep fried, it develops a light, airy texture that sizzles dramatically when dropped into hot soup or stock. It is most famously used in Sizzling Rice Prawns and is a testament to the resourcefulness of Chinese cooking.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams long grain white rice • 570 ml water • 2 teaspoons groundnut oil

recipes.title: Roasted vegetable stacks
recipes.overview: Roasted vegetable stacks are a vibrant and impressive side dish built from layers of oven-roasted peppers, onions, artichokes, asparagus, and tomatoes. The vegetables are stacked on garlic-rubbed griddled bread and finished with a garlic vinaigrette, making them as striking to look at as they are satisfying to eat.
recipes.ingredients: 3 red peppers • 3 yellow peppers • 2 red onions • 4 baby artichoke hearts in oil • 2 plum or beefsteak tomatoes • 12-16 asparagus stalks • 8 tablespoons garlic vinaigrette • 15 cm chunk French bread • 1 large garlic clove

recipes.title: Spiced Chinese leaves
recipes.overview: Spiced Chinese leaves is a quick stir-fried side dish that transforms the mild, delicate flavour of Chinese leaves with a robust sauce of ginger, garlic, chilli, soy sauce, and sesame oil. The high-heat cooking method brings out a savoury depth that makes it a perfect accompaniment to Asian-style mains.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams Chinese leaves • 1 tablespoon oil • 2 teaspoons fresh ginger • 2 teaspoons garlic • 1 dried red chilli • 1 tablespoons dry sherry or rice wine • 2 tablespoons dark soy sauce • 2 teaspoons sugar • 50 ml water • 2 teaspoons sesame oil

recipes.title: Spicy peanut balls
recipes.overview: Spicy peanut balls are deep-fried rice balls seasoned with garlic, ginger, chilli, soy sauce, and lime, then coated in chopped peanuts for a satisfying crunch. They make an excellent snack or starter, and pair naturally with a chilli dipping sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 1 garlic clove • 1 cm piece root ginger • 1 red chilli • ¼ teaspoon ground turmeric • 1 teaspoon sugar • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon chilli sauce • 2 teaspoons soy sauce • 2 tablespoon coriander • juice of half a lime • 225 grams cooked white long grain rice • 115 grams peanuts • oil

recipes.title: Spring rolls
recipes.overview: These spring rolls are filled with a stir-fried mixture of Parma ham, mange tout, red pepper, waterchestnuts, and bean sprouts, wrapped in crisp deep-fried skins. The filling is seasoned with two soy sauces, sesame oil, and sherry, giving a well-rounded savoury flavour with excellent texture.
recipes.ingredients: 1 packet spring roll skins • 175 grams Parma ham • 110 grams mange tout • 110 grams red pepper • 110 grams waterchestnuts • 1 tablespoon groundnut oil • 110 grams fresh bean sprouts • 4 spring onions • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon sugar • 1 teaspoon light soy sauce • 1 teaspoon dark soy sauce • 1 teaspoon sesame oil • 1½ tablespoons dry sherry or rice wine • 1 litre oil • 3 tablespoons plain flour

recipes.title: Stir fried mange tout with waterchestnuts
recipes.overview: Stir-fried mange tout with waterchestnuts is a quick, sweet, and crunchy side dish that comes together in under 10 minutes. The combination of tender mange tout and crisp waterchestnuts, seasoned with soy sauce, sesame oil, and a touch of sugar, makes it a versatile companion to Chinese-style mains.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams waterchestnuts • 1 tablespoon groundnut oil • 3 tablespoons spring onions • 225 grams mange tout • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 2 tablespoons water • ½ teaspoon salt • ½ teaspoon sugar • 1 teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Stir fried spinach with garlic
recipes.overview: Stir-fried spinach with garlic is a classic southern Chinese side dish that showcases how quickly and simply spinach can be cooked to perfection. The leaves are wilted in a hot wok with oil, salt, sugar, and garlic, resulting in a tender, flavoursome dish that is ready in under 10 minutes.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams fresh spinach • 1 tablespoon oil • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon sugar • 2 teaspoons garlic

recipes.title: Stir-fried ginger broccoli
recipes.overview: Stir-fried ginger broccoli is a simple, clean side dish that pairs blanched broccoli with fragrant shredded ginger and a finish of sesame oil. It works equally well served hot alongside Asian mains or at room temperature as a salad-style accompaniment in warmer months.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams fresh broccoli

categories.overview: Vegetable preparations and starches that round out a plate.

categories.label: Soups

recipes.title: Beef and wine soup
recipes.overview: This comforting beef and wine soup from the Italian Alps combines rich beef stock with white wine for a warming broth. Topped with cinnamon-spiced toasted bread and creamy Parmesan, it's a simple yet elegant dish that highlights the region's culinary influences. Perfect for a cozy meal.
recipes.ingredients: 1 litre strong beef stock or broth • 500 ml white wine • ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon • 100 ml double cream • 4 slices country bread • 40 grams unsalted butter • 100 grams freshly grated Parmesan • Freshly grated Parmesan - to serve

recipes.title: Beef Pho
recipes.overview: This dish works best with raw beef that has been sliced paper thin, as it cooks in seconds when placed in the hot broth.
recipes.ingredients: 200 grams rice noodles • 1.5 litres beef stock • 1 star anise • 4 cm fresh ginger • 2 pigs trotters • half an onion studded with 2 cloves • 2 lemon grass stems • 2 garlic cloves • ¼ teaspoons white pepper • 1 tablespoon fish sauce • 400 grams beef fillet • 90 gram bean sprouts • 2 spring onions • 25 grams coriander leaves • 25 grams mint • 2 fresh red chillies • mint leaves • coriander leaves • 2 limes • fish sauce

recipes.title: Caribbean fish soup
recipes.overview: A vibrant Caribbean soup featuring fresh fish poached in a spicy tomato-based broth with sweet potatoes and aromatic vegetables. The scotch bonnet chilli adds authentic heat, balanced by fresh lime juice for a refreshing finish.
recipes.ingredients: 2 tablespoons oil • 4 shallots • 2 celery stalks • 1 scotch bonnet chilli • 2 tomatoes • 1 large red pepper • 275 grams sweet potato • 500 grams cod • ½ teaspoon ground allspice • ½ teaspoon nutmeg • 3 tablespoons lime juice • 875 ml fish stock

recipes.title: Chestnut and Chorizo Soup
recipes.overview: A hearty Spanish soup featuring sweet chestnuts paired with spicy chorizo sausage, caramelized vegetables, and warming spices. The saffron adds a subtle earthiness, creating a comforting autumnal dish with rich, smoky flavors.
recipes.ingredients: 4 tablespoons olive oil • 1 large onion • 1 medium carrot • 1 celery stalk • 2 garlic cloves • 120 grams chorizo • 2 tomatoes • 500 grams cooked chestnuts • 1 teaspoon ground cumin • 2 teaspoons fresh thyme leaves • 2 small dried red chillies • 20 saffron strands • Salt and pepper to taste • 1 litre water

recipes.title: Crab bisque
recipes.overview: A rich and elegant seafood bisque featuring fresh crab cooked in a flavorful broth with brandy and cream. The soup is strained for smoothness, highlighting the sweet crab meat with a touch of spice from cayenne.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • half a carrot • half an onion • 1 celery stalk • 1 kg live crabs • 1 bay leaf • 2 thyme sprigs • 2 tablespoons tomato purée • ¼ teaspoon cayenne pepper • 150 ml dry white wine • 1 litre fish stock • 500 ml water • 2 tablespoons brandy • 60 grams rice • 3 tablespoons double cream

recipes.title: Creamy clam soup
recipes.overview: A luxurious, creamy soup featuring fresh clams cooked with vegetables and rice, then pureed for a smooth texture. The natural clam broth provides deep seafood flavor, enhanced by cream and fresh parsley.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 1 onion • 1 large leek • 1 large carrot • 250 grams swede • 75 grams medium or short grained rice • 1.75 kg clams • 1 bay leaf • 800 ml fish stock • 200 ml whipping cream • 3 tablespoons flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Curried chicken noodle soup
recipes.overview: This aromatic Thai-inspired soup combines tender chicken, rice noodles, and coconut milk in a flavorful curry broth. Packed with vegetables and fresh herbs, it's a comforting and spicy dish that warms the soul. Perfect for a quick yet satisfying meal.
recipes.ingredients: 175 grams thin egg noodles • 2 tablespoons peanut oil • 2 boneless, skinless chicken breast • 1 onion • 300 grams pak choy • 1 small fresh red chilli • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger • 2 tablespoons curry powder • 750 ml chicken stock • 800 ml coconut milk • 20 grams basil

recipes.title: French Onion Soup
recipes.overview: Classic French soup with caramelized onions, rich broth, and cheesy bread topping.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 750 grams onions • 2 garlic cloves • 45 grams plain flour • 2 litres stock • 250 ml dry white wine • 1 bay leaf • 2 thyme sprigs • 12 slices stale baguette • 100 grams Gruyère cheese

recipes.title: Gazpacho
recipes.overview: This refreshing chilled Spanish soup from Andalucía features ripe tomatoes, crisp cucumber, and bell peppers blended into a smooth, tangy puree. No cooking required, it's a vibrant and healthy dish perfect for hot days. Served with a fresh vegetable garnish for added texture.
recipes.ingredients: 1 kg vine-ripened tomatoes • 1 cucumber • 1 small red pepper • 1 red onion • 3 garlic cloves • 80 grams sourdough bread • 2 tablespoons sherry vinegar • a few drops of Tabasco sauce • 2 teaspoons tomato • 2 teaspoons red pepper • 2 teaspoons cucumber • 2 teaspoons onion • 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil • 1 teaspoon lemon juice

recipes.title: Hot and sour prawn soup
recipes.overview: This classic Thai hot and sour soup features succulent prawns in a fragrant broth infused with lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves. The perfect balance of spicy heat from chillies and tangy sourness from lime creates a refreshing yet warming dish. Quick to prepare and full of bold flavors.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams raw medium prawns • 1 tablespoon oil • 3 lemongrass stems • 3 thin slices fresh galangal • 3 - 5 small fresh red chillies • 5 lime leaves • 2 spring onions • 70 grams button mushrooms • 2 tablespoons fish sauce • 3 tablespoons lime juice • 1 - 2 tablespoons chilli paste • coriander leaves

recipes.title: Hungarian Goulash
recipes.overview: This traditional Hungarian goulash is a rich, hearty stew featuring tender beef simmered with sweet paprika, caraway seeds, and vegetables. Originating from 9th-century Hungary, it's a comforting dish that embodies the flavors of the region's pastoral heritage. Perfect for a warming meal on chilly days.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams beef chuck steak • 2 tablespoons of olive oil • 5 onions • 250 grams tomatoes • 3 large potatoes • 2 heaped tablespoons sweet Hungarian paprika • ½ teaspoon whole caraway seeds • 750 ml beef stock • Salt and pepper to taste • Fresh flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Leek and potato soup
recipes.overview: This classic French potato and leek soup, known as Potage Parmentier, is a creamy, comforting dish made with simple ingredients. The subtle flavors of leeks and potatoes are enhanced by cream, creating a smooth and elegant soup. Perfect as a starter or light meal, served hot or chilled.
recipes.ingredients: 50 grams butter • 1 onion • 3 leeks • 1 celery stalk • 200 grams potatoes • 1 garlic clove • 750 ml chicken stock • 220 ml whipping cream • 2 tablespoons chives

recipes.title: Manhattan seafood chowder
recipes.overview: This hearty Manhattan seafood chowder combines fresh clams, cod, and prawns in a tomato-based broth with potatoes and bacon. A classic American dish from New York, it's rich, flavorful, and perfect for seafood lovers. Serve with crusty bread for a complete meal.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams butter • 3 bacon slices • 1 kg baby clams • 375 grams skinless cod fillets • 12 large prawns • 2 onions • 2 celery stalks • 3 potatoes • 400 grams tinned tomatoes • 2 garlic cloves • 3 teaspoons thyme • 1.25 litres fish stock • 1 tablespoon tomato purée • 2 tablespoons flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Mexican soup with salsa
recipes.overview: This vibrant Mexican seafood soup features halibut, prawns, scallops, and clams in a spicy tomato broth with corn and lime. Topped with a fresh avocado salsa, it's a zesty and flavorful dish that brings the tastes of Mexico to your table. Perfect for a light yet satisfying meal.
recipes.ingredients: 3 tablespoons olive oil • 1 large onion • 2 corn cobs • 800 grams tinned chopped tomatoes • 3 garlic cloves • 2 thin red chillies • 2 bay leaves • 1 teaspoon dried oregano • 500 grams halibut fillets • 12 prawns • 8 scallops • 12 clams • 200 ml fish stock • 1 teaspoon caster sugar • 2 tablespoons coriander leaves • juice of 2 limes • 125 grams double cream • half an avocado • 1 tablespoon coriander leaves • grated zest and juice of 1 lime • half an red onion

recipes.title: Minestrone with pesto
recipes.overview: This hearty Italian minestrone soup is loaded with vegetables, beans, and pasta, topped with fresh pesto. A comforting and nutritious dish that captures the essence of Italian home cooking. Serve with crusty bread for a complete meal.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams pancetta • 3 tablespoons olive oil • 1 large onion • 1 celery stick • 1 carrot • 1 potato • 2 thin zucchini • 60 grams green beans • 80 grams silverbeet leaves • 2 garlic cloves • 3 tablespoons flat leaf parsley • 6 fresh basil leaves • 125 grams dried borlotti beans • 2 teaspoons tomato purée • 400 grams tinned tomatoes • 2 litres stock • 75 grams ditalini • 30 grams fresh basil leaves • 20 grams pine nuts • 2 garlic cloves • 100 ml olive oil • 25 grams Parmesan

recipes.title: Mulligatawny soup
recipes.overview: This Anglo-Indian mulligatawny soup blends curry spices with vegetables in a smooth, warming broth. A comforting winter dish with layers of flavor from aromatic spices and optional sauces. Perfect for spice lovers seeking a hearty soup.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon unsalted butter • 1 potato • 1 large carrot • 1 large onion • 1 leek • 2 celery sticks • 2 tomatoes • 1 garlic clove • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger • half a teaspoon fresh thyme • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric • 1 teaspoon cayenne pepper • 1 teaspoon paprika • quarter teaspoon chilli flakes • quarter teaspoon cumin seeds • 1 star anise • 1 bay leaf • half teaspoon ground mixed spice • 3 tablespoons soy sauce • 3 tablespoons teriyaki sauce • 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce • 1.2 litres stock

recipes.title: New England clam chowder
recipes.overview: This classic New England clam chowder is a creamy, comforting soup featuring fresh clams, potatoes, and smoky bacon. A staple of American cuisine, it's rich and hearty, perfect for cold days. Serve with oyster crackers for authenticity.
recipes.ingredients: 1.5 kg clams • 3 bacon slices • 2 teaspoons oil • 1 onion • 750 grams potato • 1 garlic clove • 330 ml fish stock • 500 ml milk • 125 ml whipping cream • 3 tablespoon flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Potato and garlic soup
recipes.overview: A rustic, comforting soup highlighting the sweet, nutty flavor of roasted garlic combined with creamy potatoes. Pureed for smoothness, it's a simple yet flavorful dish perfect for garlic lovers.
recipes.ingredients: 2 tablespoons olive oil • 1 onion • 2 onions • 2 garlic bulbs • 500 grams potatoes • 2 litres stock • chopped chives to serve

recipes.title: Prawn, lemongrass and coconut soup (Tom Yum)
recipes.overview: A vibrant Thai soup featuring prawns in a fragrant broth of lemongrass, coconut milk, and red curry paste. The balance of sweet, sour, salty, and spicy flavors creates an authentic taste of Thailand.
recipes.ingredients: 2 teaspoons vegetable oil • 1 stalk lemongrass • 1 inch fresh ginger • 16 large raw prawns • 1 tablespoon red curry paste • 2 teaspoons sugar • 2 tablespoons lime juice • 1 tablespoon fish sauce • 1.2 litres fish or chicken stock • 400 ml coconut milk • Fresh coriander

recipes.title: Seafood soup
recipes.overview: A hearty Mediterranean seafood soup featuring a variety of fresh shellfish and fish in a rich tomato broth infused with wine, garlic, and herbs. The homemade fish stock provides deep flavor, making it a luxurious one-pot meal.
recipes.ingredients: 60 ml olive oil • 3 onions • 6 garlic cloves • 1 leek • 4 tomatoes • 60 grams tomato purée • 500 grams raw king prawns • 1 raw lobster tail • 2 fish heads • 500 grams white fish fillet • 12 mussels • 200 grams scallops with corals • 3 bay leaves • small piece orange rind • 30 grams fresh parsley • 30 grams fresh basil • 250 ml red wine • 500 ml water

recipes.title: Shellfish Laksa
recipes.overview: A fragrant Malaysian noodle soup combining shellfish with a spicy coconut curry broth, rice noodles, and fresh herbs. The balance of heat from chillies and creaminess from coconut milk makes it a comforting yet exotic dish.
recipes.ingredients: 45 ml groundnut oil • 5 garlic cloves • 1½ tablespoon chopped fresh root ginger • 7 small red shallots • 2 fennel bulbs • 450 grams white fish fillet • 20 large prawns • 3 fresh medium hot red chillies • 1 teaspoon mild paprika • 2 teaspoon shrimp paste • 1 teaspoon fennel seeds • 45 ml Thai fish sauce • juice of 1 - 2 limes • 25 grams fresh coriander • small bunch fresh basil • 600 ml fish stock • 450 ml coconut milk • 300 grams thin vermicelli rice noodles • 2 spring onions

recipes.title: Spinach and Fennel soup
recipes.overview: A delicate yet flavorful soup pairing the subtle anise notes of fennel with vibrant spinach, pureed to a smooth consistency and enriched with cream. The fresh green color and bright flavors make it a refreshing choice.
recipes.ingredients: 60 grams unsalted butter • 2 small onions • 2 small fennel bulbs • 1 small potato • 700 grams spinach • 1.75 litres water • 4 tablespoons double cream • salt and pepper to taste

recipes.title: Thai spicy sour soup
recipes.overview: A zesty Thai soup featuring tofu and mushrooms in a spicy, sour broth infused with lemongrass, galangal, and lime. The tom yum paste provides authentic heat and flavor, balanced by fresh herbs.
recipes.ingredients: 2 cm piece galangal • 1 lemongrass stem • 3 kaffir lime leaves • 200 grams button mushrooms • 200 grams pak choi • 200 grams tofu • 2 tablespoons tom yum paste • 1 small red chilli • 2 tablespoons lime juice • 750 ml vegetable stock • 750 ml water • 1 handful coriander leaves

recipes.title: Tom yum goong
recipes.overview: Authentic Thai hot and sour soup with prawns in a fragrant, spicy broth made from prawn shells, tamarind, and lime. The balance of sweet, sour, salty, and spicy flavors defines this classic dish.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon oil • 500 grams prawns • 2 tablespoons tom yum paste • 2 tablespoons tamarind purée • 2 tablespoons ground turmeric • 1 teaspoon chopped red chillies • 4 lime leaves • 2 tablespoons fish sauce • 2 tablespoons lime juice • 2 teaspoons palm sugar • 2.25 litres water • 2 tablespoons fresh coriander leaves

recipes.title: Tomato Soup
recipes.overview: This classic tomato soup is rich, comforting, and versatile, made with fresh tomatoes, vegetables, and herbs. It can be served chunky as a stew or blended into a smooth puree, with the option to add cream for extra smoothness. Simple to prepare yet full of flavor, it's perfect for any meal.
recipes.ingredients: 50 ml olive oil • 25 grams unsalted butter • 3 onions • 3 carrots • 3 celery sticks • 900 grams ripe tomatoes • 1 large garlic clove • small bunch of fresh basil • small bunch of tarragon • 1 bay leaf • 6 smoked back bacon rashers • 750 ml chicken stock • salt and freshly ground black pepper • 1 tablespoon tomato purée
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Tortilla soup
recipes.overview: A vibrant Mexican soup featuring crispy fried tortilla strips in a smoky tomato broth, topped with fresh avocado, cheese, and herbs. The combination of textures and flavors makes it a satisfying and authentic dish.
recipes.ingredients: 5 tablespoons olive oil • 1 onion • 3 garlic cloves • 4 -6 fresh tomatoes • 1 - 2 very large dried chillies • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika • 1.2 litres chicken stock • 6 corn tortillas • 200 grams buffalo mozzarella • 1 large ripe avocado • 1 large lime • 1 bunch fresh flat leaf parsley • 1 bunch fresh coriander

recipes.title: Vegetable soup
recipes.overview: A nourishing, chunky vegetable soup packed with beans, squash, and seasonal vegetables in a light tomato broth. Perfect for using up garden produce, it's hearty yet healthy.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tablespoon olive oil • 1 leek • 1 small onion • 2 carrots • 2 celery stalks • 1 large courgette • 400 grams butternut squash • 2 potatoes • 1 tablespoon tomato purée • 1 litre vegetable stock • 1.25 litres water • 150 grams dried kidney beans • 3 tablespoons flat leaf parsley

recipes.title: Vietnamese beef soup
recipes.overview: A classic Vietnamese pho featuring paper-thin beef slices cooked in a fragrant broth spiced with star anise and cinnamon, served over rice noodles with fresh herbs and sprouts.
recipes.ingredients: 400 grams rump steak • half an onion • 1 small white onion • 1 ½ tablespoons fish sauce • 1 star anise • 1 cinnamon stick • pinch ground white pepper • 1.5 litres beef stock • 500 ml water • 300 grams fresh thin rice noodles • 3 spring onions • 15 grams mint leaves • 90 grams bean sprouts • 1 small red chilli • lemon wedges

recipes.title: Wuntun soup
recipes.overview: A comforting Chinese soup featuring delicate pork-filled wontons poached and served in a clear chicken broth, garnished with soy sauce and sesame oil for authentic flavor.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams minced pork • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry • 1 ½ tablespoons spring onions • 1 teaspoon sesame oil • 1 egg white • ½ teaspoon cornflour • 1 teaspoon sugar • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 litre Chinese chicken stock • 30 wuntun skins • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon spring onions • 1 teaspoon sesame oil

categories.overview: From clear broths to rich, blended soups, across Eastern and Western traditions.

categories.label: Sponges

recipes.title: Biscuit à L'Orange
recipes.overview: Biscuit à l'Orange is an elegant French almond-based sponge enriched with fresh orange zest and candied orange peel, creating a subtly citrus-flavored, tender crumb. The technique combines aeration (ribboned egg yolks with sugar, whipped whites), ground almonds and candied peel for character, and gentle folding of flour to preserve airiness. The result is a tender, fragrant sponge with whisper-thin crumb and pronounced orange flavor, perfect as a complete layered cake or divided into individual portions for plated desserts. Success depends on achieving proper ribbon consistency, meticulous folding technique, careful spreading of the batter into the ring, and precise baking at moderate temperature.
recipes.ingredients: 4 large eggs, size 4 • 1 additional large egg, size 2 • 130 grams caster sugar • 85 grams ground almonds • 1 medium orange • 25 grams candied orange peel • 85 grams cake flour or soft flour • 1 teaspoon unsalted butter • 30 grams unsalted butter • 1 pinch flour • 22-25 centimeter ring or springform cake tin • Baking parchment or greaseproof paper
ingredientNames: centimeter ring or springform cake tin

recipes.title: Biscuit Joconde
recipes.overview: Biscuit joconde is the apotheosis of French patisserie elegance: a delicate, paper-thin sponge made with tant pour tant (equal parts ground almonds and icing sugar), providing refined texture and subtle almond undertone without wheat flour heaviness. The technique combines aeration (ribboned whole eggs with tant pour tant) with careful folding of whipped egg whites, melted butter, and a modest flour addition. The result is spread thinly (3-4 millimeters) on parchment and baked very briefly (2-3 minutes at 250°C) to create a sponge that is just set and firm to the touch, not dried out. This delicate sponge serves as the structural base for mousse cakes, bavarois towers, and refined layer desserts. Success depends on achieving perfect ribbon consistency, meticulous folding technique, precise spreading thickness, and split-second baking timing.
recipes.ingredients: 375 grams tant pour tant • 5 whole eggs • 5 egg whites • 25 grams granulated or caster sugar • 50 grams cake flour or soft flour • 40 grams unsalted butter • 30 grams unsalted butter

recipes.title: Génoise Sponge
recipes.overview: Génoise (Génoise nature) is the foundational French sponge cake, distinguished by its technique of warming sugar and eggs in a bain-marie to create volume, then folding in flour and clarified butter with extreme care to maintain airiness. Unlike American sponges relying on chemical leavening, Génoise relies entirely on mechanical aeration, the whisking of warm eggs creates the structural matrix that rises in the oven. Success depends on achieving proper ribbon consistency during whisking (mixture should fall in ribbons when the whisk is lifted), gently folding flour without deflating the egg foam, and using clarified butter (which incorporates better than whole butter, which contains water and milk solids that break the foam). The result is a tender, elegant sponge with fine, even crumb and delicate flavor, the perfect canvas for cream fillings, soaked syrups, or fruit accompaniments. Baking the day before serving improves texture; the sponge continues to set overnight.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams granulated sugar • 8 large eggs • 250 grams cake flour or soft flour • 50 grams clarified butter • 30 grams unsalted butter • 1 pinch additional flour • Bain-marie setup • Electric mixer or whisk • 22-centimeter round cake tin, or other sized moulds as desired • Parchment paper optional

recipes.title: Rolled Biscuits
recipes.overview: Rolled biscuits are the ultimate flexible sponge base, created by piping through various nozzle sizes (from 5-millimeters to 1.5-centimeters) or spreading with a palette knife to create uniform sheets of varying thicknesses. The technique combines aeration (ribboned 7 egg yolks with sugar, whipped whites), dual flour incorporation (wheat flour plus potato flour for enhanced tenderness), meticulous folding, and immediate towel inversion while warm to create a perfectly pliable, rollable sponge. The result is an elegant sheet cake that can be filled, rolled, or layered with creams, jams, or mousses. Success depends on achieving proper ribbon consistency, careful folding, precise spreading/piping, and the distinctive immediate-inversion towel technique that prevents sticking and maintains pliability.
recipes.ingredients: 4 large eggs • 3 additional large egg yolks • 85 grams caster sugar • 35 grams wheat flour • 40 grams potato flour • Piping bag fitted with plain nozzle • OR palette knife for spreading • Baking sheet lined with parchment paper • Kitchen towel for immediate inversion
ingredientNames: piping bag fitted with plain nozzle
baking sheet lined with parchment paper

recipes.title: Sponge Base
recipes.overview: Sponge base is a simplified, diameter-flexible version of larger butter sponge cakes, allowing bakers to create cakes of any size using standardized proportions. The technique combines aeration (ribboned egg yolks with sugar, whipped whites), careful folding to preserve airiness, and variable baking time adjusted to mould diameter. The result is a tender, versatile sponge with balanced flavor and fine crumb, equally suited to small individual cakes, medium 22-centimeter layers, or large tortes. Success depends on achieving proper ribbon consistency, meticulous folding technique, and understanding the relationship between mould/sponge thickness and required baking time.
recipes.ingredients: 6 large eggs • 190 grams caster sugar • 180 grams cake flour or soft flour • Tin or flan ring of desired diameter • Parchment paper
ingredientNames: tin or flan ring of desired diameter

recipes.title: Sponge Fingers
recipes.overview: Sponge fingers are the classic French biscuit à la cuillère, distinguished by their light, airy structure and characteristic finger shape created by piping through a large nozzle. The technique combines aeration (ribboned egg yolks with sugar, whipped egg white peaks), careful folding of flour added late-stage, and dual icing sugar dusting at 5-minute intervals during cooling to create a delicate, sweet exterior. The result is a tender, elegant biscuit suitable for layering in desserts (Swiss rolls, charlottes), dipping in hot chocolate or liqueurs, or serving with soft creams. Success depends on achieving proper ribbon consistency, meticulous white folding technique, precise nozzle size and piping technique, and the distinctive dual-dust finishing procedure.
recipes.ingredients: 6 eggs • 190 grams caster sugar • 180 grams cake flour or soft flour • 30 grams icing sugar • Piping bag fitted with 1.5-centimeter plain round nozzle • Baking parchment or lightly buttered and floured greaseproof paper
ingredientNames: piping bag fitted with 1.5-centimeter plain round nozzle
baking parchment or lightly buttered and floured greaseproof paper

categories.overview: Génoise, biscuit and other classic sponge cakes that anchor layered desserts.

categories.label: Starters

recipes.title: Chicken satay
recipes.overview: Concertinas of tender chicken marinated in fragrant spices, threaded on skewers and grilled until golden. The rich and spicy peanut sauce complements the smoky grilled chicken perfectly. A classic Southeast Asian dish that's impressive enough for entertaining yet simple to prepare.
recipes.ingredients: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts • 2 tablespoons soft light brown sugar • 1 teaspoon cumin seeds • 1 teaspoon fennel seeds • 1½ teaspoon coriander seeds • 6 small onions • 1 garlic clove • 1 lemon grass stalk • 6 cashew nuts • half teaspoon ground turmeric • 4 small onions • 2 garlic cloves • 1 cm cube shrimp paste • 6 cashew nuts • 2 lemon grass stalks • 3 tablespoon sunflower oil • 2 teaspoon chilli powder • 400 ml coconut milk • 2 tablespoons tamarind paste • 1 tablespoon soft light brown sugar • 175 grams crunchy peanut butter

recipes.title: Club sandwich
recipes.overview: A classic three-tier sandwich combining toasted bread, tender chicken, crispy bacon, fresh vegetables, and poached eggs. This elegant preparation showcases the art of layering flavors and textures. A sophisticated lunch or light dinner that's surprisingly simple to execute with quality ingredients.
recipes.ingredients: 2 slices of bread • soft butter • 1 chicken breast fillet • salt and freshly ground pepper • 1 tablespoon olive oil • 2 smoked bacon rashers • half an iceberg lettuce • 1 tablespoon onion • 2 tablespoons mayonnaise • 2 tomatoes • 2 tablespoons vinaigrette • 1 teaspoon parsley • 2 poached eggs

recipes.title: Fiery vegetables in coconut milk
recipes.overview: A vibrant Thai curry celebrating fresh vegetables in a spiced coconut broth. Eight chillies may seem intense, but the creamy coconut milk tempers the heat into a balanced, complex warmth. The vegetables remain crisp-tender, and the holy basil adds an authentic finishing touch. Fragrant, colorful, and deeply satisfying.
recipes.ingredients: 75 grams aubergines • 75 grams baby corn • 75 grams mange tout • 75 grams asparagus • 75 grams squash • 75 grams green beans • 8 fresh red chillies • 2 lemon grass stalks • 4 kaffir lime leaves • 30 ml vegetable oil • 250 ml coconut milk • 2 tablespoons Thai fish sauce • salt • 15 holy basil leaves

recipes.title: Flash fried squid with paprika and garlic
recipes.overview: A Spanish tapas classic featuring tender squid rings and tentacles, quickly fried until golden and served with a vibrant paprika, garlic, and chilli dressing. The high heat creates a crispy exterior while keeping the squid moist inside. Simple yet elegant, a restaurant-quality dish that comes together in minutes.
recipes.ingredients: 500 grams very small squid • 90 ml olive oil • 1 fresh red chilli • 2 teaspoons smoked paprika • 2 tablespoons plain flour • 2 garlic cloves • 1 tablespoon sherry vinegar • 1 teaspoon shredded lemon rind • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley • salt and black pepper • salad leaves

recipes.title: Mediterranean Bruschetta
recipes.overview: A fresh and elegant Italian starter featuring toasted bread topped with roasted peppers or fresh tomato and basil. This bruschetta celebrates simplicity and quality ingredients, the charred bread provides a textural contrast to cool, flavourful toppings. Perfect for entertaining as it can be partially prepared ahead. ### Pepper Topping - 1 yellow pepper - 1 red pepper - 1 green pepper - Oil for roasting

recipes.title: Nonya pork satay
recipes.overview: Indonesian-style pork satay featuring tender, spiced meat on bamboo skewers with a creamy, complex peanut sauce enriched with coconut milk. The pork is infused with a paste of lemongrass, ground spices, and aromatics, making each bite deeply flavorful. This dish showcases traditional Southeast Asian techniques and is perfect for entertaining.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams pork tenderloin • 1 tablespoon soft light brown sugar • 1 cm cube shrimp paste • 2 lemon grass stalks • 2 tablespoon coriander seeds • 6 blanched almonds • 2 onions • 4 fresh red chillies • half a teaspoon ground turmeric • 300 ml coconut milk • 2 tablespoon peanut oil • salt

recipes.title: Spicy scrambled eggs
recipes.overview: Silky scrambled eggs infused with warm spices and fresh aromatics. The turmeric adds a earthy golden color while ginger and chilli provide warmth and complexity. Served with fresh coriander, this makes an excellent quick snack, elegant starter, or gourmet canapé topping.
recipes.ingredients: 3 eggs • 1 tablespoon butter • half teaspoon garlic • half teaspoon fresh ginger root • 1 tablespoon onion • half teaspoon fresh chilli • half teaspoon ground turmeric • 1 tomato • salt and freshly ground black pepper • half teaspoon coriander leaves
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Spring rolls with fiery chilli sauce
recipes.overview: Delicate spring rolls filled with silky cellophane noodles, tender wood ears, savory pork, and sweet crab, then deep-fried until golden and crispy. Served with a vibrant, fiery chilli sauce, these Southeast Asian gems are perfect as an appetizer or main snack. The contrast between crispy exterior and tender filling is irresistible.
recipes.ingredients: 25 grams cellophane noodles • 8 dried wood ears • 225 grams minced pork • 225 grams crab meat • 4 spring onions • teaspoon Thai fish sauce • 250 grams spring roll wrappers • flour and water paste • vegetable oil • salt and freshly ground black pepper • 2 fresh red chillies • 2 garlic cloves • 1 tablespoon granulated sugar • 3 tablespoons Thai fish sauce • juice of 1 lime
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Stuffed portobello mushrooms
recipes.overview: Large, meaty portobello mushroom caps baked with a savory-aromatic filling of Brie-style blue cheese, crispy breadcrumbs, garlic, and fresh parsley. The result is a beautiful, vegetarian-friendly starter or side dish with rich, umami flavors and a satisfying texture contrast between soft cheese and crispy topping.
recipes.ingredients: 4 portobello mushrooms • 150 grams Brie-style blue cheese • 50 grams fresh bread crumbs • small bunch of parsley • 5 cloves garlic • olive oil

recipes.title: Welsh rarebit
recipes.overview: A classic British cheese sauce, creamy, tangy, and rich with mature Cheddar, that's baked until bubbling. While traditionally spooned over toast, this versatile preparation also works beautifully over smoked haddock or vegetables. The silky sauce coating crispy bread is pure comfort food elevated to bistro standards.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams mature Cheddar • 150 ml milk • 25 grams plain flour • 50 grams fresh white breadcrumbs • 1 tablespoon English mustard powder • half teaspoon Worcestershire sauce • salt and freshly ground white pepper • 2 eggs • 2 egg yolks
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground white pepper

categories.overview: More substantial than appetisers: composed first courses to begin a meal.

categories.label: Stocks

recipes.title: Balti Chicken Stock
recipes.overview: Balti chicken stock is a transformed use of the chicken carcass, the skeletal frame remaining after a roasted or dressed chicken has been filleted or butchered for other preparations. Unlike classical French stocks that rely entirely on bones, Balti stock leverages the entire carcass (including marrow and any remaining connective tissue) combined with Balti masala paste and aromatic vegetables to create a distinctly spiced, flavorful base perfectly suited for Balti curries, spiced gravies, and Indian-influenced preparations. Success depends on removing the skin from the carcass (which creates greasy stock), using genuine Balti masala paste (not a substitute spice blend), and splitting the cooking into two 30-minute stages with thorough initial skimming. The finished stock should be clear, amber in color, distinctly aromatic with Balti spice complexity, and ready for freezing in convenient 200-millilitre portions. This stock represents resourceful, zero-waste cooking: transforming what would otherwise be discarded into a valuable ingredient.
recipes.ingredients: 1 oven-ready chicken • 1 litre cold water • 6 garlic cloves • 100 grams onion • 2 celery sticks • 1 large carrot • 4 bay leaves • 1 tablespoon Balti masala paste • 1 tablespoon granulated sugar • 1 teaspoon fine sea salt

recipes.title: Chinese Chicken Stock
recipes.overview: Chinese chicken stock is fundamentally different from classical French white stock in both technique and philosophy. The essential distinction is the "never boil" principle, the stock must never reach a full rolling boil, as boiling incorporates impurities and creates permanent cloudiness. The correct technique begins with uncooked (not blanched) chicken bones and meat, which are essential for richness and flavor; is never boiled; requires long, gentle simmering (2-4 hours) post-aromatic addition; and relies on careful skimming throughout cooking without any vigorous disturbance to the liquid surface.
recipes.ingredients: 2 kilograms uncooked chicken bones • 700 grams chicken pieces • 3 litres cold water • 2 slices fresh ginger • 2 spring onions • 2 garlic cloves • ½ teaspoon sea salt

recipes.title: Fish Stock
recipes.overview: Fish stock (fumet de poisson) is fundamentally different from meat stocks in technique and timing. The key distinction is speed: fish stock cooks for only 25 minutes (versus longer for meat stocks). Extended cooking produces bitter, unpleasant flavors. The correct technique begins with rinsed fish bones, gently sweated aromatics in butter (not roasted), a wine reduction for acidity balance, followed by brief simmering with lemon and bouquet garni. The result is a delicate, refined stock with subtle seafood character perfect for fish sauces, bisques, and elegant preparations. Success depends on using truly fresh fish bones, precise timing (25 minutes exactly), and maintaining a gentle simmer throughout.
recipes.ingredients: 1.5 kilograms fresh fish bones and trimmings • 50 grams unsalted butter • 2 leeks • 75 grams onions • 75 grams fresh button mushrooms • 200 millilitres dry white wine • 2.5 litres cold water • 1 Bouquet garni • 2 slices fresh lemon • 8 white peppercorns

recipes.title: Lamb Stock
recipes.overview: Lamb stock (fond d'agneau) occupies a distinct position between delicate white stocks and robust brown stocks. Unlike white stocks made from blanched bones, lamb stock begins with browned meat pieces, creating stock with visible flavor and color without the heaviness of veal or beef stock. The brown roasting technique develops complex, savory flavors characteristic of lamb, while remaining lighter and clearer than full-brown stocks due to shorter overall cooking time. The inclusion of tarragon (an affinity with lamb) provides herbal character, while tomatoes add acidity and subtle sweetness. White wine reduction concentrates the acidity and prevents overly acidic finished stock. Success depends on proper browning (pale golden, not dark), precise skimming (especially after the first 10 minutes), and maintaining a gentle simmer throughout. The finished stock should be clear, amber in color, with distinctly pleasant lamb aroma.
recipes.ingredients: Approximately 800 grams lamb bones or lamb scraps/trimmings • 150 grams carrots • 100 grams onions • 1 stalk celery • 250 millilitres dry white wine • 2.5 litres cold water • 4 medium tomatoes • 2 cloves garlic • 1 Bouquet garni • 2 sprigs fresh tarragon • 6 white peppercorns
ingredientNames: approximately 800 grams lamb bones or lamb scraps/trimmings

recipes.title: Vegetable Stock
recipes.overview: Vegetable stock (fond de légumes) is the cornerstone of vegetarian cooking and provides a neutral, delicate base for light sauces and vegetable-based preparations. Unlike meat stocks that develop flavor through long simmering, vegetable stock relies on careful vegetable selection and precise timing (45 minutes, not longer) to extract balanced flavor without bitterness. The inclusion of fennel (subtle anise character), white wine reduction (acidity), and aromatics (garlic, shallot, leek) creates depth without overpowering herbaceous flavors. Success depends on cutting vegetables uniformly (for even cooking), maintaining a bare simmer throughout (rolling boil causes cloudiness and bitterness), and precise cooking duration (45 minutes exactly, overcooking produces bitter stock). The finished stock should be pale golden, clear, and gently aromatic with vegetable sweetness.
recipes.ingredients: 300 grams carrots • 2 leeks • 100 grams celery stalks • 50 grams fennel bulb • 150 grams shallots • 100 grams onion • 2 cloves garlic • 1 Bouquet garni • 250 millilitres dry white wine • 2 litres cold water • 10 white peppercorns

recipes.title: White Chicken Stock
recipes.overview: White chicken stock (fond blanc de volaille) is the foundation for classical light sauces including veloutés and suprêmes. Unlike brown stock made with roasted bones, white stock begins with blanched chicken wings, which removes surface impurities before full cooking. This blanching technique results in crystal-clear stock with delicate chicken flavor and light body. Success depends on immediate skimming once water reaches boiling, maintaining a gentle simmer (never boiling), and thorough skimming throughout cooking. The finished stock should be pale, clear, and lightly fragrant with chicken essence.
recipes.ingredients: 1.5 kilograms chicken wings • 200 grams carrots • 2 leeks • 1 stalk celery • 1 onion • 150 grams button mushrooms • 1 Bouquet garni • 2.5 litres cold water

recipes.title: White Veal Stock
recipes.overview: White veal stock (fond blanc de veau) is the cornerstone of classical French sauce-making. Unlike brown veal stock, white stock is created by roasting bones until pale golden (not dark brown) and maintaining a clear, delicate appearance throughout cooking. The inclusion of calf's foot (or calf's knuckle) is essential, providing natural gelatin that gives the finished stock its signature silky mouthfeel and body. Success depends on maintaining a bare simmer (surface barely trembling, not rolling), thorough initial skimming to remove impurities (which cloud the stock), and roasting bones to the correct color (pale golden, not dark). The finished stock should be crystal clear, pale ivory in color, and richly flavored with subtle veal umami. This stock forms the base for velouté sauces, supreme sauces, and provides depth to braises and braised vegetables.
recipes.ingredients: 1.5 kilograms veal bones • ½ calf's foot • 200 grams carrots • 100 grams onion • 1 stalk celery • 2 cloves garlic • 250 millilitres dry white wine • 3 litres cold water • 6 tomatoes • 150 grams button mushrooms • 1 Bouquet garni • 1 sprig fresh tarragon

categories.overview: The fundamentals: chicken, fish, brown and vegetable stocks that flavour soups and sauces.

categories.label: Tarts

subcategories.label: Savoury

recipes.title: Lightly Curried Seafood Flan
recipes.overview: Elegant individual flans featuring fresh shellfish, mussels, scallops, and langoustines, in a silky curry-infused custard set within a crisp pastry case. The delicate interplay of seafood sweetness and warm curry spice creates a sophisticated starter worthy of special occasions. Best served warm from the oven.
recipes.ingredients: 375 g shortcrust pastry • 24 fresh mussels • 3 large scallops • 6 langoustines • 100 g tender green seaweed • 75 ml dry white wine • 1 shallot • 1 tbsp curry powder • 75 ml double cream • 1 whole egg • Salt and freshly ground pepper

recipes.title: Quiches Lorraine
recipes.overview: Classic French quiches featuring a silky, custardy filling enriched with cream and Gruyère cheese, studded with crispy lardons, set in individual pastry cases. The balance of salty pork, rich cheese, and delicate egg custard creates an iconic tart that works beautifully warm or at room temperature. Perfect as a light lunch or elegant starter.
recipes.ingredients: 375 g shortcrust pastry • 140 g lardons • 140 g Gruyère or Comté • 1 egg • 3 egg yolks • 300 ml double cream • Pinch freshly grated nutmeg • Salt and freshly ground pepper

recipes.title: Semi-Confit Cherry Tomato Tart
recipes.overview: A rustic yet sophisticated tart featuring slowly roasted cherry tomatoes with fragrant basil and garlic on a crisp pastry base. The semi-confit technique concentrates tomato sweetness while preserving brightness. A summer-perfect vegetarian tart celebrating tomatoes at their peak.
recipes.ingredients: 260 g shortcrust pastry • 4 tbsp white rice • 3 tbsp strong Dijon mustard • 2 tbsp double cream • Salt and freshly ground pepper • 500 g semi-confit cherry tomatoes • 6 basil leaves

subcategories.overview: Quiches, vegetable tarts and other non-sweet pastries.

subcategories.label: Sweet

recipes.title: Apple and passion fruit tartlets
recipes.overview: These tartlets combine flaky puff pastry with a creamy crème pâtissière and delicate apple slices, finished with fresh passion fruit pulp. They are best served warm so the fruit and custard remain tender and fragrant.
recipes.ingredients: 380 grams classic puff pastry • 180 grams crème pâtissière • 3 medium apples • 60 grams caster sugar • 3 passion fruit

recipes.title: Apple tart
recipes.overview: This apple tart features a buttery sweet shortcrust pastry filled with a vanilla-scented apple compote and topped with delicately arranged baked apple slices. It is best served barely cool with a spoonful of cream or crème fraîche to complement the caramelised fruit.
recipes.ingredients: 300 grams shortcrust pastry • 6 dessert apples • 1 vanilla pod • 60 grams butter • 80 grams caster sugar • 50 ml water • 40 ml water • 80 grams caster sugar

recipes.title: Apricot tart
recipes.overview: This apricot tart uses a sweet shortcrust pastry shell filled with crème pâtissière and a decorative arrangement of ripe apricot halves. It is best served warm or at room temperature, glazed lightly to bring out the fruit's sweetness.
recipes.ingredients: 220 grams Sweet shortcrust pastry • 350 grams crème pâtissière • 8 very ripe apricots • 80 grams caster sugar • 220 grams Sweet shortcrust pastry • 350 grams crème pâtissière • 8 very ripe apricots • 80 grams caster sugar

recipes.title: Cherry clafoutis
recipes.overview: This cherry clafoutis combines a crisp pâte brisée case with a custardy batter filled with juicy cherries and a hint of kirsch. Serve it warm, dusted with icing sugar, to enjoy the soft fruit and golden surface.
recipes.ingredients: 240 grams pâte brisée • 1 egg • 40 grams plain flour • 40 grams butter • 1 tablespoon kirsch • 30 grams caster sugar • 75 ml cold milk • 1 vanilla pod • 450 grams very ripe black cherries • icing sugar

recipes.title: Chocolate and raspberry tart
recipes.overview: This elegant tart marries crisp sweet shortcrust pastry with a glossy dark chocolate ganache studded with fresh raspberries. Chill it before serving to allow the ganache to set, then slice with a warmed knife for neat portions.
recipes.ingredients: 280 grams Sweet Shortcrust • 200 grams fresh raspberries • 250 ml whipping cream • 200 grams dark chocolate , cut into small pieces • 25 grams liquid glucose • 50 grams butter

recipes.title: Lemon tart
recipes.overview: A bright lemon tart with a crisp sweet shortcrust shell and a creamy lemon filling, finished with a caramelised sugar top. It is best served chilled or at room temperature with a glossy brûléed surface and light whipped cream.
recipes.ingredients: 280 grams Sweet Shortcrust • eggwash • 5 unwaxed lemons • 9 eggs • 375 grams caster sugar • 300 ml double cream • 30 grams icing sugar

recipes.title: Orange cheesecake tart
recipes.overview: This orange cheesecake tart combines a shortcrust pastry case with a creamy, citrus-infused cheese filling. It is best served chilled and finished with warm marmalade and candied orange peel for a bright, elegant dessert.
recipes.ingredients: 280 grams shortcrust pastry • 4 oranges • 350 grams fromage frais • 350 grams curd cheese • 150 grams soured cream • 175 grams caster sugar • 4 eggs • 6 tablespoons Seville orange marmalade • candied orange peel

recipes.title: Rhubarb tartlets with orange
recipes.overview: These rhubarb tartlets feature sweet shortcrust cases filled with crème pâtissière and glazed orange-poached rhubarb. They are best assembled just before serving so the pastry stays crisp and the filling remains fresh.
recipes.ingredients: 220 grams Sweet shortcrust pastry • 400 grams tender young rhubarb • 140 grams caster sugar • 1 large juicy orange • 40 grams butter • 120 grams crème pâtissière

recipes.title: Strawberry tart
recipes.overview: This strawberry tart features a crisp sweet shortcrust shell filled with a light blend of crème pâtissière and crème chantilly, topped with fragrant ripe strawberries. Assemble it just before serving so the pastry remains crisp and the fruit stays bright.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams Sweet shortcrust pastry • 300 grams crème chantilly • 150 grams crème pâtissière • 750 grams very ripe fragrant strawberries • a few mint sprigs • icing sugar

recipes.title: Sweet custard tart with poached prunes
recipes.overview: This sweet custard tart combines a crisp flan pastry case with a smooth vanilla custard filling, served here with poached prunes and candied citrus peel. It is best chilled slightly so the custard sets while still offering a tender, creamy bite.
recipes.ingredients: 260 grams flan pastry • 5 egg yolks • 100 grams caster sugar • 20 grams plain flour • 15 grams custard powder • 400 ml milk • 1 vanilla pod • 16 prunes • 150 grams caster sugar • 100 grams candied citrus peel

recipes.title: Tart tatin
recipes.overview: Tarte Tatin is an upside-down caramel apple tart with a crisp pastry lid and soft, glossy apple topping. It is best served warm, turned out onto a serving plate immediately so the caramel remains silky.
recipes.ingredients: 320 grams plain flour • 225 grams ice-cold butter • 110 grams icing sugar • 3 free-range egg yolks • 6 Cox or 4 Granny Smith apples • ¼ lemon • 110 grams caster sugar • 110 grams butter

subcategories.overview: Fruit, custard and chocolate tarts.

categories.overview: Sweet and savoury tarts in shortcrust and puff pastry shells.

categories.label: Vinaigrettes

recipes.title: Caesar Dressing
recipes.overview: Caesar dressing transcends simple vinaigrette through raw egg yolk (creating richness and thicker emulsion), anchovy essence (providing deep umami), and Parmesan cheese (adding complexity). The result is a creamy dressing far more substantial than basic vinaigrette, with an assertive flavor profile that demands equally robust greens. Cos lettuce, with its sturdy texture and slight bitterness, is the perfect partner.
recipes.ingredients: 1 egg yolk • 1/8 teaspoon Dijon mustard • 75 milliliters groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice • 1/8 clove garlic • 1 tablespoon anchovy essence • 30 grams Parmesan cheese • 2 tablespoons water • Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Cucumber Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Cucumber vinaigrette departs from traditional oil-vinegar base by using finely sliced cucumber as primary component, creating a creamy, cool dressing without eggs or cream. The result is a summer dressing, light, cooling, and elegant.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams fresh cucumber • 2 tablespoons rice wine vinegar • 60 grams shallots • 1 teaspoon fresh chives • 1 teaspoon fresh tarragon • 1 teaspoon fresh flat-leaf parsley • 6 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil • 1/4 teaspoon fine sea salt • Pinch of freshly ground white pepper

recipes.title: French Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: French vinaigrette is the fundamental dressing in classical cuisine, a simple emulsion of vinegar, oil, and mustard in perfect balance. The ratio is essential: one part vinegar to three parts oil creates brightness without overwhelming acidity. Dijon mustard serves double duty as emulsifier and flavor agent. This is not a dressing meant for long storage; it's best made fresh, though it keeps refrigerated for several days.
recipes.ingredients: 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard • 1 tablespoon red wine vinegar • 3 tablespoons neutral oil • 1/4 teaspoon fine sea salt • Pinch of freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Lemon and Mint Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: This vinaigrette skips traditional vinegar in favor of fresh lemon juice paired with mint. The result is exceptionally light and fresh, perfect for delicate greens. Minimal cooking at its finest; just whisk together quality ingredients. Mint leaves are scattered on top just before serving, preserving fresh aromatics.
recipes.ingredients: 2 lemons • 6 tablespoons groundnut oil • 6 fresh mint leaves • Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Parmesan Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Parmesan vinaigrette demonstrates how cream elevates a simple dressing from vinaigrette to something more luxurious. The combination of Champagne vinegar (lighter than wine vinegars), English mustard powder (more assertive than Dijon), fresh Parmesan, and heavy cream creates a dressing with depth and richness. This is perfect for winter salads with sturdy greens that can handle its personality.
recipes.ingredients: 1 teaspoon English mustard powder • 2 tablespoons Champagne wine vinegar • 1/4 teaspoon fine sea salt • Pinch of freshly ground black pepper • 6 tablespoons heavy double cream • 30 grams Parmesan cheese • 1 tablespoon fresh chives • 1-2 tablespoons warm water

recipes.title: Roquefort Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Roquefort vinaigrette showcases how blue cheese can anchor a dressing with umami depth and complexity. The combination of walnut oil (bringing subtle earthiness), tarragon vinegar (adding herbal notes), and Worcestershire sauce (contributing fermented depth) creates a winter dressing of considerable character. This is not a delicate vinaigrette for tender greens but rather an assertive accompaniment for robust lettuces and bitter vegetables that match its personality.
recipes.ingredients: 3 tablespoons walnut oil • 3 tablespoons sunflower oil • 2 tablespoons tarragon vinegar • 50 grams Roquefort cheese • 1 teaspoon fresh tarragon leaves or 1/2 teaspoon dried • 2-3 dashes Worcestershire sauce • Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredientNames: fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Saffron Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Saffron vinaigrette represents refinement and luxury, both in ingredient cost and in application. Saffron's distinctive golden color and complex floral-earthy flavor contribute to a dressing of considerable sophistication. The infusion of saffron in warm vinegar extracts maximum flavor while creating a visually stunning golden liquid. Combined with two different oils (groundnut for body, sesame for aromatics) and brightened with soy sauce, this dressing is designed specifically for elegant presentations where appearance and subtle flavor matter greatly.
recipes.ingredients: 3 tablespoons white wine vinegar • 1 small pinch saffron threads • 6 tablespoons groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon sesame oil • 1 teaspoon soy sauce • 1/4 teaspoon fine sea salt • Pinch of cayenne pepper

recipes.title: Thai Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Thai vinaigrette sits at the intersection of acid, umami, and fragrance. Lemongrass infuses the dressing with its distinctive citrusy, grassy notes.
