Fish sauce provides the umami depth that defines Thai seasoning. Fresh coriander and chives contribute herbaceous brightness at the very end. This dressing is best prepared several hours ahead to allow flavors to marry fully; the lemongrass requires time to infuse gently into the rice vinegar and oil.
recipes.ingredients: 4 centimeters lemongrass stalk • 75 milliliters rice wine vinegar • 200 milliliters sunflower oil • 2 tablespoons fish sauce • 1 tablespoon soy sauce • 15 grams fresh coriander leaf • 10 grams fresh chives • Fresh lime juice • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Tomato Vinaigrette
recipes.overview: Tomato vinaigrette is quintessentially simple: ripe tomatoes become juice, which balances against warm sherry vinegar and fruity olive oil. This is among the lightest vinaigrettes because it relies on tomato juice (not cream or cheese) as its primary component. The acid and oil exist in lighter proportion than classical vinaigrettes, making this ideal for warm vegetable preparations and pasta salads where you want maximum tomato character. Fresh basil at the end provides essential aromatic lift; the cayenne adds just enough heat to complement tomato's natural sweetness.
recipes.ingredients: 150 milliliters fresh tomato juice • 50 milliliters extra virgin olive oil • 50 milliliters sherry vinegar • 5 grams fresh basil leaves • Salt to taste • Pinch of cayenne pepper to taste

categories.overview: Emulsified and broken vinaigrettes, classic and contemporary, for salads and crudités.

categories.label: World Cuisine

subcategories.label: Cajun

recipes.title: Big Mike’s Mac ’n’ Cheese
recipes.overview: A creamy, spicy Cajun-style mac and cheese with sharp white Cheddar, hot sauce, and a golden grilled crust. This comforting dish combines classic comfort food with Southern heat for a crowd-pleasing side or main.
recipes.ingredients: 1 lb elbow macaroni, cooked and drained • 60 g butter, melted • 1 egg • 240 ml evaporated milk • 120 ml whole milk • 100 g white Cheddar cheese , plus extra for topping • 2 tsp dry mustard • 1 tbsp hot sauce • Salt and black pepper, to taste

recipes.title: Blackened Chicken
recipes.overview: Blackened chicken is a Cajun classic where a bold spice mixture creates a charred, flavourful crust on the outside while keeping the meat tender inside. The dark finish comes from the high-heat searing of the spice-coated chicken, a technique that seals in juices and creates a distinctive smoky flavour. This versatile dish works equally well with fish and is delicious served over salads, in sandwiches, or as a standalone protein.
recipes.ingredients: 4 chicken breasts • 1 tablespoon oil • 1 tablespoon butter • 1 tablespoon salt • 1½ teaspoons garlic powder • 1½ teaspoons freshly ground black pepper • 1 teaspoon ground white pepper • 1 teaspoon onion powder • 1 teaspoon ground cumin • ½ teaspoon cayenne pepper • ½ teaspoon paprika

recipes.title: Jambalaya
recipes.overview: Jambalaya is a one-pot Cajun rice dish that combines proteins, vegetables, and aromatic spices in a celebration of Louisiana cooking. This contemporary pasta version puts a modern twist on the classic by using penne instead of rice, layering shrimp, chicken, and andouille sausage in a creamy tomato sauce infused with cajun spices. The result is a hearty, flavourful dish that captures the essence of New Orleans cuisine.
recipes.ingredients: 12 large shrimp • 2 chicken breast fillets • 1 Andouille sausage • 250 grams penne pasta • 230 ml chicken stock • 350 ml chopped tomatoes • 230 ml double cream • 3 tablespoons olive oil • 1 onion • 1 red pepper • 1 jalapeño • 2 garlic cloves • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme • 3 tablespoons fresh basil • 3 teaspoons cajun or creole spice mix • 75 grams Parmesan cheese • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Shellfish Gumbo
recipes.overview: Gumbo is a traditional Cajun soup that's served over rice as a main course. This shellfish version showcases the holy trinity of Cajun cooking, onion, celery, and sweet pepper, combined with fresh mussels, prawns, and crab in a rich, flavourful roux-based broth. The addition of fresh chilli adds a modern twist while honouring the classic Cajun tradition of bold, layered flavours.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams fresh mussels • 450 grams raw prawns • 1 cooked crab • Small bunch of parsley • 150 ml vegetable oil • 115 grams plain flour • 1 green pepper • 1 large onion • 2 celery sticks • 1 fresh green chilli • 3 garlic cloves • 75 grams smoked spiced sausage • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme • 6 spring onions • 275 grams white long-grain rice • Tabasco sauce • Salt to taste

subcategories.overview: Louisiana cooking born of French, Spanish, African and Caribbean influences. Heat and depth come from the holy trinity of onion, celery and bell pepper, layered with cayenne, paprika, bay and smoked sausage. Defining techniques are the long-cooked roux, blackening over high heat and one-pot rice dishes like jambalaya and gumbo.

subcategories.label: Chinese

recipes.title: Beef in Oyster Sauce
recipes.overview: A quick and elegant stir-fry that balances savoury oyster sauce with tender beef. This dish exemplifies the Chinese technique of high-heat cooking to seal flavours while keeping meat moist. Quality oyster sauce is essential, it should deepen the dish rather than dominate it.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams lean beef steak • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 1½ tablespoons groundnut oil • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1½ tablespoons oyster sauce • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 1½ tablespoons spring onions

recipes.title: Braised Prawns
recipes.overview: A simple, elegant preparation favoured by street vendors throughout southern China. This quick-braising method takes only minutes and produces tender, fragrant prawns. The beauty of this dish lies in its simplicity, fresh ginger and spring onions infuse the delicate sweetness of prawns. Equally delicious served hot immediately or chilled for an exotic picnic dish.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams prawns • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 2 teaspoons fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock

recipes.title: Cashew Chicken
recipes.overview: This dish exemplifies the Chinese penchant for contrasting textures. Tender succulent pieces of chicken are paired with sweet, crunchy cashew nuts and a delicate sauce. While the original Chinese version would have used peanuts (as cashews were not traditionally featured in Chinese cookery), this adaptation showcases how the cuisine evolves while maintaining its core philosophy of textural harmony.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams boneless chicken breasts • 1 egg white • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 150 ml groundnut oil • 50 grams cashew nuts • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon spring onions

recipes.title: Chicken and Peanut
recipes.overview: When cooking Chinese food, it's essential to think about the flavours and textures of ingredients working in harmony. Juicy chicken combined with succulent baby corn, tender vegetables, and salty, crunchy cashew nuts create a balanced dish where each element complements the others. A glossy sauce ties everything together without overwhelming delicate flavours.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tbsp groundnut oil • 3 garlic cloves • 1/2 tsp fresh ginger • 2 chicken breast fillets • 1 onion • 1 carrot • 40g tinned water chestnuts • 30g tinned bamboo shoots • 3 baby corn cobs • 2 tbsp oyster sauce • 1 tbsp dark soy sauce • 80ml chicken stock • 1/4 tsp salt • 1/4 tsp white pepper • 1 tbsp cornflour • 30g salted, roasted cashew nuts • 1 tsp sesame oil

recipes.title: Chicken in Black Bean Sauce
recipes.overview: A classic Chinese dish bursting with the fragrance of black bean and garlic. Chicken wings are ideal for this preparation as they cook quickly in a high-heat wok while remaining succulent and flavourful. The fermented black beans add depth and a distinctive umami character that defines authentic Chinese cooking.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams chicken wings • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 2 teaspoons groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon garlic • 1½ tablespoons black beans • 1 red pepper • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 150 ml Chinese chicken stock

recipes.title: Chicken with Sesame Seeds
recipes.overview: This is a version of the fragrant Sichuan dish popularly known as 'Strange taste chicken' or bang-bang chicken because it incorporates many flavours simultaneously, hot, spicy, sour, sweet, and salty all in perfect balance. The sesame seeds add a crunchy texture that contrasts beautifully with tender chicken meat. Equally delicious served hot or at room temperature, making it ideal for entertaining.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams boneless chicken breasts • 1 egg white • ½ teaspoon salt • 2 teaspoons cornflour • 150 ml groundnut oil • 1 teaspoon dark soy sauce • 1 teaspoon cider or black rice vinegar • ½ teaspoon chilli bean sauce • ½ teaspoon sesame oil • 1 teaspoon sugar • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • ½ teaspoon Sichuan peppercorns • 2 teaspoons spring onions • 1 tablespoon white sesame seeds

recipes.title: Chilli Pork Spare Ribs
recipes.overview: This showstopper from western Chinese cooking combines spices and sauces in a signature style. Deep-fried spareribs are braised until tender, then finished in the oven with a glossy, spicy coating. The combination of chilli bean sauce, hoisin, and yellow beans creates a complex, savoury flavour profile characteristic of the region. The spareribs can be finished in the oven, under a grill, or on a barbecue.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams pork spareribs • 570 ml groundnut oil • 900 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon chilli bean sauce • 2 teaspoons sugar • 70 ml dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons garlic • 1 tablespoon spring onions • 1 tablespoon whole yellow bean sauce • 1½ tablespoons hoisin sauce

recipes.title: Chow Mein
recipes.overview: Chow mein literally means 'stir-fried noodles' and this contemporary dish is equally popular throughout southern China as it is worldwide. Fresh egg noodles are quickly stir-fried with protein and vegetables, creating a harmonious balance of textures and flavours. The keys to success are properly cooked noodles, high-heat wok cooking, and precise timing.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams fresh egg noodles • 100 grams chicken breast • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • 2 teaspoons groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon groundnut oil • 1 teaspoon garlic • 50 grams mange tout • 25 grams Parma ham • 1 teaspoon light soy sauce • ½ teaspoon sugar • 1 tablespoon spring onions • 1 teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Crispy Sichuan Duck
recipes.overview: In China, duck is a special occasion treatment reserved for banquets and celebrations. Don't be intimidated by the preparation, most steps are straightforward and can be done a day ahead. The technique is masterful: steaming renders out most of the fat, leaving meat moist and succulent, while deep-frying creates a shatteringly crisp skin. The result is elegant, restaurant-quality dinner.
recipes.ingredients: 1 whole duck • 2 tablespoons five spice powder • 2 tablespoons salt • 4 slices fresh ginger • 4 spring onions • 1 litre oil

recipes.title: Curried Chicken with Peppers
recipes.overview: Curry blends beautifully with chicken when prepared in the style of southern Chinese cuisine, as a light, subtle sauce that enhances rather than overpowers the delicate chicken meat. This recipe balances spice with refinement, proving that curry in Chinese cooking is more elegant whisper than aggressive shout.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams chicken breasts • 1 egg white • 1 teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 225 grams green peppers • 150 ml groundnut oil • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 2 teaspoons curry powder or curry paste • 1 teaspoon sugar • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 teaspoon cornflour

recipes.title: Fish in Hot and Sour Sauce
recipes.overview: The combination of hot and sour is a signature of western Chinese cuisine. This quick, simple dish is perfect for a light family meal or elegant entertaining. The interplay between chilli heat, vinegar acidity, and savoury umami creates a vibrant sauce that complements delicate fish beautifully without overwhelming it.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams plaice fillets • 70 ml groundnut oil • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce • 2 teaspoons tomato purée • ½ teaspoon chilli bean sauce or chilli powder • ½ teaspoon white pepper • 1 tablespoon cider vinegar or black rice vinegar • 1 teaspoon sugar • 1 tablespoon spring onions
ingredientNames: chilli bean sauce or chilli powder
cider vinegar or black rice vinegar

recipes.title: Five Spice Spare Ribs
recipes.overview: This delightful meat dish engages the senses with many contrasting tastes. The spareribs are first marinated, then deep-fried until crisp, and finally slowly braised in an unusual, piquant sauce. Five spice powder provides the warm, complex backbone, while vinegar and orange peel add brightness and complexity. The result is both elegant and deeply satisfying.
recipes.ingredients: 700 grams pork spareribs • 570 ml groundnut oil • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon white rice vinegar • ½ teaspoon sesame oil • 1 tablespoon garlic • 1 tablespoon five spice powder • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 1 tablespoon sugar • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons freshly grated orange peel • 70 ml cider vinegar

recipes.title: Fried Fish with Ginger
recipes.overview: Ginger is the Chinese cook's answer to lemon in European fish cookery. In this elegant preparation, fresh ginger imparts a subtle fragrance that enhances rather than masks the delicate flavour of fish. The simplicity of the technique belies the sophistication of the result, the interplay between crispy exterior and tender flesh, balanced with aromatic sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams cod fillets • ¼ teaspoon salt • 1½ tablespoons cornflour • 75 ml groundnut oil • 1½ tablespoons fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon Chinese chicken stock • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 1 teaspoon sugar

recipes.title: General Tso’s Chicken
recipes.overview: This iconic American-Chinese dish combines deep-fried chicken with a sweet, spicy, and slightly tangy sauce. General Tso's chicken exemplifies the bold flavours of outside China Chinese cooking, where heat from dried chillies, sweetness from sugar, and complexity from vinegar create a sauce that is bold yet balanced. Restaurant-quality results require proper oil temperature and crispy, well-coated chicken.
recipes.ingredients: 455g boneless, skinless chicken thighs • 240ml rice wine • 60ml soy sauce • 125g flour • 1 tablespoon salt • 2 litres vegetable oil • 1 tablespoon vegetable oil • 2 cloves fresh garlic • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger • 45g dried chili pod • 60ml rice wine • 60ml soy sauce • 60ml rice wine vinegar • 50g sugar • 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch • 35g spring onion • White rice for serving

recipes.title: Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.overview: This iconic hot and spicy chicken from western China showcases contrasting flavours, heat from chillies and Sichuan peppercorns balanced with subtle sweetness. The numbing quality of Sichuan peppercorns and the fragrance of slow-braising creates an aromatic dish that is equally delicious served immediately or reheated the next day.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams chicken pieces • ½ teaspoon salt • 2 spring onions • 150 ml groundnut oil • 1 teaspoon oil • 1 dried red chilli • ½ teaspoon fresh ginger • ½ teaspoon chilli powder • 300 ml Chinese chicken stock • ½ teaspoon Sichuan peppercorns • ½ teaspoon sugar • 2 teaspoons dark soy sauce

recipes.title: Lemon Chicken
recipes.overview: A Hong Kong specialty that pairs delicate chicken with a tart yet subtly sweet lemon sauce. The technique of shallow-frying chicken strips until just cooked keeps the meat tender, while a glossy sauce coats each piece perfectly. The balance between citrus acidity and the subtle spice of dried chilli makes this dish elegant yet comforting.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams chicken breasts • 1 egg white • 2 teaspoons cornflour • 70 ml groundnut oil • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1½ tablespoons fresh lemon juice • 2 teaspoons sugar • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry or rice wine • ½ teaspoon garlic • 1 dried red chilli • 1 teaspoon cornflour

recipes.title: Peking Duck
recipes.overview: The Chinese revere duck as a symbol of wholesomeness and fidelity. With Peking duck, Chinese cooks mastered the art of maximising the duck's rich, succulent flesh while minimising bone and fat. This simplified method produces similar results to traditional restaurant preparations. While the authentic version involves air-pumping and wood-burning ovens, this approach creates shatteringly crisp skin through a honey-syrup glaze and extended drying.
recipes.ingredients: 1 whole duck • 1 lemon • 1 litre water • 3 tablespoons honey • 3 tablespoons dark soy sauce • 150 ml dry sherry or rice wine • 12 Chinese pancakes • 6 tablespoons hoisin sauce • 24 spring onion brushes

recipes.title: Pork with Black Bean Sauce
recipes.overview: Pork goes particularly well with black beans; their salt and spicy flavour is distinctly Chinese. This quick-cooking dish balances tender pork with the bold, pungent character of fermented black beans. The result is authentic, flavour-forward, and ready in minutes. Perfect for weeknight meals or elegant entertaining.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams lean pork • 2 teaspoons dry sherry • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • ½ teaspoon cornflour • 1 tablespoon oil • 1½ tablespoons black beans • 1½ teaspoons garlic • 1 tablespoon spring onions • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 1 teaspoon sugar • 2 teaspoons Chinese chicken stock

recipes.title: Shredded Beef with Chillies
recipes.overview: The essence of this recipe lies in knife technique: the beef must be cut into very thin strips for authentic texture and rapid cooking. A brief freeze makes slicing easier and more uniform. The result is a dish of tender, fragrant beef balanced with fresh ginger, crisp vegetables, and bold chilli heat.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams tenderloin beef • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce • 1 tablespoon medium-dry sherry • 1 teaspoon dark brown soft sugar • 6 tablespoons vegetable oil • 1 large onion • 3 cm piece fresh root ginger • 1 carrot • 3 fresh chillies • Salt and freshly ground black pepper • Fresh chives
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Sichuan Chicken
recipes.overview: This straightforward Sichuan preparation showcases the region's bold use of chillies and spices. The technique is simple: season, rest, and cook in layers, building flavour as you go. Oyster sauce adds depth, while seven spices (chilli power, Sichuan pepper, salt, garlic, ginger, pepper) create a full-bodied dish.
recipes.ingredients: 250 grams chicken fillets • 2 cloves garlic • 2 cm ginger • ½ tsp salt • ½ tsp red chilli powder • 1 tbsp oil • 3 cloves garlic • ½ red or green bell pepper • 5 dried chillies • 2 tbsp oyster sauce • 4 tsp soy sauce • ¼ tsp black pepper • ¼ tsp sugar • 250 ml water

recipes.title: Sichuan Chicken with Kung Pao Sauce
recipes.overview: This recipe from the Sichuan region of western China showcases the region's trademark use of chillies combined with the modern addition of cashew nuts. The sauce is complex and layered, savoury from fermented beans and hoisin, spicy from dried chillies, and balanced with vinegar's acidity and sugar's sweetness. The result is distinctly Chinese in technique yet contemporary in execution.
recipes.ingredients: 2 skinless chicken breasts • 1 egg white • 2 teaspoon cornflour • ½ teaspoon salt • 3 tablespoons sunflower oil • 3 dried red chillies • 2 tablespoon yellow salted beans • 1 tablespoon hoisin sauce • 1 teaspoon soft light brown sugar • 1 tablespoon medium-dry sherry • 1 tablespoon wine vinegar • 4 garlic cloves • 150 ml chicken stock • 115 grams roasted cashew nuts • Fresh coriander

recipes.title: Sichuan Pepper Beef
recipes.overview: This fast, easy, and delicious supper showcases how Chinese five-spice powder flavours an entire dish via a marinade approach. Overnight marination develops deep, complex flavours that distinguish this simple stir-fry from quickly-thrown-together meals. The combination of Sichuan pepper's numbing quality with five-spice complexity creates an unforgettable sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 2 Sirloin steaks • 1 tablespoon Shaoshing rice wine • 2 teaspoons ground Sichuan pepper • 1 teaspoon dark soy sauce • ½ teaspoon Chinese five-spice powder • 2 garlic cloves • 2 tablespoon groundnut oil • 1 medium red chilli • ½ onion • 1 small handful broccoli • 1 small handful chopped mangetout • 1 small handful chopped carrots • 1 small handful chopped babycorn • 300 ml hot fresh beef stock • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon cornflour • 1 spring onion • Salt and ground white pepper

recipes.title: Sichuan Prawns in Chilli Sauce
recipes.overview: Sichuan cooking is becoming increasingly popular in Western restaurants, and this is one of the best-known dishes from that region. Quick and easy to execute, it makes a wholesome and delicious meal when served with stir-fried vegetables and steamed rice. The vibrant sauce perfectly complements the firm texture of prawns.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams prawns • 2 teaspoons groundnut oil • 2 teaspoons fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon spring onions • 2 teaspoons tomato purée • ½ teaspoon chilli powder • ¼ teaspoon salt • ½ teaspoon sugar • ¼ teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Sizzling Rice Prawns
recipes.overview: This is a dramatic dish sure to earn you compliments. Moderately easy to make but requiring organisation and some Chinese cooking experience. The key to success is that both the prawn sauce mixture and rice cake must be fairly hot, this creates a dramatic, theatrical sizzle when they combine. A showstopping presentation perfect for entertaining.
recipes.ingredients: 450 grams prawns • 2 tablespoons groundnut oil • 2 teaspoons ginger • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 110 grams red or green pepper • 1 tablespoon cider or black rice vinegar • 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce • 2 dried red chillies • 1½ tablespoons tomato purée • 1 teaspoon light soy sauce • 1½ tablespoons dry sherry or rice wine • 1 teaspoon sugar • 300 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon cornflour • 1 rice cake • 1 litre groundnut oil

recipes.title: Spicy Chicken with Peanuts
recipes.overview: This is a classic western Chinese dish better known in China as Gongbao chicken (or Kung Pao chicken). Named after Chinese official Ding Baozhen, Governor of Sichuan province in the nineteenth century, it represents the region's bold approach to flavour: spicy, slightly sour, sweet, and savoury all at once. The combination of roasted peanuts and dried chilli creates an unforgettable sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams boneless chicken breasts • 1 dried red chilli • 1½ tablespoons oil • 75 grams peanuts • 1 tablespoon Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon dry sherry • 2 teaspoons dark soy sauce • 1 teaspoon sugar • 1 teaspoon garlic • 2 teaspoons spring onions • ½ teaspoon fresh ginger • 1 teaspoon white rice vinegar • ½ teaspoon salt • ½ teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Steamed Beef Meatballs
recipes.overview: The secret to light and fluffy meatballs lies in proper technique: egg white and cornflour incorporate air into the mixture, creating a delicate texture. This gentle steaming method keeps them moist and tender while the aromatics infuse throughout. These meatballs reheat beautifully by steaming and are perfect for dinners or as an appetizer at parties.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams minced beef • 1 egg white • 1 tablespoon very cold water • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper • 2 teaspoons sesame oil • 1 tablespoon fresh coriander • 1½ tablespoons spring onions • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 1 teaspoon sugar

recipes.title: Steamed Fish
recipes.overview: Steaming is a great southern Chinese tradition and is considered the preferred method of cooking fish as it brings out the purest flavours. Because it is such a gentle cooking technique, nothing masks the fresh taste of the fish, which remains moist and tender. Simple aromatics, ginger, garlic, and spring onion, infuse the fish without overwhelming its delicate character.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams firm white fish fillets • 1 teaspoon coarse sea salt • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger • 2 tablespoons spring onions • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon groundnut oil • 1 teaspoon sesame oil • 2 garlic cloves

recipes.title: Stir-Fried Beef with Ginger
recipes.overview: This typically Cantonese dish is one of the quickest and tastiest ways to cook beef. The ginger adds a subtle and fragrant spiciness that enhances without overwhelming the tender beef. Freezing the beef before slicing is essential for uniform, thin strips that cook instantly.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams lean beef steak • ¼ teaspoon salt • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry • ½ teaspoon sesame oil • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 1 slice fresh ginger • 1 tablespoon oil • 1 tablespoon Chinese chicken stock • ½ teaspoon sugar

recipes.title: Stir-Fried Beef with Orange
recipes.overview: This is a northern Chinese beef speciality that lends itself to using dried tangerine peel. The Chinese always use peel that has been dried, and the older the peel, the more prized the flavour. The combination creates a sophisticated, citrus-forward sauce that balances the richness of beef beautifully.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams lean beef steak • 2 teaspoon dark soy sauce • 2 teaspoons dry sherry • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 1 teaspoon sesame oil • 70 ml groundnut oil • 2 dried red chillies • 1 tablespoon dried tangerine peel • ½ teaspoon roasted Sichuan peppercorns • 2 teaspoons dark soy sauce • ¼ teaspoon salt • 1 teaspoon sugar • ½ teaspoon sesame oil

recipes.title: Stir-Fried Pork with Spring Onions
recipes.overview: This simple stir-fried dish in the southern Chinese tradition showcases how elemental technique and timing create exceptional results. The key to success is not to overcook the pork. A brief marinade tenderizes the meat and infuses flavour, while spring onions added late retain their fresh bite and delicate onion flavour.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams boneless lean pork • 2 teaspoons dry sherry • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • ½ teaspoon cornflour • 2 teaspoons oil • 4 spring onions • ½ teaspoon salt • ½ teaspoon sugar

recipes.title: Sweet and Sour Pork
recipes.overview: Often mis-made in the West as doughy balls drowned in cloying sauce, properly prepared sweet and sour pork is a delicate balance of flavours, neither strictly sweet nor sour, but harmoniously combined. The key is quality ingredients, proper deep-frying technique, and a refined sauce that complements rather than masks the tender pork. Tinned lychees add authentic sweetness and texture.
recipes.ingredients: 350 grams lean pork • 1 tablespoon dry sherry • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 egg • 2 tablespoons cornflour • 400 ml groundnut oil • 50 grams green pepper • 50 grams red pepper • 50 grams carrots • 50 grams spring onions • 150 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon light soy sauce • ½ teaspoon salt • 1½ teaspoons cider vinegar • 1 tablespoon sugar • 1 tablespoon tomato purée • 1 teaspoon cornflour • 75 grams tinned lychees

recipes.title: Sweet and Sour Prawns
recipes.overview: This is a very popular Chinese dish where the sweet and pungent flavours of the sauce combine beautifully with firm, succulent prawns. Simple to make and elegant enough for entertaining, it can be served as part of a larger Chinese meal or as a standalone starter. The balance of sweet, sour, spicy, and savoury creates an unforgettable sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 225 grams prawns • 110 grams tinned or fresh water chestnuts • 75 grams red or green pepper • 2 spring onions • 2 teaspoons groundnut oil • 2 teaspoons garlic • 70 ml Chinese chicken stock • 1 tablespoon dry sherry or rice wine • 2 teaspoons light soy sauce • 1 tablespoon tomato purée • 1 tablespoon cider vinegar • 1 tablespoon sugar • 2 teaspoons cornflour

subcategories.overview: A cuisine of regional variety, spanning Cantonese restraint, Sichuan numbing heat, Hunan smoke and northern wheat tradition. Aromatics lean on garlic, ginger and spring onion, with depth from soy, rice wine, sesame oil and fermented bean pastes. Wok-based stir-frying, steaming, red-braising and dough work for dumplings and noodles dominate the kitchen.

subcategories.label: Cuban

recipes.title: Cuban-Style Pork Burgers
recipes.overview: These Cuban-style burgers are a vibrant fusion of Spanish and Cuban influences, featuring tender pork patties infused with spicy chorizo, aromatic garlic, and fresh peppers. The patties are griddled to perfection and served with a distinctive potato filling and creamy dressing that makes them distinctly Cuban. The combination of flavors, savory, spicy, and tangy, makes this a signature Cuban comfort food.
recipes.ingredients: 27 grams Spanish chorizo • 454 grams pork mince • 36 grams dried bread crumbs • 1 large egg • 1 small yellow onion • 50 grams green bell pepper • 1 clove garlic • 1/4 tsp. kosher salt • 6 hamburger buns • 6 Tbsp. thousand island dressing • 300 grams potatoes • 6 lettuce leaves

subcategories.overview: Cuba on a plate, where Spanish, African and Caribbean strands are woven together with rice, beans, pork and citrus. Sofrito (onion, garlic, pepper, cumin), oregano and bay set the base, while sour-orange mojo brightens roasted and braised meats. Long gentle braising sits alongside griddled and fried preparations.

subcategories.label: French

recipes.title: Beef Bourguignon (Boeuf Bourguignon)
recipes.overview: Beef Bourguignon is the quintessential French braise, tender beef cubes slow-cooked in a Burgundy wine sauce enriched with pearl onions, mushrooms, and lardons. The combination of wine, beef stock, and a delicate flour thickening creates a deeply savory sauce that clings to the meat. This dish exemplifies classic French technique: patient cooking, careful skimming, and the balance of richness with restraint.
recipes.ingredients: 1 bottle of red wine • 750 ml beef broth • Peanut oil • 60 grams butter • 900 grams rump pot roast • 2 medium carrots • 2 medium onions • 2 tablespoons flour • 1 bouquet garni • 2 cloves garlic • Crushed pepper • Salt to taste • 16 small cippoline onions • 1 teaspoon sea salt • 1 teaspoon caster sugar • 125 grams lardons • 150 grams button cup mushrooms • 1 tablespoon parsley

recipes.title: Breast of Lamb with Mustard and Herb Crust
recipes.overview: This composed dish showcases lamb breast's rich potential: the trimmed meat is braised until tender in an herb-infused stock, then sliced and topped with a crispy herb and mustard breadcrumb crust. The braising liquid becomes an elegant sauce thickened with cream and sharpened with mustard, providing a sophisticated accompaniment that complements both the meat and crust.
recipes.ingredients: 4 portions of lamb breast • 2 tablespoons lamb fat or cooking oil • 50 grams unsalted butter • 1 garlic clove • 1 sprig fresh thyme • 1 sprig fresh rosemary • 2 sage leaves • 1 onion • 2 carrots • 2 celery sticks • Half leek • 1.2 litres chicken stock • Lamb bones • Salt and freshly ground black pepper • 6 slices white bread • 25 grams butter • 2 shallots • 1 teaspoon chopped mixed thyme, sage, and rosemary • 2 teaspoons Dijon or grain mustard • Salt and freshly ground black pepper • 150 ml double cream • 2 teaspoons Dijon or grain mustard
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Lamb Stew (Navarin d'Agneau)
recipes.overview: Navarin d'agneau is a classic French spring stew, combining three different cuts of lamb, shoulder, neck, and breast, for complex flavor and varied texture. The meat braises in a light tomato and stock base, enriched with aromatic vegetables and finished with glazed pearl onions and tender potatoes. The balance of tender vegetables and well-cooked lamb creates a rustic yet refined dish that exemplifies peasant cooking elevated to art.
recipes.ingredients: 3 tablespoons olive oil • 1 kilogram lamb shoulder • 500 grams lamb neck • 500 grams lamb breast • 3 carrots • 3 onions • 30 grams flour • 1 bouquet garni • 4 cloves garlic • 1 large tomato • Sea salt and pepper to taste • 1.2 kilogram small, firm-fleshed potatoes • 15 grams butter • 250 grams small new pearl or cippoline onions • 1 teaspoon caster sugar • Fine salt • 2 tablespoons flat-leaf parsley
ingredientNames: small new pearl or cippoline onions

recipes.title: Normandy Chicken
recipes.overview: Normandy Chicken showcases the bounty of France's northern apple region, combining succulent chicken legs braised in dry cider with caramelized apples, creamy crème fraîche, and aromatic tarragon. The sauce is silky-smooth without being heavy, balanced between the slight tartness of cider and the sweetness of apples, finished with a hint of Dijon mustard that adds complexity without overpowering.
recipes.ingredients: 6 chicken legs • 40 grams butter • 8 shallots • 3 sticks celery , plus leaves for garnish • 300 ml dry cider • 300 ml chicken stock • 2 apples • 2 teaspoons cornflour • 5 tablespoons crème fraîche • 2 tablespoons Dijon mustard • 1 tablespoon chopped tarragon • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

subcategories.overview: The grammar of Western cooking: refined regional and bistro traditions built on butter, cream, herbs and stocks. Shallot, mustard, wine and brandy do much of the seasoning, with mother sauces and reductions giving every dish its finish. Slow braises (boeuf bourguignon, coq au vin), pan sauces and patisserie technique anchor the canon.

subcategories.label: Indian
Base

recipes.title: B.I.R Curry Base
recipes.ingredients: 4 kg Onions • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 3L Water • 500ml Vegetable oil • 2 tbsp salt • 2 tbsp turmeric • 1 rounded tsp garam masala • ½ tsp chilli powder • 30g coconut cream • 2tbs tomato purée

recipes.title: Pre-Cooked Chicken
recipes.ingredients: 2 Kg Chicken Breasts, cut into bite-sized chunks • 4 Tbsp Rapeseed oil • 5 Green Cardamom pods • 10 Black Peppercorns • 1 Inch piece of Cinnamon • 1 tsp Cumin seeds • 1 tsp coriander seeds • 3 Indian Bay leaves • 2 Large Onions • ½ tsp sea salt • 2 Tbsp Garlic and Ginger paste • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 2 x 400g tins chopped Tomatoes • Water • 1 tsp Garam Masala

recipes.title: Pre-Cooked Lamb
recipes.ingredients: 3 lbs Lamb, diced with fat and skin cut off • 2 onions, finely diced • 1 tbsp Cumin seeds • 2 tbsp Garlic/Ginger paste • 2 tbsp Tomato Purée • 1 tsp Coriander Powder • 1 tsp Chilli Powder • 1 tbsp Turmeric • 1 tbsp Methi • 1 tsp Garam Masala • 1 Curry leaf • 1 tsp Sugar • 1 tsp Salt • Handful of fresh Coriander, chopped • 300ml Vegetable Oil • Water

recipes.title: Red Masala Sauce
recipes.overview: A simple spiced yoghurt marinade used for tandoori-style dishes. Combines yoghurt with tandoori paste, warming spices, and a touch of lemon juice to create a vibrant red coating for chicken, lamb, or vegetables before grilling or roasting.
recipes.ingredients: 500 ml yoghurt • Pinch of chilli powder • Pinch of garam masala • Pinch of coriander powder • 1 tsp salt • 1 heaped tbsp Pataks tandoori paste • 1 level tsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tbsp red food colouring • Few squirts of lemon juice
ingredientNames: level tsp garlic and ginger paste

subcategories.overview: Sauces, purées and base gravies that underpin Indian curries.

subcategories.label: Breads

recipes.title: Bengali Paratha
recipes.overview: A pleated, multi-layered Bengali flatbread laminated with ghee and studded with chillies, fresh herbs and freshly crushed black pepper. The dough is folded fan-style and rolled into a spiral coil so each paratha bakes into a stack of flaky leaves. Best eaten straight off the tawa with dal, a curry, or a bowl of yoghurt.
recipes.ingredients: 180 g whole wheat flour or maida • 1 tablespoon ghee or oil • ½ teaspoon salt • Warm water • 3 tablespoons chives • 2 tablespoons flat leaf parsley • 1-2 Thai bird's eye chillies • 1 teaspoon Tellicherry black peppercorns • ½ teaspoon salt • Ghee

recipes.title: Bhatura
recipes.overview: Soft, slightly leavened Indian flatbreads traditionally served with chole (chickpea curry). The addition of yoghurt gives bhatura weight and flavor, making them a street-food favorite.
recipes.ingredients: 1 tsp sugar • 2 tsp fast-action/instant active dried yeast • 175 ml warm water • 240 g plain/all-purpose flour, plus extra for rolling • 1½ tbsp plain yogurt • 1 tbsp melted ghee • Pinch of salt • Vegetable oil, for frying

recipes.title: Chilli Pooris
recipes.overview: Small deep-fried Indian flatbreads built on a half-and-half mix of plain and wholemeal flour, spiked with chilli powder and chopped fresh chilli. Each piece puffs in seconds in the hot oil and stays crisp for a few minutes off the heat. Best served straight from the pan alongside a north Indian curry or pickles and yoghurt.
recipes.ingredients: 115 g plain flour • 115 g wholemeal flour • ½ teaspoon salt • ½ teaspoon mild chilli powder • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil • 1 fresh red chilli • 100 ml water • Vegetable oil

recipes.title: Missi Rotis
recipes.overview: A Punjabi-style flatbread built on a half-and-half mix of gram (chickpea) flour and wholemeal flour, kneaded with chopped chilli, onion, fresh coriander and turmeric. The result is a thicker, rougher roti than its plain wheat counterpart, with a savoury flavour that works as well alongside a curry as it does on its own with yoghurt.
recipes.ingredients: 115 g gram flour • 115 g wholemeal flour • 1 fresh green chilli • ½ onion • 1 tablespoon coriander • ½ teaspoon ground turmeric • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 tablespoon melted butter • 120 ml lukewarm water • 2 tablespoons melted butter

recipes.title: Naan
recipes.overview: A grill-cooked version of the traditional tandoor naan: large, light and slightly sweet, with a chewy crumb and a sesame and onion-seed crust. Yoghurt and a touch of sugar in the dough give it the soft, almost briochey texture that the tandoor's blast of heat usually produces. It's the wrap that should hold a kebab, or sit alongside a Balti on the table.
recipes.ingredients: 450 g strong white flour • 1 tablespoon baking powder • 1 tablespoon granulated sugar • 2 tablespoons Greek yoghurt • 1 teaspoon aromatic salt • 2 teaspoons sesame seeds • ½ teaspoon wild onion seed • Lukewarm water • A little ghee

recipes.title: Puris
recipes.overview: Deep-fried wholemeal flatbreads built on a tight, slightly drier dough than a roti so they hold their shape long enough to puff in the oil. Each disc puffs in seconds and stays crisp for a few minutes off the heat. Best served the moment they leave the pan, ideally with chole or another sauce-rich curry.
recipes.ingredients: 310 g wholemeal flour, plus extra for dusting • ½ teaspoon salt • 100 ml water, plus more as needed • Vegetable oil, for deep frying

recipes.title: Rotis
recipes.overview: A simple wholemeal flatbread that lives or dies on technique rather than ingredients. Rolled to even thinness and cooked first on a hot tawa, then puffed over a naked flame, a properly made roti separates into two thin sheets of soft bread. The right partner for almost any curry, dal or chutney.
recipes.ingredients: 380 g wholemeal flour • ½ teaspoon salt • 1 tablespoon vegetable oil • 240 ml water, or as needed

subcategories.overview: Naans, rotis, parathas and pooris, leavened and unleavened.

subcategories.label: Meals
BIR

recipes.title: Authentic Chicken Handi
recipes.overview: A rich, ghee-laden chicken handi cooked in the traditional style, featuring tender chicken thighs simmered in a spiced tomato-onion base with yoghurt and cream. Named for the handi pot, this dish varies by chef but delivers deep, authentic flavors.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 125 ml ghee • 2 medium red onions, thinly sliced • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 2 tomatoes, diced • 4 green chillies, sliced • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 1 tsp red chilli powder • 1 tsp ground coriander • 800 g skinless chicken thighs, on or off bone, cut into small pieces • 125 ml water, unsalted chicken stock, or spice stock • 250 g plain yoghurt, whisked smooth • 70 ml single cream • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 1 tsp garam masala • Salt, to taste • Bunch coriander , chopped • 5 cm piece ginger, peeled and julienned

recipes.title: Charsi Karahi
recipes.overview: A minimalist charsi karahi featuring tender lamb chunks cooked in their own fat with garlic, tomatoes, and chillies. No spices beyond kasoori methi, the rich lamb fat and simple ingredients create an incredibly flavorful, moist curry perfect for naan.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 900 g small chunks lamb or mutton on the bone • 250 g lamb fat, cut into 2.5 cm chunks • 2 tbsp garlic paste* • 5 medium tomatoes, quartered • 10 green bullet chillies or similar, cut lengthwise • 2 tbsp rapeseed oil • 1 litre water • Salt, to taste • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves
ingredientNames: small chunks lamb or mutton on the bone

recipes.title: Chicken Ceylon
recipes.overview: A bright and spicy Sri Lankan-inspired curry with a curry-house spin, featuring aromatic spices, coconut, and fresh curry leaves. It works beautifully as a banquet dish and can be extra hot with extra bird’s eye chillies and chilli powder. The subtle sweet-tang tuning makes it a favorite with rice and mild dhal.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 star anise • 7.5 cm piece cinnamon stick or cassia bark • 4 green cardamom pods, bashed • 20 fresh or frozen curry leaves • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 green bird’s eye chillies, finely chopped • 2 tbsp coconut flour • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 1 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tbsp tandoori masala • ½ tbsp freshly ground black pepper • 125 ml tomato purée • 625 ml base curry sauce , heated • 800 g tandoori chicken tikka • 125 ml spice stock or pre-cooked stewed chicken stock • 100 g block coconut, cut into small pieces • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 2 tbsp smooth mango chutney • 1–2 tbsp raw cashew paste • Salt, to taste • Sugar, to taste • Juice of 1 lime • 1 tsp garam masala • 3 tbsp chopped coriander , to finish
ingredientNames: cm piece cinnamon stick or cassia bark
spice stock or pre-cooked stewed chicken stock

recipes.title: Chicken Chasni
recipes.overview: A sweet and smooth British-Indian chasni that pairs best with tandoori chicken tikka. Balanced mango chutney, mint sauce, and tomato ketchup give this curry bright sweetness and tang, while cream and optional red colouring deliver the signature rich appearance.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp ghee or rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • ½ tsp ground turmeric • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 800 g pre-cooked stewed chicken, plus 125 ml cooking stock, or extra base curry sauce • 3 tbsp smooth mango chutney • 2 tbsp mint sauce • 3 tbsp tomato ketchup • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 200 ml double cream • Salt, to taste • Juice of 1–2 lemons, to taste • Bright red food colouring powder • ½ tsp garam masala • 3 tbsp very finely chopped coriander
ingredientNames: ghee or rapeseed oil or seasoned oil

recipes.title: Chicken Chilli Garlic
recipes.overview: A bold, garlicky curry with a brisk curry-house kick. This jalfrezi-style dish uses plenty of fresh garlic, green chillies, and tandoori tikka, making it spicy but not overwhelming.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 15 garlic cloves, cut into thin slivers • 1 onion, finely chopped • ½ tsp salt • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 3+ fresh green chillies, thinly sliced • 1 tsp chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 2 tbsp tandoori masala • 125 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce, heated • 800 g tandoori chicken tikka • 125 ml pre-cooked stewed chicken stock or spice stock • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Salt, to taste • Small bunch coriander , finely chopped • Dried garlic flakes, to serve
ingredientNames: pre-cooked stewed chicken stock or spice stock

recipes.title: Chicken curry
recipes.overview: A curry-house style chicken curry that builds flavor from whole spices and fresh aromatics rather than premade base sauces. The method takes a little more time, but rewards you with a rich, home-style curry sauce and tender chicken. Add extra chilli or more garam masala to increase heat for your preference.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil • 2.5 cm piece cinnamon stick • Seeds from 3 green cardamom pods • 2 star anise • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 2 onions, finely chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 125 ml tomato purée or plain passata • 2 tbsp mixed powder or curry powder • 2 tsp ground cumin • 2 tsp ground coriander • ½ tsp ground turmeric • 1–2 tbsp paprika • ½ tsp garam masala • 2 medium tomatoes, diced • 900 g chicken thighs or breast, cut into bite-size pieces • Pinch dried fenugreek leaves • Salt, to taste • 3 tbsp melted ghee • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander , to garnish

recipes.title: Chicken Dhansak
recipes.overview: A British curry-house classic with sweet-sour notes of pineapple and lemon and earthy dhansak lentils. Inspired by Parsi dhansaks, this version uses red split lentils and pre-cooked chicken for convenience while keeping the iconic flavour profile.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tbsp chilli powder, or to taste • 125 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 180 g red split lentils, rinsed and cooked until soft • 800 g pre-cooked stewed chicken, plus a splash of cooking stock or spice stock • 115 ml pineapple juice • 3–4 canned pineapple rings, cut into pieces • Salt, to taste • Juice of 1–2 lemons, to taste • 3 tbsp chopped coriander

recipes.title: Chicken Dopiaza
recipes.overview: A vibrant do-piaza curry based on layered onion textures and warming spices. This version uses both seared onion petals and a yoghurt-onion paste to build depth; the result is a rich, savoury, mildly tangy curry that works with pre-cooked stewed chicken or freshly poached chicken.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 6 green cardamom pods, bashed • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 1 tsp coriander seeds, roughly chopped • 1 small onion, quartered and divided into petals • 3 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp ground cumin • 1–2 tsp mild or hot chilli powder, to taste • 125 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 600 g pre-cooked stewed chicken, plus 250 ml of its cooking stock, or extra base curry sauce • 7 tbsp onion paste made with yoghurt • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Salt, to taste • 1 tsp garam masala • Small bunch coriander , chopped • 2 handfuls fried onions

recipes.title: Chicken Jalfrezi
recipes.overview: A curry-house jalfrezi inspired by a Balti House classic, featuring quick stir-fried peppers, chillies, onions and tender chicken in a light spiced sauce. It is traditionally dry and crisp, but can be adjusted for more sauce by adding extra base curry or stock.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 onion, thinly sliced • 1 red bell pepper, deseeded and thinly sliced • 3 green bird’s eye chillies, roughly chopped • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 6 tbsp tomato purée • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 500 ml base curry sauce, heated • 700 g pre-cooked stewed chicken, plus 100 ml cooking stock • 2 tomatoes, quartered • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Salt, to taste • 1 tsp garam masala • 2 tbsp chopped coriander leaves • 2 green finger chillies, halved lengthwise

recipes.title: Chicken Karahi
recipes.overview: A classic karahi curry inspired by Imran’s in Birmingham, featuring tender chicken pieces simmered in a rich, spiced tomato-onion sauce. Traditionally served sizzling in a karahi pan, this dish is perfect for soaking up with naan.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 1 tbsp rapeseed oil • 100 g Greek yoghurt • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tsp salt • 1 tbsp freshly ground black pepper • 800 g chicken leg and thigh, cut into pieces • 4 tbsp rapeseed oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 quantity fried onions • 1 tbsp pungent dried red chilli flakes • 2 large tomatoes, diced • 1½ tbsp ground cumin • 1½ tbsp ground coriander • 1 tbsp Kashmiri chilli powder • Salt, to taste • 7.5 cm piece ginger, peeled and julienned • 2 fresh green bullet chillies, roughly chopped • 1 tsp garam masala • Coriander , to serve

recipes.title: Chicken korma
recipes.overview: A creamy, nutty British-Indian korma that uses both block coconut and coconut flour for depth and body. This curry is rich yet balanced, with mild heat and a hint of sweetness from sugar, banana and rose water. Serve with white rice and a mild dhal for the full experience.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp ghee, rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2.5 cm piece cinnamon stick or cassia bark • 4 green cardamom pods, lightly bruised • 1 tsp garlic and ginger paste • 3 tbsp sugar, or to taste • 6 tbsp ground almonds • 2 tbsp coconut flour • 700 ml base curry sauce , heated • 100 g block coconut • 800 g raw chicken breast, cut on the diagonal into 5 mm slices, or pre-cooked stewed chicken • 1 tbsp garam masala • 125 ml single cream, plus a little extra to finish • 1 tbsp rose water, or to taste • 2 tbsp cold butter • Salt, to taste
ingredientNames: cm piece cinnamon stick or cassia bark

recipes.title: Chicken Methi Curry
recipes.overview: Fenugreek-forward chicken methi curry with a rich base sauce and a tangy cream finish. Fresh fenugreek leaves are ideal, but dried kasoori methi can provide the signature aroma, especially in supermarkets where fresh leaves are scarce. This curry is aromatic with anise notes and a subtle bitterness balanced by yoghurt.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: ½ tsp salt • Large handful fresh fenugreek leaves*, roughly chopped • 3 tbsp rapeseed oil • 2 star anise • 1 Indian bay leaf • 1 tsp coriander seeds • 1 tsp fennel seeds • 1 onion, finely chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 green chillies, finely chopped • Stalks from a large bunch of coriander • 1 tbsp mixed powder or curry powder • 1 tsp bassar curry masala or chilli powder • 75 ml plain passata • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 700 g pre-cooked chicken, plus 120 ml cooking stock • 4 tbsp plain yoghurt • Salt, to taste • 3 tbsp chopped coriander leaves • ½ tsp garam masala • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves
ingredientNames: stalks from a large bunch of coriander
bassar curry masala or chilli powder

recipes.title: Chicken Pasanda
recipes.overview: British-Indian Pasanda is a mild, creamy curry based on almond and coconut richness with a slight sweet edge from sultanas. Traditional pasanda uses flattened and tenderized meat; this version uses thinly sliced chicken breast and can be made with tandoori chicken if preferred. A splash of red wine is optional and adds depth.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp almond flakes • 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 3 tbsp coconut flour • 3 tbsp ground almonds • 2 tbsp sugar • About 20 sultanas • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 100 g block coconut, cut into small pieces • 800 g skinless, boneless chicken breast, thinly sliced diagonally • Splash of red wine • Salt, to taste • 100 ml single cream • 1 tsp garam masala

recipes.title: Chicken Pathia
recipes.overview: A British-Indian pathia curry with a sweet-and-sour profile, tuned for balanced acidity and a hint of chilli warmth. The recipe uses lemon, mango chutney and sugar for tang/sweetness, with optional red food colouring for the classic curry-house appearance.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 small onion, very finely chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • Salt, to taste • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 2 tbsp sugar, or to taste • 125 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 800 g pre-cooked stewed chicken, plus 125 ml cooking stock, or extra base curry sauce • 1 tbsp smooth mango chutney, or to taste • ½ tsp tamarind concentrate • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Juice of 1–2 lemons, to taste • Red food colouring powder • 3 tbsp chopped coriander

recipes.title: Kashmiri chicken
recipes.overview: An aromatic curry-house classic that blends tandoori chicken with a sweet-spicy sauce of nuts, spices, banana and mango chutney. This dish is cooked quickly once the base sauce is ready, making it ideal for a flavorful weeknight meal or part of a banquet. Raisins add a pleasant sweetness and balance to the heat.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp melted ghee or rapeseed oil • 2.5 cm piece cinnamon stick • Seeds from 3 green cardamom pods • 2 cloves • 1 small onion, very finely chopped • 1 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp ground almonds • ½ green bell pepper, thinly sliced • 1½ tsp mixed powder or curry powder • ½ tsp Kashmiri chilli powder • 70 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 1 tsp tamarind concentrate • 700 g tandoori chicken tikka • ½ banana, sliced into coins • 2 tbsp raisins • 2 tsp smooth mango chutney • 3 tbsp plain yoghurt • Salt, to taste • Coriander , to garnish

recipes.title: Lamb Achari
recipes.overview: A Punjabi-inspired achari curry featuring pickle spices like panch poran and dried chillies, balanced with sweet mango chutney and tangy lime pickle. This dish captures the essence of Indian pickles in a rich, flavorful lamb curry.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or vegetable oil • 1 tbsp panch poran • 2 Kashmiri dried red chillies, split lengthways and deseeded • 1 onion, thinly sliced into rings • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 bird’s eye chillies, finely chopped • 125 ml tomato purée, plain passata, or blended canned tomatoes • 2 tbsp mixed powder or curry powder • 1 tsp ground coriander • 1 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder • 600 ml base curry sauce, heated • 750 g pre-cooked lamb, plus 200 ml cooking stock • 2 tbsp lime pickle, or 1 tbsp each lime pickle and smooth mango chutney • 4 tbsp plain yoghurt • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 1 tsp garam masala • Salt, to taste • Juice of 1 lemon • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander leaves, to garnish

recipes.title: Lamb Bhuna
recipes.overview: A restaurant-style bhuna using pre-cooked lamb for speed, while keeping the dry, intensely-flavoured finish. The classic bhuna technique is approximated with quick spice frying, and lamb is finished in a rich, reduced sauce.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp ghee, rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 small onion, finely chopped • ¼ red bell pepper, deseeded and roughly chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 125 ml tomato purée • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 2 tbsp tandoori masala • 500 ml base curry sauce, heated • 800 g pre-cooked stewed lamb, plus 250 ml cooking stock • 2 tbsp Greek yoghurt • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste • Small bunch coriander leaves, finely chopped • Juice of 1–2 limes • Sliced red chilli
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Lamb Madras
recipes.overview: A classic British curry-house madras with a sweet-and-sour profile, featuring tender lamb in a spicy, tangy sauce. This version balances heat from chillies and chilli powder with mango chutney and lime for a feast-worthy dish.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2–4 Kashmiri dried red chillies, to taste • A few green cardamom pods, lightly bruised • 3 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 fresh green chillies, or to taste, finely chopped • 125 ml tomato purée • 2 tbsp ground cumin • 1 tsp ground coriander • ¼ tsp ground turmeric • 1–2 tbsp chilli powder, to taste • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 500 ml base curry sauce, heated • 800 g pre-cooked stewed lamb, plus 250 ml cooking stock, or extra base curry sauce • 1–2 tbsp smooth mango chutney, to taste • Juice of 1 lime • Salt, to taste • Pinch of garam masala • Coriander , to garnish

recipes.title: Lamb Naga Phall
recipes.overview: An extremely hot British curry-house phall featuring Naga chillies and Mr Naga pickle for intense heat balanced with rich flavors. This dish is not for the faint-hearted; serve with cooling accompaniments like rice, naan, and cold lager.
recipes.ingredients: 4 habanero chillies, finely chopped • 2 tbsp rapeseed oil or mustard oil • ½ small onion, finely chopped • ½ red bell pepper, diced • 1 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tbsp Mr Naga chilli pickle • 1 tbsp mixed powder or curry powder • 2 tsp Kashmiri chilli powder • 70 ml tomato purée • 300 ml base curry sauce, heated • 200 g lamb tikka or pre-cooked lamb in sauce • Salt, to taste • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • ½ tsp garam masala • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander
ingredientNames: lamb tikka or pre-cooked lamb in sauce

recipes.title: Lamb Rogan Josh
recipes.overview: A British-Indian take on the classic Kashmiri lamb rogan josh, featuring a deep red sauce from paprika and tomato rather than traditional Kashmiri chillies and rattanjot. This version uses pre-cooked lamb for quick assembly, with rich, caramelized flavors from tempered spices and creamy cashew-yoghurt finish.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp paprika • 1 tsp chilli powder, or more to taste • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 1½ tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 1 tsp garam masala • 125 ml tomato purée • 500 ml base curry sauce , heated • 700 g pre-cooked stewed lamb, plus 200 ml of its cooking stock • 2 tomatoes, quartered • 2–3 tbsp raw cashew paste • 3 tbsp plain yoghurt, plus extra to garnish • Salt, to taste • 3 tbsp chopped coriander leaves

recipes.title: Lamb Saag
recipes.overview: A quick British curry-house version of classic Punjabi saag gosht, combining pre-cooked lamb and bright spinach puree for a rich, green sauce. Similar to slow-cook authentic versions, this recipe delivers deep, buttery flavour in a fraction of the time.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 225 g baby spinach leaves • A little water or spice stock • 3–6 fresh green bullet chillies, to taste • Bunch coriander leaves , leaves only • 4 tbsp ghee, rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 onion, finely chopped • 2 tbsp garlic paste and 1 tbsp ginger paste*, or 3 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 1 tbsp ground coriander • 1 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 180 ml tomato purée • 375 ml base curry sauce, heated • 600 g pre-cooked stewed lamb, plus 250 ml cooking stock • 2 tbsp plain yoghurt • Juice of 1 lemon • 1 tbsp garam masala
ingredientNames: garlic paste and 1 tbsp ginger paste*

recipes.title: Lamb Vindaloo
recipes.overview: A fiery British curry-house vindaloo with Portuguese-Goan influences, featuring intense heat from Scotch bonnets and chillies, balanced by vinegar and sweetness. This version uses pre-cooked lamb for speed, with optional potatoes as per UK tradition.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 6 green cardamom pods, bashed • 2 star anise • 1 Indian bay leaf • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 fresh green bullet chillies, finely chopped • 2 Scotch bonnet chillies, finely chopped • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 2 tbsp hot chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 125 ml tomato purée • 2 tsp jaggery or sugar • 600 ml base curry sauce, heated • 800 g pre-cooked stewed lamb, plus generous ¾ cup cooking stock • 2 tbsp white wine vinegar • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 2 pre-cooked stewed potatoes • 3 tbsp chopped coriander • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
ingredientNames: salt and freshly ground black pepper

recipes.title: Mango Chicken Curry
recipes.overview: A sweet-spicy BIR-style mango chicken curry with plenty of tropical fruit brightness and mild curry-house heat. This recipe blends the pineapple-style sweetness of mango chutney and fruit chunks with a rich coconut-spiced base and tender chicken.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 2 tbsp rapeseed oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tbsp mixed powder or curry powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 2 fresh green chillies , thinly sliced • 600 ml base curry sauce, heated • 6 tbsp coconut flour • 4 tbsp smooth mango chutney • 700 g pre-cooked chicken • 1 small mango, cut into bite-size chunks • Salt, to taste • 1 tsp garam masala • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander leaves

recipes.title: Special Balti
recipes.overview: A customizable British curry-house special balti, mixing pre-cooked meats, seafood, and vegetables in a rich, spiced sauce. This is a chef's signature dish, adapt with your favorite ingredients for a personalized feast.
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil • ½ onion, finely chopped • 1 large tomato, diced • 2 green chillies, finely chopped • 200 g pre-cooked lamb keema • 3 pieces tandoori chicken tikka • 3 pieces tandoori lamb tikka • 2 handfuls chopped spinach • 3 prawns , shelled and cleaned • Handful tinned chickpeas • 2 tbsp tomato purée • 1 tsp paprika • ½ tsp ground turmeric • 1 tsp mixed powder or curry powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 150 ml base curry sauce, heated • 100 ml thick coconut milk • Salt, to taste • ½ tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Juice of ½ lemon

recipes.title: Tandoori Methi Chicken Tikka
recipes.overview: A flavorful methi chicken tikka combining fresh fenugreek with aromatic spices and yoghurt marinade. This recipe blends elements from various traditional preparations, resulting in a barbecue favorite with charred edges and tender, juicy meat.
recipes.serves: 4 or more as part of a multi-course meal
recipes.ingredients: 800 g skinless chicken thighs or breasts, cut into 7.5 cm pieces • 2 large bunches fresh fenugreek leaves* • 3 tbsp rapeseed oil or mustard oil • 1 tbsp cumin seeds • 250 g Greek yoghurt • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 5 tbsp finely chopped coriander leaves • 1 tbsp green chilli paste • 1 tbsp red chilli powder • 1 tbsp garam masala • 1 tbsp gram flour • 3 tbsp cream cheese • 1 tbsp rapeseed oil • Juice of 2 lemons • 50 g unsalted butter, melted • Salt, to taste

recipes.title: Vindaloo (Restaurant-Style)
recipes.overview: A hot, sour, and deeply spiced curry originating from Goa. Built on a vinegar-based marinade and a chilli-forward masala, this version follows a BIR-style workflow using a base gravy while preserving the characteristic tang.
recipes.ingredients: 6–8 cloves garlic • 1 tbsp ginger • 2–4 tsp chilli powder • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 1 tsp coriander seeds • 4–6 black peppercorns • 2 cloves • 1 small cinnamon stick • 2–3 tbsp white vinegar • 1 tsp sugar • ½ tsp turmeric • Salt to taste • 2–3 tbsp oil • 1 onion , finely chopped • 1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste • 2 tbsp tomato paste • 250–300ml base curry gravy • Water as needed • 1–2 tsp vinegar • Fresh coriander

subcategories.overview: British Indian Restaurant style: pre-cooked meat and a base gravy joined with spices in a fast finish, the curry-house technique.

recipes.title: Agra Ginger Chicken
recipes.overview: A light, cleansing chicken curry from Agra with fresh ginger, warm spices and bright tomato notes. This vibrant dish is designed to be accessible and fresh, with spinach and lime lifting the finished curry.
recipes.ingredients: 80 ml vegetable oil • 2 large white onions, halved and thinly sliced • 5 cm fresh root ginger, peeled and grated • 6 garlic cloves, minced • 4 green cardamom pods • 2 cinnamon sticks • 3 tbsp garam masala • ½ tsp ground turmeric • ¼ tsp chilli powder • 750 g bone-in chicken thighs, quartered • 400 g canned chopped tomatoes • 450 ml water • 1 tsp salt • 1 tsp sugar • 200 g baby spinach, washed • Zest of 1 lime • 1 small bunch fresh coriander/cilantro, leaves and stalks roughly chopped

recipes.title: Angry Bird
recipes.overview: Simple tandoori-style chicken thighs marinated in yogurt and spices for tender, flavorful meat. Thighs or drumsticks work best; use mild paprika for color and flavor, or chilli powder for heat. Yogurt and lemon tenderize the meat, allowing spices to penetrate deeply.
recipes.ingredients: 8 skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs • 500 g plain yogurt • ½ tsp ground turmeric • ½ tsp chilli powder • 1 large green chilli, deseeded and finely sliced • 2 tsp ground cumin • 2 tsp ground coriander • 1 tsp ground cinnamon • 2 tbsp paprika • ½ tsp ground cloves • 5 cm piece fresh root ginger, peeled and grated • 3 garlic cloves, minced • ½ tsp salt • Juice of ½ lemon

recipes.title: Butter Chicken
recipes.ingredients: 1.5kg grilled tandoori chicken • 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2.5cm piece of cinnamon stick • 2 star anise • 6 green cardamom pods • 2 Indian bay leaves • 2 onions • 1 carrot, grated • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 X 400g tins of chopped tomatoes • 1 tsp paprika • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 1 tbsp ground coriander • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 300ml double cream • 3 tbsp butter, chilled • 1 tbsp garam masala • Salt and freshly ground pepper

recipes.title: Chicken Balti
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 small onion, roughly chopped • 1 green pepper deseeded and roughly chopped • 1 tomato, diced • 1 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tbsp finely chopped green chillis • 1 tsp ground cumin • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 1 tsp paprika • 250ml base curry sauce • 200g skinless chicken breast or thigh meat, cut into small pieces • 1 tbsp garam masala • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Salt • Chopped coriander to serve
ingredientNames: green pepper deseeded and roughly chopped
200g skinless chicken breast or thigh meat

recipes.title: Chicken Ceylon
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 800g pre-cooked chicken • 125ml chicken stock • 2 star anise • 3 inch piece of cinnamon stick • 4 green cardamom pods • 20 fresh or frozen curry leaves • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 green bird’s-eye chillies • 2 tbsp coconut flour • 3 tbsp finely chopped coriander • 1 tsp Kashmiri hot chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tbsp tandoori masala powder • ½ tbsp freshly ground black pepper • 125ml tomato purée • 625ml base curry sauce • 100g block coconut • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 2 tbsp smooth mango chutney • Sugar, to taste • Juice of 1 lime • 1 tsp garam masala • 3 tbsp freshly chopped coriander • Salt

recipes.title: Chicken Chasni
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp ghee or rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • ½ tsp ground turmeric • 500ml base curry sauce • 800g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 125ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken • 3 tbsp smooth mango chutney • 2 tbsp mint sauce • 3 tbsp tomato ketchup • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 200ml double cream • Juice of 1 or 2 lemons, to taste • Bright red food colouring powder • ½ tsp garam masala • 3 tbsp very finely chopped coriander • Salt
ingredientNames: ghee or rapeseed oil or seasoned oil
125ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken

recipes.title: Chicken Chilli Garlic
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 15 garlic cloves, cut into thin slivers • 1 onion, finely chopped • 4 tsp salt • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 3 fresh green chillies, sliced into thin rings, plus extra to serve • 1 tsp chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 2 tbsp tandoori masala • 125ml tomato purée • 500ml base curry sauce • 800g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 125ml of chicken stock or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Salt • Small bunch of coriander • Dried garlic flakes, to serve
ingredientNames: 125ml of chicken stock or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken

recipes.title: Chicken Dhansak
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tsp ground turmeric • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tbsp chilli powder, or to taste • 125ml tomato purée • 800g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 500ml base curry sauce • 180g red split lentils, rinsed and cooked in water until soft • 115ml pineapple juice • 3-4 tinned pineapple rings, cut into pieces • Juice of 1 or 2 lemons, to taste • 3 tbsp freshly chopped coriander • Salt

recipes.title: Chicken Jalfrezi
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 onion, thinly sliced • 1 red pepper , deseeded and thinly sliced • 3 green bird’s-eye chillies, roughly chopped • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 6 tbsp tomato purée • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 500ml base curry sauce • 700g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 100ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken • 2 tomatoes, quartered • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 1 tsp garam masala • Salt • Fresh coriander leaves • Green finger chillies, cut in half lengthways
ingredientNames: 100ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken

recipes.title: Chicken Korma
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp ghee, rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 800g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 2.5cm piece of cinnamon stick or cassia bark • 4 green cardamom pods, lightly bruised • 1 tsp garlic and ginger paste • 3 tbsp sugar, or to taste • 6 tbsp ground almonds • 2 tbsp coconut flour • 700ml base curry sauce • 100g block coconut • 1 tbsp garam masala • 125ml single cream, plus a little more to finish • 1 tbsp rose water or to taste • 2 tbsp cold butter • Salt
ingredientNames: 2.5cm piece of cinnamon stick or cassia bark

recipes.title: Chicken Pasanda
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp almond flakes • 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 3 tbsp coconut flour • 3 tbsp ground almonds • 2 tbsp sugar • About 20 sultanas • 500ml base curry sauce • 100g block coconut, cut into small pieces • 800g skinless, boneless chicken breast, cut into thin slices on the diagonal • 125ml red wine • 100ml single cream • 1 tsp garam masala • Salt

recipes.title: Chicken Pathia
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 small onion, very finely chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp chilli powder • 2 tbsp sugar • 125ml tomato purée • 500ml base curry sauce • 800g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 125ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken • 1 tbsp smooth mango chutney • ½ tsp tamarind concentrate • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Juice of 1 or 2 lemons, to taste • 3 tbsp chopped fresh coriander • Salt
ingredientNames: 125ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken

recipes.title: Dopiaza
recipes.ingredients: 4 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 600g pre-cooked stewed chicken • 500ml base curry sauce • 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken • 1 small onion, quartered and divided into petals • 6 green cardamom pods • 1 tsp cumin seeds • 1 tsp coriander seeds • 3 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 125ml tomato purée • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 1 tsp ground cumin • 1-2 tsp mild or hot chilli powder, to taste • 7 tbsp onion paste made with yoghurt • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • Small bunch of coriander • 2 handfuls of fried onions • 1 tsp garam masala • Salt
ingredientNames: 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed chicken

recipes.title: Gunpowder Chicken
recipes.overview: Gluten-free popcorn chicken bites made with gram flour batter, inspired by overpriced drive-thru versions. Tender chicken pieces coated in spiced batter and tossed with tangy chutneys and fresh toppings for a flavorful, addictive snack.
recipes.ingredients: 2 large chicken breasts, chopped into 2 cm pieces • 2 tsp crushed garlic • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 1 tbsp ground coriander • 2 tsp ground cinnamon • ½ tsp salt • Juice of ½ lemon • 1 egg, beaten • 380 g gram flour • Vegetable oil, for deep frying • 1 large red chilli, finely sliced • ½ red onion, finely sliced • 1 tbsp chopped fresh coriander • 2 tbsp Tamarind Chutney • 2 tbsp Green Chilli Pickle

recipes.title: Lamb Bhuna
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp Vegetable Oil • 1 Small Onion • 5 Pieces Pre-cooked Lamb • Pinch Salt • 2 tsp Fenugreek Leaves • 1 tsp Cumin Seeds • 1 tsp Turmeric Powder • 2 tbsp Garlic/Ginger Paste • 2 Fresh green Chillies • 2 tbsp tomato purée • 1 Tomato • 3 tbsp Base Sauce • Fresh Coriander

recipes.title: Lamb Bhuna
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp ghee, rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 small onion, finely chopped • 1/4 red pepper , deseeded and roughly chopped • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp finely chopped coriander stalks • 125ml tomato purée • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 2 tbsp tandoori masala • 500ml base curry sauce • 800g pre-cooked stewed lamb • 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb • 2 tbsp Greek yoghurt • Small bunch of coriander leaves (finely chopped • Salt and freshly ground pepper • Juice of 1 or 2 limes • Sliced red chilli, to serve
ingredientNames: 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb
small bunch of coriander leaves (finely chopped

recipes.title: Lamb Karahi
recipes.ingredients: 800g lamb leg and shoulder, cut into pieces, ideally still with bone in • 1 tbsp rapeseed oil • 100g Greek yoghurt • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 tsp salt • 1 tbsp freshly ground black pepper • 4 tbsp rapeseed oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 1 quantity fried onions • 1 tbsp pungent dried red chilli flakes • 2 large tomatoes • 1½ tbsp ground cumin • 1½ tbsp ground coriander • 1 tbsp Kashmiri chilli powder • 3 tbsp julienned ginger • 2 fresh green bullet chillies • 1 tsp garam masala • Fresh coriander

recipes.title: Lamb Madras
recipes.ingredients: 3 tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2-4 Kashmiri dried red chillies, to taste • A few green cardamom pods, lightly bruised • 3 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 fresh green chillies • 125ml tomato purée • 2 tbsp ground cumin • 1 tsp ground coriander • 1/4, tsp ground turmeric • 1-2 tbsp chilli powder • 2 tbsp mixed powder • 500ml base curry sauce • 800g pre-cooked stewed lamb • 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb • 1-2 tbsp smooth mango chutney • Juice of 1 lime • Pinch of garam masala • Fresh coriander to garnish • Salt
ingredientNames: 250ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb

recipes.title: Lamb Nihari
recipes.ingredients: 4 lamb shanks • 125ml rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 1 whole nutmeg, crushed into smaller pieces • 1 tbsp mace blades • 2 tbsp fennel seeds • 3 Indian bay leaves • 1 inch piece of cinnamon stick broken into small pieces • 1 tsp black peppercorns • 1 tsp nigella seeds • 1 tsp cloves • 2 tsp cumin seeds • 1 tsp paprika • 1 tsp hot chilli powder • 1 tsp ground ginger • 40g unsalted butter • 1 onion, sliced into rings • 2 generous tsp chapatti flour • Salt • 4 tbsp fine julienne of ginger • 2-3 hot fresh green chillies • Handful of coriander leaves • Lemon wedges
ingredientNames: inch piece of cinnamon stick broken into small pieces

recipes.title: Lamb Rogan Josh
recipes.ingredients: tbsp rapeseed oil or seasoned oil • 2 tbsp garlic and ginger paste • 2 tbsp paprika • 1 tsp chilli powder, or more to taste • 125ml tomato purée • 500ml base curry sauce • 1 tbsp ground cumin • 1½ tbsp mixed powder • 700g pre-cooked stewed lamb • 200ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb • 2 tomatoes, quartered • 2-3 tbsp raw cashew paste • 3 tbsp plain yoghurt • 1 tsp dried fenugreek leaves • 1 tsp garam masala • 3 tbsp chopped coriander leaves • Chopped red onion, to garnish • Salt
ingredientNames: 200ml of curry base or stock from pre-cooked stewed lamb

recipes.title: Maa’s Lamb Chops
recipes.overview: Tender lamb chops marinated in spiced yogurt, evoking the aroma of family parties. Despite poor margins, this dish captures the essence of home and Mowgli's heritage. Grilled to perfection for a nostalgic, flavorful experience.
recipes.ingredients: 8 lamb chops, about 2.5 cm thick • 500 g plain yogurt • 2 tbsp ground cumin • 2 tbsp paprika • 1 tsp ground cloves • 1 tsp ground green cardamom • 1 tsp fenugreek powder • 1 tsp ground turmeric • Juice of 1 lemon • 4 garlic cloves, minced • 1 tbsp minced fresh root ginger • 2 tsp salt

recipes.title: Mowgli Sticky Wings
recipes.overview: Crispy, sweet, and sticky chicken wings with a rich, fruity glaze from date syrup and treacle. These finger-licking wings blend dessert-like sweetness with savory spices, perfect for satisfying cravings at the intersection of sweet and savory.
recipes.ingredients: 1 kg chicken wings • 4 tbsp date syrup • 2 tbsp black treacle • 3 garlic cloves, minced • 5 cm piece fresh root ginger, peeled and grated • 1 tsp garam masala • 2 tsp ground cumin • ½ tsp black mustard seeds • 4 tsp dark rum • Juice of ½ lemon • 2 tbsp white wine vinegar • 1 tsp salt

recipes.title: Simple Lahori Chicken Curry
recipes.overview: A traditional Lahori-style chicken curry built on a base of caramelised onions, tomatoes, and whole spices bloomed in oil. Yoghurt is added gradually to prevent splitting, creating a rich, silky sauce. Finished with fresh coriander and lemon juice, this is a deeply flavourful North Indian classic.
recipes.ingredients: 1 whole chicken , cut into 8–10 pieces, skin removed • ¾ tsp turmeric, divided • ½ tsp cayenne pepper, divided • Salt, to taste • 1½ medium onions, roughly diced • 5 garlic cloves • 5 cm fresh ginger, peeled and halved crosswise • 45 ml canola oil, divided • 5 cm cinnamon stick • 12 green cardamom pods • 9 whole cloves • 9 black peppercorns • 2 large tomatoes, chopped • 30 ml tomato paste • 60 ml plain yogurt, whisked smooth • 240 ml water • 30 g fresh coriander, chopped • Juice of 1 lemon

recipes.title: Vindaloo
